title: Dispute Manager
description:
We are currently looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Dispute Manager VA who can help us deliver accurate, compliant, and effective dispute processing while maintaining an excellent client experience.



If you are organized, responsive, and take pride in precision and results — this role is for you.



About the Company

We are a growing service-based company focused on helping individuals improve their credit profiles and overall financial readiness. Our goal is to create a structured, compliant, and supportive environment for both our clients and our team.



We value accuracy, communication, accountability, and consistency.



Responsibilities

As a Dispute Manager VA, you will:



Review client credit reports for inaccuracies and negative items

Prepare and submit dispute letters (credit bureaus, creditors, CFPB, etc.)

Track dispute progress and update client files in our system (DisputeFox or similar)

Assist with onboarding clients and reviewing submitted documents

Monitor deadlines and ensure timely follow-ups

Communicate updates to clients when needed

Maintain organized and accurate client records

Report any discrepancies, issues, or concerns to the team

Requirements



We are looking for someone who:

Has strong written English communication

Is highly detail-oriented and organized

Can follow dispute workflows and compliance guidelines

Is reliable and responsive

Has basic knowledge of credit repair/disputes (preferred but not required)

Is willing to learn and grow with the team



To Apply, Please Complete the Following:

1. Please answer the following questions:



A. What credit repair software or platforms do you have experience with?

(Examples: DisputeFox, Client Dispute Manager, Credit Repair Cloud, etc.)



B. Briefly explain your dispute process from start to finish.

(Keep it simple but include key steps you take to ensure accuracy and results.)



C. Are you familiar with filing disputes through:

Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB)

Federal Trade Commission (FTC)



If yes, briefly explain when and why you would use them.



D. How do you ensure strong and effective dispute results for clients?

(Example: documentation, strategy, follow-ups, compliance, etc.)



To Be Considered, Please:

Complete the test task above

Include the word “GROWTH” in your application



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Talent Acquisition Partner
description:
We are looking for an experienced Senior Talent Acquisition Partner to support our hiring efforts on a part-time basis (~30 hours per week). The role will focus on recruiting for senior-level positions across Software, Product, and Marketing functions.

This is a high-ownership role suited for someone who is highly independent, detail-oriented, and able to manage the full recruitment lifecycle with minimal supervision.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

-Manage end-to-end recruitment for senior-level roles (Software, Product, Marketing)



-Screen and assess candidates based on role requirements and company standards



-Conduct structured interviews and evaluate candidate fit



-Manage and maintain an active candidate pipeline



-Coordinate with hiring managers and stakeholders to align on requirements and progress



-Ensure a smooth and professional candidate experience throughout the process



-Support employment verification and recruitment documentation when needed



-Maintain accuracy and consistency in applicant tracking and reporting





REQUIREMENTS:



-Proven experience in senior-level recruitment/talent acquisition



-Strong track record of successfully placing candidates in tech, product, or marketing roles



-Experience handling end-to-end recruitment processes



-Excellent communication skills in English (both written and verbal)

-Strong interpersonal and interviewing skills

title: Scriptwriter for NBA Themed YouTube Channel
description:
Are you a fan of NBA Classics? Larry Bird, Rodman, the 80s/90s when the game had real characters? Do you love writing AND know how to dig through the internet to find a 12-second clip from a 47-minute Barkley interview? You're in luck.

Please don't send a resume or cover letter. I don't care.

Here's what I care about:

? You've written for YouTube before, and you can prove it. Send 2–3 long-form scripts (40+ min) you've written, live on YouTube. Lead with anything that hit 100K+ views.

? You watch the NBA YouTube niche for fun. If you don't, this isn't the gig.

? You live and breathe AVD. Cold open, sag zones, sticky pockets, payoff timing — you should be able to articulate retention strategy for a 60-min video without me prompting.

? Researcher first, writer second. The scripts are interview-driven compilations. Every chapter is built from real quotes from real podcast/TV appearances — Barkley on Inside the NBA, Dominique on NBA TV, Payton on GP Show, Buck Williams from a 30-year-old broadcast. You hunt them down. Googling "Larry Bird trash talk quotes" doesn't cut it.

? Every clip with a timestamp. Non-negotiable. The editor cannot work off "insert Barkley clip here." Format:

CHARLES BARKLEY — FULL STORY

Source: 
 · 32:50–33:30

[transcribed quote]

Exact URL, exact in/out, transcribed quote underneath.

? Proactive. I won't micro-manage. You build the premise, the chapters, source the clips, and write the host V.O. that bridges them.

What a finished script looks like: chapter structure + host V.O. + sourced clips with URLs/timestamps + editor notes for placement and retention.

Let's see where this takes us.

title: 3D Car Modeler (Blender) — Grassroots Indie Racing Game
description:
About the Project



Grassroots Legends is an indie simcade racing game in active development, featuring 80s and 90s period vehicles across multiple disciplines (dirt track, rally, rallycross, road, and arena racing). Think beat-up everyday cars from that era, lightly prepped and sent wheel-to-wheel. The vibe is authentic grassroots motorsport, not polished GT cars.



The Role

We're looking for a part-time Blender artist to help optimize existing car models and contribute to the vehicle lineup. You'll be working closely with the creative director on a game that values authenticity. Knowing your Commodores from your Corollas, and basic motorsport understanding is highly valued.



What You'll Be Doing



Optimizing existing vehicle meshes (polygon reduction, LODs, UV cleanup) for game-engine performance

Maintaining visual accuracy on 80s/90s period cars across multiple racing disciplines

Communicating clearly with the creative director through revision rounds (English via discord or whatsapp)



What We're Looking For



Solid Blender skills with a vehicle modeling portfolio — show us real car work

Knowledge of 80s/90s cars valued, familiarity with grassroots/budget motorsport (dirt oval, rally, demo derby, etc.)

Understanding of real-time optimization: LODs, poly budgets, clean topology

Self-directed and reliable: This is a small indie project and we need people who take ownership



Nice to Have

Experience working on racing games or vehicle mods

Interior / cockpit design skills

PBR texturing skills



How to Apply

Send us: 

(1) a portfolio link with your best vehicle work, 

(2) background / interest in motorsport / cars, if any

(3) your expected hourly rate or typical rates per vehicle / optimization.



No portfolio = no consideration.

title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper
description:
Job Title: US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper

Location: Remote

Job Type: Part-time

Starting Rate: $6.00/hour (Increase after 90-day performance review)



We are seeking a reliable, detail-oriented professional to join our growing team. If you have real experience with US tax preparation and QuickBooks bookkeeping and enjoy working in an organized, systems-driven environment, we encourage you to apply.



Overview

We are looking for a dedicated US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper to support our accounting and tax operations. In this role, you will prepare individual and business tax returns, maintain accurate financial records, and help ensure clients’ books are clean and tax-ready year-round.

This position is ideal for someone who is accurate, dependable, and proactive, with the ability to work independently and meet deadlines.



Job Details

As a US Tax Preparer & Bookkeeper, you will manage tax preparation and bookkeeping tasks for multiple clients, maintain organized documentation, and support efficient workflows. Your work will play a key role in ensuring compliance, accuracy, and a smooth tax process for our clients.



What You’ll Be Doing

Tax Preparation & Compliance

Prepare Individual Tax Returns (Form 1040) and related schedules

Prepare Business Tax Returns (1120, 1120S, 1065)

Handle State and Franchise Tax filings

Review financial records to ensure accuracy and tax readiness

Identify missing information and communicate with the team as needed

Maintain organized digital tax workpapers and documentation



Bookkeeping & Financial Management

Perform bookkeeping using QuickBooks Online

Categorize transactions accurately

Reconcile bank and credit card accounts

Clean up and correct incomplete or messy books when necessary

Prepare monthly financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet)

Ensure books remain accurate and ready for tax filing



Data Entry & Administrative Support

Perform accurate data entry and document management

Upload and organize client files using consistent naming and folder structures

Track tasks and meet internal deadlines

Assist with administrative support related to tax and accounting operations



Systems & Process Improvement

Follow and help improve internal workflows and checklists

Create SOPs and process documentation when needed

Identify opportunities to improve efficiency or reduce errors



What You Bring to the Role

Proven experience preparing US individual and business tax returns

Experience with QuickBooks Online

Experience with TaxSlayer or similar US tax software

Strong attention to detail and accuracy

Excellent time management and organizational skills

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications

Experience handling Franchise Taxes

Previous experience working with a US accounting or tax firm



What You Can Expect

Starting rate of $6.00/hour

Performance review after 90 days with opportunity for a pay increase

Long-term position with growth potential

Stable workload and supportive team environment

Opportunity to expand responsibilities based on performance



About the Company

We are a growing accounting and tax services company focused on providing accurate, reliable, and efficient support to our clients. Our goal is to build a strong remote team that values integrity, accountability, and continuous improvement. We believe in long-term relationships and creating opportunities for team members to grow with the company.

If you have real US tax preparation experience and are looking for a long-term remote opportunity, we encourage you to apply.

title: youtube video editor
description:
Looking for a video editor for long-form documentary style YouTube videos.



The editing style should feel serious, immersive and tension-driven — not generic stock footage slideshows.



References:



* MagnatesMedia

* ColdFusion



What I need:



* strong pacing

* good visual storytelling

* frequent but natural scene changes

* subtle zooms/movement

* strong retention-focused editing



Avoid:



* generic happy office clips

* scenes that stay too long

* overused corporate stock footage

* excessive effects



The first 30–90 seconds are extremely important.



I will provide:



* voice-over

* script

* scene structure



I need someone who understands how to keep viewers engaged, not someone who only places random clips over audio.

title: Real Estate Acquisitions VA — Cold Caller
description:
Butler Acquisition Group is a US real estate investment company growing fast. We're hiring an Acquisitions VA to call off-market property owners, qualify motivated sellers, and book appointments for our acquisition manager.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- 200+ outbound dials per day from pre-loaded lists

- Hit a minimum of 200 dials and 15 conversations per day, tracked in GoHighLevel

- Use our scripts to identify motivated sellers and gather property/condition info

- Log every call accurately in GoHighLevel

- Tag leads, set follow-ups, send approved SMS templates

- Hand hot leads directly to the acquisition manager

- Show up on time every day, US Central hours



TOOLS WE PROVIDE

- GoHighLevel account (CRM + dialer + SMS)

- Pre-loaded lead lists

- Scripts and SMS templates

- Training on our pipeline and process



REQUIRED

- Cold calling experience

- Real estate experience

- Excellent spoken English — clear, calm, confident under pushback

- Comfortable learning a new CRM/dialer if you haven't used GoHighLevel before

- Reliable internet (15+ Mbps), quiet workspace, USB headset

- Available 9am–5pm US Central time



NICE TO HAVE

- Prior GoHighLevel experience

- PropStream + BatchSkipTracing experience

- Familiarity with wholesale, lease option, and buy/rehab/hold exit strategies



PAY

- $4/hour base (~$640/month at 40 hrs/week)

- $150 bonus per closed deal you sourced

- Paid weekly via Wise or PayPal

- 13th month bonus + PTO after 90 days



HOW TO APPLY (read carefully — applications missing any of these get skipped)



1. Send a 60-second Vocaroo recording introducing yourself and reading this script:

"Hi, this is [your name] calling from Butler Acquisition Group. I'm reaching out because we'd like to make an offer on a property you might own. Do you have 30 seconds to talk?"



2. Briefly describe your cold calling and real estate experience.



3. List the dialers and CRMs you've used.



4. Attach a screenshot of your speedtest.net result.



5. Start your application with the word "GULF" so I know you read this.



Hiring this week. Serious applicants only.

title: Remote Lead Generation Specialist – Thailand Visa Services (Commission/Per-Lead)
description:
Job Overview



We are a professional visa consultancy based in Thailand offering visa services to all nationalities, including tourist visas, retirement visas, elite cards, business visas, and work permits. We are looking for a motivated, English-speaking remote worker based in India or Indonesia to help us generate leads and inquiries from potential clients worldwide.



This is a lead generation role only — you will NOT need to close sales, process visas, or handle complex client questions. Your job is simply to drive interested people to contact us through our website inquiry form.



What You Will Do



•Promote our Thailand visa services across social media platforms 
 groups, Reddit, Expat forums, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

•Post in relevant communities such as expat groups, digital nomad groups, Thailand travel groups, and retirement abroad communities

•Reach out to individuals or communities who may need Thailand visa assistance

•Drive potential clients to fill out our inquiry form on our website

•Track and report the number of leads generated each week in a simple spreadsheet

•Suggest new platforms or strategies to find potential clients



What We Offer



•Flexible remote work — work your own hours from anywhere

•Commission-based pay: 5% to 10% of the service fee for each client who completes a purchase

•OR fixed pay: $1 per verified lead (person who submits our inquiry form)

•No experience in visas required — we will provide all materials, service descriptions, and talking points

•Long-term ongoing opportunity with consistent work and growth potential



Requirements



•Fluent in written English

•Active presence on social media and online communities

•Self-motivated and able to work independently without supervision

•Basic ability to track leads in a shared spreadsheet

•Reliable internet connection

•No prior experience in visa or immigration services needed

title: Email Marketing Specialist — GoHighLevel (Champion Gym)
description:
About Us

Champion Gym is a martial arts and fitness facility in Grande Prairie, Alberta. We offer programs in BJJ (Jiu-Jitsu), Muay Thai, MMA, Boxing, Taekwondo, Kickboxing, Wrestling, Ninja Warrior, Yoga, and Fitness. We also run Birthday Parties, Events, and TCLA — a private school program. We're growing fast and need someone to build out our
 marketing system from the ground up.



The Role

We use GoHighLevel and have a contact list of approximately 9,000 people. Our member data lives in Gymdesk — including program enrollment, attendance, membership tier, payment status, and purchase history — all exportable to CSV and ready for import into GHL. We need someone to build the
 and SMS marketing infrastructure and turn this data into targeted, revenue-generating campaigns.



What You'll Do

- Import and structure member data from Gymdesk CSV into GHL

- Segment contacts by program, membership tier, activity level, and demographics

- Build lead nurture sequences for new inquiries

- Create re-engagement campaigns for cold and lapsed contacts

- Set up retention flows triggered by attendance drops and expiring memberships

- Write regular promotional
s (offers, events, class spotlights)

- Build SMS follow-up sequences tied to
 campaigns

- Track and report on open rates, clicks, and conversions weekly



Requirements

- Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel — specifically
/SMS automation and workflows

- Experience with CSV data imports and contact segmentation in GHL

- Strong English copywriting

- Comfortable building from scratch — not just managing existing campaigns

- Self-directed with minimal hand-holding needed

- Bonus: experience with gyms, fitness, or local service businesses; basic Canva skills for
 graphics and promotional assets



To Apply

Share 1–2 examples of GHL automations or
 campaigns you've built. Tell us in a few sentences what your first 30 days would look like setting up
 marketing for a gym with a 9,000-person segmented list.

title: Sales Appointment Setter
description:
Description

If you're ready to start your journey as a remote worker, this could be your opportunity! Leave that commute and call center cubicle behind!



You’ll handle calls, texts, and DMs from prospects, schedule appointments, and ensure a smooth client experience. Ideal candidates thrive in a high-volume, process-oriented, growth environment and enjoy connecting with clients. This is a script-driven role. During the call, you will follow the script word?for?word. If you dislike running proven scripts and prefer to “freestyle” or “make it your own,” this will not be a fit.



Brief Background

Our environment is built for ambitious appointment setters who want more:



More structure. More mastery. More confidence. More skill. More earning potential.



Less chaos. Not less accountability.



This is a high-accountability, KPI-driven environment:



You’ll be on the phone and text most of your day.

You’ll be measured on dials, contacts, bookings, and show rate.

We rank performance and coach from real numbers, not feelings.

If you:



Want total schedule flexibility or “work when you feel like it”

Dislike scripts or prefer to change them based on comfort

Are looking for a big guaranteed salary with low performance pressure

This will not be the right role.



General Overview

Daily Duties

Run a word?for?word call script for the entire call, from greeting to booking, on every conversation. The only time you go off script is to answer a client’s specific question (e.g. directions, timing) or collect unique information. Any changes to wording are tested and approved by the Salon Director first.

Responding to inbound SMS,
 DMs, and Instagram DMs that are escalated to a human when AI cannot handle it

Creating follow up tasks in the CRM

Booking appointments, rescheduling, and cancelling

Calling no-shows to get them back on the calendar

Communicating with hair stylists regarding client requests and scheduling needs

EOD Reporting

Weekly Duties

Weekly review meeting

Review KPI targets, own your numbers, and bring data?backed ideas to improve them (no freelancing on scripts or processes; changes go through a structured process).

Schedule: This is a full-time role, we want someone who will become an integral part of the team and is looking for an opportunity to eagerly learn and earn great commissions proportional to the value they provide to the team. This is your primary role, not a side gig. We expect a minimum 12?month commitment



This is a full time role (40 hours per week) that must meet with the following schedule:



Monday - Friday 7:45 AM – 4:45 PM PST

1 hour of break (30 min lunch, + 2 -15 min. or 1 -30 min. break)

This schedule is fixed. If you need flexible or rotating hours, or plan to hold another job during these times, this role will not be a fit.

Requirements

Language: Near native English

Sales Experience: Minimum 6 months of sales experience, with the ability to perform discovery, build rapport, and handle objections.

Communication: Confident, articulate, and friendly on the phone; extroverted personality.

Emotional Intelligence (EQ): Able to read tones, detect hesitation, and proactively address it.

Process-Oriented: Detail and process-oriented, capable of following instructions and SOPs.

Problem-Solving: Ability to resolve edge case scenarios independently and overcome objections

CRM Literacy: Experience using a CRM and keeping leads organized. Experience using GoHighLevel is a big plus.

Internet: Fast and reliable internet and back up in case of outages. 25-50 Mbps minimum speed

Computer: 8 GB computer RAM minimum required, 16+ preferred. Must have a wired headset and mouse. Second monitor preferred

Preferred Qualifications



1 year+ sales experience.

Salon/beauty service industry familiarity (or any B2C appointment-based service business experience).

Personal interest in beauty/self-care industry.

Experience dealing with female clientele

AI literacy, specifically with AI agents or AI-powered tools for business/sales applications 

Benefits

100% Remote – work from anywhere.

Opportunity to work closely with a growing company

Collaborative and creative work environment

Competitive salary: Base salary range is $900 per month plus attractive commission structure based on successful appointments completed, and performance bonuses.

What it takes to be successful:



Calls/Day: Finish all assigned tasks each day.

High call volume is normal and non?negotiable in this role. If 150–250 calls per day sounds overwhelming instead of energizing, this will not be a fit.

We’re looking to supply 25-35 leads per day, possible more depending on how much you can handle.

Calls include new leads, follow-ups, no-shows, reactivations, rebooking confirmations, and overdue tasks from prior days.

Lead to Booking Rate: 25%+

Show Rate: 75%+

Bookings/Day: 7-10+

Showed Appointments/Month: 130+

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (Gig) — Work Health & Safety Compliance Management Software
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a skilled Senior Full-Stack Developer for gig-based work on a production-grade, multi-tenant SaaS platform focused on work health and safety compliance management.



You will be working from Figma designs and are expected to deliver pixel-perfect implementations while integrating AI-powered features into the existing application. This is not a beginner role.



What You Will Do



UI/UX Implementation — Translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect components within our existing Next.js application

App Development — Build and extend features across our React-based frontend and backend

AI Integration — Integrate AI capabilities into the platform in a meaningful, production-ready way

Logic & Refactoring — Modify existing Server Actions and components to support new workflows and features

Bug Fixing — Identify and resolve UI regressions or logic errors during development





Tech Stack (Must Have)



Next.js 15 (App Router) — Server Actions used extensively

TypeScript (Strict) — No any types; type safety is a priority

Styling — Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, Shadcn UI

Database — PostgreSQL with Kysely query builder (via Neon)

State Management — React Context & React Hook Form with Zod validation

AI Integration — Hands-on experience integrating LLMs or AI APIs into production applications





Bonus Skills



Experience with file uploads to AWS S3 via presigned URLs

Replicache or Local-First sync strategies

MLOps or AI model monitoring experience





Who You Are



You pay attention to detail — if the design has 16px padding, you don't make it 20px

You're comfortable working in a large, existing codebase without breaking unrelated features

You communicate clearly and flag issues early

You can work independently from design files with minimal hand-holding





Selection Process

Shortlisted candidates will be required to complete a paid test task — you will be provided with a Figma design and asked to implement it as a fully functional component within our tech stack. This is how we assess real-world fit before committing to ongoing work.



How to Apply

To confirm you've read this post, please do the following:



Send a message with the subject line: "WHS Developer Application - [Your Name]"

Include a link to your portfolio or GitHub profile

Answer this question in your application: "What is your preferred method for handling form validation in Next.js Server Actions?"

Share your availability — immediate start preferred

title: Junior UI/UX Designer — Long-Term Remote Role — Fast-Growing SaaS Platform
description:
About the Role

We are a growing SaaS company with a live, AI-powered platform. We are hiring a junior UI/UX designer to join our design team and work alongside our senior designer and lead engineer.



This is a long-term, multi-year, remote, full-time opportunity for someone who wants to grow with a company from the ground up.



What You Will Be Doing

Cleaning up visual inconsistencies in our current user portal

Designing screens in Figma based on specs from our senior designer

Renaming, reorganizing, and aligning UI elements across the platform

Helping us prepare for a major platform rebuild over the next 5-8 months

Learning and growing under the direction of our senior designer



What We're Looking For:

Working knowledge of Figma (must be comfortable with components, auto-layout, and basic design system concepts)

Some UI/UX design experience — even small projects, school work, or freelance work counts

A good eye for detail — you notice when things are misaligned, off-color, or inconsistent

Willingness to learn and take direction from our senior designer

Reliable and consistent — you show up, communicate clearly, and finish what you start

Good written English

Full-time availability (40+ hours per week)



Experience level: Junior is fine. We care more about attitude, eye for detail, and willingness to learn than how many years you have been designing.



How to Apply

To apply for this role, please fill out our short application form here. Copy and paste this link into your browser:





The form takes about 5 minutes and asks for your portfolio link, design tools, expected hourly rate, availability, and a short answer question about a SaaS product you currently use.



Important: We will only review applications submitted through the form. 



Please do not send your full application as a message through OnlineJobs — use the form link above. 



Applications without a portfolio link will not be considered.



Final Notes

We pay fairly, on time, every time. We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who want to grow with us.



Thank you
salary: Rate based on experience and portfolio

title: CUSTOMER SUPPORT AGENT
description:
**Job Title:** Customer Service Agent (Shopify Clothing Store)

---



### **Job Overview**



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Customer Service Agent to manage customer interactions and support daily operations for our Shopify-based clothing store. The ideal candidate will have prior experience in e-commerce customer support, strong written English skills, and the ability to coordinate effectively with suppliers.



---



### **Key Responsibilities**



* Respond promptly and professionally to customer inquiries via

* Handle customer questions related to orders, shipping, returns, and product details

* Communicate daily with suppliers to:



  * Follow up on order processing and fulfillment

  * Track shipments and resolve delivery issues

---

---

* Supportive and collaborative team structure



---



If you meet the above criteria and are ready to contribute to a growing online clothing business, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Inbound Sales & Lead Coordinator (US Cleaning Company | Phone + Follow-Up | Full-Time)
description:
We are a growing residential cleaning company in the United States looking for a high-performing Lead Coordinator to handle inbound inquiries, follow up with potential clients, and help convert leads into recurring customers.



This is a sales-focused role. Your primary responsibility is to respond quickly, communicate clearly, and consistently follow up until the customer books service.



You will be speaking directly with U.S.-based customers, so clear, neutral English communication is required.



Key Responsibilities:

-Answer inbound calls from new customer inquiries

-Respond to web leads within 2–5 minutes (text,
, phone)

-Schedule estimates for potential clients

-Perform structured follow-up on all unconverted leads

-Maintain accurate notes in our CRM system

-Use scripts and follow processes to guide conversations



What Success Looks Like (KPIs)

You will be measured on:

-Speed to Lead: Response time under 5 minutes

-Booking Rate: % of inquiries scheduled for estimates

-Follow-Up Completion: 100% of leads followed up consistently

-Conversion Rate: Estimates converted into recurring customers



This is a performance-driven role. High performers will earn more and grow quickly.



Requirements

-Excellent spoken English with neutral or minimal accent

-Confident and natural on phone calls with U.S. customers

-Sales mindset (comfortable guiding customers to a decision)

-Strong follow-up discipline (you do not “drop” leads)

-Reliable internet and quiet work environment

-Ability to work U.S. business hours (CST)



Compensation

-$3–$6/hour (based on experience)



Performance bonuses for:

-Booked estimates

-Converted recurring clients



Why Join Us

-Long-term, stable position

-Clear expectations and structured systems

-Opportunity to grow into senior sales role

-Direct impact on company growth



Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)

To apply, please include:

-A short audio recording (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

-A sample response to this scenario:

---“A customer is interested but says they want to think about it. What would you say?”

-Your internet speed test result



Applications without these will not be reviewed.

title: TikTok Live Sales Closer (Face of SurviveX) – High Commission + Base
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines) 

Work Hours: US Evenings (EST/PST – Morning/Midday PH Time) 

Budget: $400 USD Base + 20% Commission (e.g $18+ per sale of $90+)



Who We Are: 

SurviveX is a US-based survival and first-aid brand. We don't just sell gear; we sell peace of mind. We are looking for a charismatic, high-energy, and persuasive Live Host to be the face of our brand on TikTok. This is not a "VA" job—this is a Sales Closer role for someone who loves the rush of a live audience.



The Opportunity: Base plus Commission

We are a bootstrap startup, which means we win when you win.



Base Retainer: $400 USD/month to cover your dedicated time and setup.

Massive Upside: $18 USD commission for every unit sold during your Lives (Average price: $90).

The Math: Sell just 10 units a week, and you’re making $1,120 USD/month. 

Sell 20 units a week, and you're at $1,840 USD/month—placing you in the top 1% of earners in the PH.



Who You Are:



Master Communicator: Your English is flawless, energetic, and relatable to a US audience.

Natural Closer: You know how to handle "objection handling" in real-time. You don't just read a script; you build a "must-have" vibe.



Tech Savvy: You have a high-quality smartphone (iPhone 13+ preferred) and a stable, high-speed fiber connection.

Resilient: You are comfortable being on camera for 2-3 hours at a time, keeping the energy high even if the room is quiet.

Bonus: You have an interest in survival gear, camping, or first aid (or you’re a fast learner).



Responsibilities:



Host five TikTok Lives per week focused on the US market.

Run "Flash Sales" and engage with US viewers to drive immediate conversions.

Collaborate with our team to refine the "pitch" based on live feedback.

Our team will help you with all backend operations during the sale, all you need to do is bring BIG emergency and sell, sell, sell.



How to Apply:



Do not send a resume yet. Please send a 60-second video introducing yourself..



The Challenge: Pick up any household object (a pen, a mug, a flashlight) and sell it to us as if it were a survival tool. Show us your energy!



#Tiktok #TiktokShop #CustomerSupport #CustomerService #VirtualAssistant #TiktokShopSupport #TiktokShopManager #TiktokShopLive #TiktokLiveHost

title: TikTok Shop & Affiliate Manager (Full-Time Remote, US Hours)
description:
Location: Remote (Must work US Eastern Time hours: 9 AM - 5 PM EST, Monday-Friday)



Compensation: $1,000 - $1,500 per month (based on experience and performance)



Experience Level: Intermediate (1-2 years in affiliate marketing, social media management, or e-commerce preferred)



About Us:

We're a growing e-commerce brand specializing in survival and first-aid products, like our innovative Burn MOD hydrogel dressings. We sell via TikTok Shop and are expanding into Amazon affiliates and website traffic through Refersion. Our affiliate program is thriving with top creators in the prepper, wellness, and outdoor niches. We're looking for a proactive manager to scale this—someone who can spot talent, build relationships, and drive GMV through creative campaigns and competitions.



What You'll Do:

As our TikTok Shop & Affiliate Manager, you'll own the end-to-end affiliate ecosystem. This starts with a 3-month onboarding phase where you'll shadow me closely, learning our processes, tools, and strategies. After that, you'll run the program independently with my ongoing guidance. Key responsibilities include:



Vetting & Onboarding Affiliates: 

Review applications for free product samples on TikTok Shop. Assess audience fit, content quality, and performance history to approve the best creators.



Communications Management: 

Handle outreach and updates via Euka (our
 tool). Set up global messages, segment lists (e.g., by niche or performance tier), and nurture relationships to keep affiliates engaged.



Negotiations & Retainers: 

Identify high-potential creators and negotiate monthly retainers ($300-$1,500) in exchange for 8-12 videos per month, plus commissions on sales. Draft offers, track deliverables, and optimize for ROI.



Community & Competitions: 

Manage our 
 server for 50+ affiliates. Run monthly contests rewarding top video posters and GMV generators with prizes. Use tools like Refunnel to track submissions, attribute sales, and create leaderboards.



Expansion Support: 

Help transition affiliates to Amazon attribution and Refersion for website traffic, ensuring seamless multi-channel growth.



Performance Tracking: 

Monitor GMV, engagement, and ROI using TikTok analytics, Google Sheets, and affiliate dashboards. Report weekly insights to optimize campaigns.



You'll report directly to me (the founder) and collaborate with our small remote team. Expect a dynamic role with room to innovate—great ideas get rewarded!

What We're Looking For



Skills & Experience:



*Proven track record in affiliate marketing, influencer management, or social e-commerce (TikTok Shop experience a huge plus).

*Comfortable with tools like Euka 
 automation), 
 (community mod), Refunnel (UGC tracking), Canva (content briefs), and Google Sheets (reporting).

*Strong negotiation skills for retainers and partnerships; bonus if you've managed paid creator programs.

*Excellent English communication—written and verbal—for
s, DMs, and 
 interactions.

*Analytical mindset: Comfortable with metrics like GMV, engagement rates, and ROI.





*Personal Traits: Organized, proactive, and creative. You're a people person who thrives in fast-paced remote work and loves spotting viral potential in creator content.



Requirements:



Full-time availability during US EST hours (flexible within that window).

Reliable high-speed internet and quiet workspace.

Based in the Philippines (preferred for time zone alignment and platform familiarity).

Available to start immediately after a quick paid test task.





How to Apply

If this sounds like your next challenge, apply now! Tell us in your cover letter: "What's one affiliate campaign you've run that drove real sales, and why?" 



We're excited to build something big together.

title: Server Infrastructure Expert

Design, build, and optimise CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Bitbucket, Jenkins, etc.)



Automate deployments and infrastructure provisioning



Implement security, monitoring, logging, and cost-optimisation best practices



Support containerised and microservices environments (Docker)

Proven experience using AWS CDK in production environments



Deep understanding of CI/CD principles and tooling



Experience with Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools



Solid Linux, networking, and cloud security knowledge



Experience with container orchestration (Kubernetes preferred)



Strong problem-solving, documentation, and communication skills



Ability to work independently and advise on best-practice architecture



Nice to Have



AWS and/or GCP certifications



Multi-cloud or hybrid-cloud experience



DevSecOps, security, or compliance experience



Experience with serverless architectures (Lambda, Cloud Functions)



What We Offer

Flexible working arrangements

 Important

 Pay & Structure

title: Order Manager–High-Performance-Remote (Work-from-Home)-100,000PHP- 200,000PHP/month /w Experience-Plus Commission
description:
Top 20% mindset required. This role is designed for individuals who consistently outperform, take ownership, and drive results without supervision.



Company: Travel Visa Pro

Location: Remote (Work-from-Home)

Type: Independent Contractor.



The Opportunity



Travel Visa Pro is a leading U.S. passport and travel visa expediting company. We are building a high-performance team within our National Executive Service Team (NEST) and are seeking individuals who thrive in structured, process-driven environments and take pride in delivering exceptional client outcomes.



This is not a typical customer service role. Top performers in this position operate with urgency, precision, and accountability—owning the client experience from start to finish.



What Top Performers Achieve (Outcomes That Matter)



Within your first 90 days, you will:



Independently manage a full pipeline of visa and passport orders

Guide clients through complex processes with clarity and confidence

Identify and resolve issues before they delay timelines

Maintain high completion rates and client satisfaction scores

Consistently meet or exceed deadlines and performance metrics

The Role



You will own the full lifecycle of client orders—from activation to completion. This includes:



Initiating and “activating” client orders with clear expectations and timelines

Providing precise instructions on required documents and information

Reviewing submissions for accuracy and completeness

Proactively following up to prevent delays

Coordinating with internal teams for form preparation

Identifying and correcting errors before submission

Managing appointments and submission logistics

Tracking progress and keeping clients informed

Closing out orders and generating referrals/reviews



Who Thrives Here (Top 20% Traits)



This role is best suited for individuals who:

Take full ownership of their work and outcomes

Are highly proactive—solving problems before they escalate

Excel in structured, process-driven environments

Communicate clearly, confidently, and professionally

Are detail-oriented and deadline-focused

Can manage multiple priorities without losing accuracy

Are comfortable guiding clients and controlling conversations

Have a track record of performance (not just participation)

Preferred Backgrounds



Strong candidates often come from:



Project Management

Operations or Order Management

IT or Systems Management

Training or Process Development

Sales Management or Client Success



Requirements:

Fluent in American English (written and verbal)

Proven management or leadership experience

Strong problem-solving and decision-making ability

Comfortable using phone, chat,
, and video communication

Ability to work flexible hours (including nights/weekends)

Bachelor’s degree preferred

Must pass background check



Compensation & Growth (Performance-Based)

90-Day Progression: High performers can scale up to 200,000 PHP/month + commission

Top performers earn significant additional monthly commission

Clear advancement path: Trainee ? Customer Service ? Order Manager

Pay increases tied directly to performance, not tenure



What You Get

100% remote work environment

Structured training with clear advancement milestones

Performance-driven compensation model

Access to tools and equipment (laptop + optional add-ons)

A team culture focused on accountability and results

Important



This role is not a fit for:



Job hoppers

Individuals needing constant supervision

Those who struggle with deadlines or attention to detail.



How to Apply

Submit your resume to be considered.

Only candidates selected for interviews will be contacted.

title: General Manager for Short Term Rentals Business
description:

)

Who You Are:

title: Virtual Assistant - Law Firm Operations
description:
We are a virtual estate planning law firm based in New York City. We help young families protect what they've built. The firm launched in April 2026 and is growing fast.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Monitor our lead inbox and reply to incoming inquiries using pre-written templates. Keep our CRM (Lawmatics) accurate, moving contacts through pipeline stages and applying the right tags. Schedule calls and meetings once the attorney has confirmed interest. Send a Friday numbers report: leads, calls booked, deposits collected, stuck contacts. Schedule and post pre-approved content to Google Business Profile and LinkedIn.



WHAT I NEED FROM YOU

You take initiative. You notice what needs doing and do it without being asked. Strong written English. Client-facing communication must be clear, warm, and professional. Comfortable learning new software quickly. We will train the right person. Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace. Prior legal or professional services experience is a plus, not required.



AVAILABILITY

You must be available during US Eastern business hours, 9:30am to 5:30pm EST, Monday through Friday. We are starting at 20 hours per week with a clear path to full time as the firm grows.



COMPENSATION AND GROWTH

$400/month to start for 20 hours per week. Strong performers will be considered for a full-time role at $1,000/month as the firm grows. This is a real path, not a maybe.



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

Lawmatics, Google Workspace, Canva, Slack, and others. Experience with any of these is a plus. We will train the right person.



TO APPLY

Send three things. Applications missing any of the three will not be considered.

1. Write a paragraph on why I should hire you for this role specifically. Not a list of your experience. Describe it to me.

2. A lead comes in Monday morning while the attorney is on a call. You have a pre-written reply template but something about their situation doesn't quite fit it. What do you do?

3. What would you do in your first week to make yourself useful without being asked?



Qualified applicants will be invited to a short Zoom interview before any offer is made.

title: Construction Project Coordinator
description:
Project Coordinator – Construction (Electrical)



Company: RRE Inc. Electrical Contractor

Department: Project Management

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time, Non-Exempt

Reports To: Project Manager (Senior PM / GM as needed)



Who We Are – Team RRE

We are team players that prioritize open communication while exercising emotional control, that do the right thing while being dedicated to winning, we are not perfect we learn from our mistakes in the process of being great

-We exercise emotional control

-We do the right thing

-We are dedicated to winning





Before You Apply 

We’re building a long-term team (10+ years). We’re looking for self-driven individuals with high standards and high goals.

If you’re not aligned with that level of accountability, ownership, and effort—THIS ROLE WON'T BE A FIT!!!



Position Overview

Track:

Why RRE Inc.?

How to Apply

Send your resume

Subject Line: Project Coordinator Application – Team Player – [Your Name]

title: Events Coordinator - Hockey Brand
description:
About Us 

Titan BattleGear is an American hockey protective equipment brand making the most protective base layers / neck guards on the ice. We outfit players from youth leagues all the way to the NHL level, and we're growing fast. We attend and sponsor hockey industry events across North America and need a sharp, organized, trustworthy person to help us manage the details behind the scenes.



The Role 

We're looking for a part-time remote Events Coordinator on a contract basis through the end of summer 2026, with strong potential to continue if things go well. You'll work approximately 5–10 hours per week, with some weeks lighter and others busier as events approach. This is a great fit for someone who is organized, self-directed, and wants to grow with a brand long-term.



What You'll Do

- Build and manage event task lists, timelines, and checklists in Asana

- Research event details, exhibitor requirements, and logistics

- Coordinate shipping of booth materials, product samples, and branded items

- Manage vendor orders – print, swag, signage, apparel – and track deadlines

- Handle expense tracking and manage purchases on a company card responsibly

- Maintain a master events calendar and keep the team updated on deadlines

- Compile attendee and contact lists for pre- and post-event outreach

- Coordinate hotel, flight, and ground transportation bookings for the team

- Assist with special event projects (custom printed materials, gift coordination, surprise-and-delight activations)



What We're Looking For

- Proven experience coordinating events – trade shows, conferences, or sponsorships (please share examples in your application)

- Excellent written and spoken English – you will communicate directly with our team and vendors regularly

- Extremely organized, detail-oriented, and deadline-driven

- Trustworthy and reliable – this role involves managing orders and expenses on a company card

- Proactive – you catch things before they become problems

- Genuinely interested in American hockey and willing to learn the industry quickly

- Availability during US business hours for communication and check-ins

- Experience with Asana, Google Sheets, and Gmail preferred



What We Offer

- Part-time, fully remote contract role (~5-20 hours/week, depending on when the events are)

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Real potential to transition into an ongoing role as we grow our events program

- A front-row seat to the hockey industry – including NHL-level events and conferences



How to Apply 

Please apply with:

1. Your resume

2. A short description of past events you coordinated – what they were, what you managed, and what the outcomes were

3. A voice or video recording introducing yourself (Loom is fine) so we can hear your English fluency firsthand

4. Your expected hourly rate in USD

title: B2B Sales Development Rep (SDR)
description:
About This Role:

We are a North American agency that builds custom AI automation for service businesses. We answer every call, book every appointment, and handle follow-ups — 24/7. Our clients are med spas, HVAC companies, plumbers, roofers, and other service businesses across the US and Canada.

We are hiring outbound Sales Development Representatives (SDRs) to cold call business owners in the United States, qualify them, and book discovery calls for our founder to close. This is a high-activity outbound role — you will be dialing, talking to decision makers, and booking appointments every day.

This is not a customer service role. This is not lead research. This is cold calling. If you are great on the phone and can handle rejection while staying professional and persistent, read on.



What You Will Do

• Make 80–100 outbound cold calls per day to US business owners using a provided lead list

• Introduce our agency, qualify the prospect, and book a 20-minute discovery call with our founder

• Overcome objections professionally and follow a provided call script

• Log every call outcome accurately in a shared Google Sheet

• Attend a short daily check-in and flag blockers or questions

• Improve your pitch based on feedback from recorded call reviews



What You Will NOT Do

• You will NOT close deals yourself — your only job is to book a qualified call

• You will NOT research leads — we provide the contact list

• You will NOT do any admin, customer support, or account management



Compensation Structure

We offer a low base salary plus performance bonuses. The more you book and help close, the more you earn. Top performers will consistently earn above market rate.



Base Salary

• $300–$400 USD per month (based on experience and voice recording assessment)



Performance Bonuses

• $10 USD per qualified discovery call that shows up (prospect attends the call)

• $20 USD for every deal that closes — paid when setup fee is collected

• $30 USD bonus if YOU personally close the deal on your own call (for exceptional SDRs who develop into closers)



Example monthly earnings at solid performance:

• 20 showed calls = $200 in booking bonuses

• 6 closed deals = $120 in close bonuses

• Base = $350

• Total = approximately $670 USD for the month



Example monthly earnings at strong performance:

• 40 showed calls = $400 in booking bonuses

• 12 closed deals = $240 in close bonuses

• Base = $400

• Total = approximately $1,040 USD for the month



Example monthly earnings at top performance:

• 60 showed calls = $600 in booking bonuses

• 18 closed deals = $360 in close bonuses

• Base = $400

• Total = approximately $1,360 USD for the month



Payments are made bi-weekly via Wise or similar. Base is guaranteed. Bonuses are paid when conditions are met (showed call, collected payment).



Requirements

• Strong spoken English with a clear, professional accent — accent does not need to be American but must be easily understood by US business owners

• Previous outbound cold calling experience, ideally B2B

• Comfortable with rejection and able to make 80+ calls per day without losing energy

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet work environment

• Available during US business hours (Eastern or Central time preferred)

• Honest and accurate in logging call outcomes — we verify using call recordings

• Able to follow a script while still sounding natural and human



Nice to Have

• Experience selling SaaS, software, or technology services

• Experience calling service businesses (healthcare, trades, hospitality)

• Familiarity with AI tools or automation products

• Prior experience using Apollo.io, JustCall, or similar outbound tools



Tools We Provide

• Curated lead list with verified US business owner contact details (via Apollo.io)

• JustCall account with a US phone number — all calls made and recorded through this system

• Call script, objection handling guide, and product training

• Google Sheet for daily call logging

• Access to recorded demo videos to understand the product



How to Apply

To be considered, your application MUST include all three of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed.



1. A short note (3–5 sentences) explaining your outbound cold calling experience

Tell us specifically what you sold, who you called, and roughly how many calls per day you made.



2. Your best month's earnings from a previous commission or bonus role

This tells us you are motivated by performance pay, not just a paycheck.



3. A voice recording of yourself reading the following paragraph out loud

Record yourself reading this text exactly as written. Upload the file or share a link (Google Drive, Dropbox, or any audio file). This is how we assess your spoken English and phone presence.



VOICE RECORDING SCRIPT — read this out loud, exactly as written:

"Hi, this is [your name] calling for Jessica. I'm reaching out from RS — we help med spas and home service businesses like yours make sure every call gets answered, even when your team is busy with clients or on a job. I know you're probably in the middle of your day, so I'll keep this quick. Would you have about 20 minutes this week to see how it works? A lot of owners we speak to say they had no idea how many calls they were losing until they actually looked at the numbers."



Applications that do not include a voice recording will not be considered, regardless of experience.



A Note from the Founder

We are a lean, fast-moving agency. We do not have layers of management or long onboarding programs. You will work directly with me, get real feedback, and see the direct impact of your work. If you close a deal, I will know your name.

I am looking for someone who is hungry, honest, and wants to grow with the company. If you hit the numbers, the compensation grows with you. We are not capping you. The more you produce, the more you earn — and when we scale, the top performers will have first access to better roles, higher bonuses, and more hours.

If that sounds like the kind of environment where you do your best work, I want to hear from you.



- Matt -

title: Real Estate Wholesale Manager
description:
Real Estate Wholesale Manager



Real Estate Transaction Coordinator Virtual Assistant with expertise in Transactions, Compliance, closing processes, administrative support

Responsibilities Ideal Candidate:

Experience closing off market real estate deals, wholesaling, or strong phone sales background

Fluent English 

Strong negotiation skills

Positive attitude, confident energy

Comfortable working independently and remotely

Call  seller leads and buyer leads

Build rapport, confirm motivation, property condition,  asking price and urgency timeline for selling

Negotiate purchase prices and lock up contracts

Update CRM (Google Sheets) daily

Attend quick  check-ins on WhatsApp or zoom as needed

Follow-up with leads as needed

-Appointment Setting

- Call Handling

- Skip Tracing

-
 Management

- Calendar Management

Wholesale Manager to handle cold calling  leads , scheduling appointments, negotiating offers with sellers AND buyers, comping properties,  manage transactions from start to closing.  Start to closing means cold or warm calling leads,  qualifying them, negotiating correctly, delivering signed contracts from bothe sellers and buyers.  That means don't say you can cold call on your profile and not be able to get on the phone and communicate with sellers and buyers.  That means don't say on your profile that you can analyze a property accurately to make an irresistible offer to both buyers and sellers that they cannot decline the offer if you cannot or don't have confidence in your abilities or if you think you will have trouble working independently.   We encourage questions when you don't understand something but we need people who are experienced and require less attention from us to complete the job.

Must calculate ARV (after repair value) ,  MAO ( Maximum Allowable Offer)  accurately enough to present to sellers and buyers to make the deal attractive to buyers and sellers.

Only deal with buyers and sellers who want to close fast  (within 30 days)

Only deal with properties in markets that have a large enough spread to accommodate a seller who is happy and committed to the offer price you make them,  an ARV and MAO calculation that has a large enough wholesale fee and enough profit for a buyer to be happy with the deal.

We need great deals BUT they NEED TO BE ACCURATE deals.  

Acquisition and disposition Manager to  negotiate and closing deals between buyers and sellers.

You will supply your own tools and leads from sources you feel comfortable using.

Propstream, Propwire, XLeads, Batchleads, etc.,.  where ever.

You will contact sellers and buyers from markets that are easiest for you to close with best margins. We can discuss this.  If you have experience in this I won't need to elaborate on specific markets.



1 deal = 1 signed seller contract combined with 1 signed buyer contract who is committed to that property. Along with the seller and buyer contracts you will also submit a report of all sold properties, property details, photos (where applicable), comparable properties and all documents associated with each property. 

After you are done with the contracts they will be sent to the title company who takes over the process.

The more successful deals you can bring to the organization the more valuable you will be.  Can you deliver 3-5 deals per month ? 5-10 deals per month ?   More ? Let's discuss.  You don't  have to appear on camera on the zoom or WhatsApp but you do need to speak clear and concise English and communicate effectively with us and the buyers and sellers  you'll be dealing with. 

You need to be goal oriented and to make certain commitments to submit enough deals monthly to consistently improve.

$3-$10/ HR depending on productivity requirements and experience   480-1600/mo range

8 hr/day M-F FT

Please be experienced and do not rely on our limited training.

All contacted applicants will be notified for an introductory zoom call or WhatsApp to communicate with each other and confirm understanding of each other's responsibilities before beginning any work.  You will be required to sign off on a terms and conditions agreement that we both need to agree to and submit to escrow company to protect us both.  This ensures that you get paid for your work and we get our documentation and payments.

You will be paid through escrow service to start.    This will not cost you anything but they will need your banking information to send payment directly to you.

The payment does not get released to you, the worker, until the title company signs off on a clear title from the seller's property and the buyer is moving forward with the purchase for all deals that you commit to or each deal you successfully complete.  Whatever we agree to. 

This process usually takes less than 7 days for each deal.

Any applicants who ask for payment up front before any work is done to pay for any tools or anything they need to begin working will be automatically disqualified.

These are the terms for the responsibilities.  We encourage all qualified applicants to apply but Please do not apply if you disagree with any of these terms.

title: Full-Time Creative Content & Growth Operator
description:
Full-Time Creative Content & Growth Operator  

(Post Daily • Build a Brand • Help Scale a Real Business)

title: Automation Developer (n8n / Zapier + AI Integration) for Airbnb and Cleaning Business
description:
I am looking for someone who can build automation systems and connect tools for a growing short-term rental and cleaning company. This is not a basic VA role. You will be building real workflows that reduce manual work and improve efficiency.



Your role will involve creating automations using n8n or Zapier, connecting tools like ToDoist, Google Sheets, RingCentral, and messaging platforms, and using AI (OpenAI/ChatGPT) to generate follow-ups, summaries, and structured tasks. You will help build systems for lead tracking, follow-ups, cleaning coordination, and daily business reporting.



You must have experience with n8n or Zapier and understand how triggers, actions, delays, and conditions work. You should be comfortable connecting different tools using APIs or webhooks and have some experience using AI in workflows. If you only have experience prompting ChatGPT but have not built real automations, this role is not a good fit.



To apply, please answer the following in your application. First, explain how you would automate a missed call into a logged lead, a follow-up message, and a task in a system. Second, share an example of a workflow you have built and explain how it works. Third, list the tools you have used for automation.



This is a part-time role to start, around 10 to 15 hours per week, with pay between 6 to 10 dollars per hour depending on experience. There is strong potential to grow into a long-term role if you can execute well.



I am looking for someone who can build and implement, not just suggest ideas. If you are strong in systems, automation, and practical AI use, this is a great opportunity.

title: IoT Developer - Raspberry Pi + ESP32 Door Access System (Python/MQTT)
description:
## Project Overview



I need help finishing an IoT door access system for gyms/facilities. The system uses a Raspberry Pi as a local controller and ESP32 boards at each door. Members unlock doors by tapping their phone (BLE) or scanning a QR code.



Most of the infrastructure is already built — I need someone to wire up the remaining logic and get it to production-ready. This is a short-term gig, not ongoing maintenance. I'm looking to have this wrapped up within 8-10 days.



**Full technical spec:** 



I have two existing repos (Python for the Pi side, Arduino/C++ for the ESP32 side) that I'll share once we agree on scope. The spec above has everything you need to evaluate the work.



## What's Already Done



- ESP32 firmware (BLE input, MQTT client, relay control, OTA updates, WiFi captive portal) — working

- Pi: MQTT broker (Mosquitto), admin web panel (Flask), device management UI, captive portal — working

- Pi: MQTT listener daemon that receives ESP32 messages and stores device state in SQLite — partially done

- Cloud API endpoints for membership/access data (Laravel) — live in production



## What Needs To Be Done



**Core (must-have, P0):**

- Connect the access flow end-to-end: Pi receives access request from ESP32 via MQTT, checks membership against cloud API, sends unlock command back (or fires a relay HAT on the Pi directly)

- Local access caching (SQLite) so doors still work when internet is down

- Door hours enforcement (deny access outside configured open/close times)

- Pi-side GPIO code to pulse a 4-channel relay HAT when the relay is on the Pi rather than the ESP32



**Secondary (P1, would like included):**

- Access log page in admin panel (who scanned, which door, granted/denied, timestamp)

- Manual unlock button in admin panel (buzz a door open remotely)

- Sync status indicator (when was access data last refreshed from cloud)



**Optional (P2+, if time allows or as follow-up):**

- QR scanner support on ESP32 (UART serial read, C++)

- OTA firmware management from admin panel



## Skills Needed



- Python 3 (Flask, paho-mqtt, SQLite)

- Raspberry Pi GPIO (RPi.GPIO or gpiozero) for relay HAT control

- Understanding of MQTT pub/sub patterns

- Comfortable reading existing code and working within an established architecture

- Bonus: Arduino/C++ for ESP32 firmware (for QR scanner piece)

- Bonus: experience with IoT systems, access control, or similar hardware projects



## Timeline & Budget



- **Timeline:** 8-10 days to complete P0 + P1 items

- **Type:** Fixed-price gig (not hourly, let's agree on a price for the scope)

- **Communication:** Async is fine, but I'd like daily check-ins or progress updates

- **Repos:** Will be shared via GitHub once we kick off



## Working Setup



- Pi runs Raspberry Pi OS (Bullseye+), services managed via systemd

- ESP32 firmware is Arduino-based (PlatformIO or Arduino IDE)

- Python dependencies: Flask, paho-mqtt, gpiozero/RPi.GPIO

- I have hardware (Pi + ESP32 + relay HAT) for testing on my end

- Remote work — you won't need physical hardware access, I can test on my units and share results



## To Apply



Please review the full spec linked above and include in your proposal:

1. Your relevant experience (Pi, MQTT, IoT, Python)

2. Estimated timeline for P0 items specifically

3. Your fixed price for P0+P1 scope

4. Any questions or suggestions (especially on the relay HAT — open to alternatives)

title: Adobe Video Editor
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a highly skilled and creative Video Editor to join our team, The Visible Method. If you live and breathe video editing and have a keen eye for what makes content go viral on social media, we want you! You will be responsible for editing high-quality, engaging videos specifically tailored for Instagram Reels and YouTube.



We need someone who specializes exclusively in Adobe Premiere Pro (and After Effects) or Final Cut Pro. We are looking for that specific, high-end editing style right now!



Key Responsibilities



•Edit long-form YouTube videos that retain viewer attention, utilizing excellent pacing, storytelling, B-roll, sound design, and color grading.

•Repurpose long-form content or edit raw footage into highly engaging, fast-paced Instagram Reels (incorporating trendy transitions, captions, and effects).

•Collaborate closely with our team to understand the vision and goals for each piece of content.

•Ensure all videos are optimized for their respective platforms (aspect ratios, safe zones, export settings).

•Manage multiple projects and deliver final videos within agreed deadlines.



Requirements



•Software Expertise: Must be highly proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro (After Effects is a huge plus) OR Final Cut Pro.

•Portfolio: A strong portfolio showcasing your previous work on YouTube and Instagram Reels. (Applications without a portfolio will not be considered).

•Style: Ability to edit in modern, high-retention styles (e.g., dynamic captions, zoom-ins, sound effects, motion graphics).

•Attention to Detail: Excellent sense of pacing, audio mixing, color correction, grammar! We want to have less back and forth as possible 

•Reliability: Strong communication skills, reliable internet connection, and the ability to meet deadlines consistently.

•Experience: Proven experience editing for content creators, brands, or digital marketing agencies.



Why Join Us?



•Consistent and ongoing work.

•Opportunity to work on exciting content that reaches a wide audience.

•Flexible working hours (as long as deadlines are met).

•A lot of Room for growth as our channels expand & we bring on clients! 



How to Apply



To apply, please reply with the following:

1.A brief introduction about yourself and your experience.

2.Specify which software you specialize in (Adobe or Final Cut Pro).

3.Links to your portfolio or specific examples of YouTube videos and Instagram Reels you have edited.

4.Your expected hourly or monthly rate.

5.Start your application with the word "CREATIVE" so we know you read the entire job description.



We are ready to hire immediately for the right candidate. We look forward to seeing your work!

title: Senior Medical Virtual Assistant
description:
Auxo Health

Senior Medical Virtual Assistant

---

Role Summary

The Senior Medical Virtual Assistant (VA) provides high-level remote support to physicians across clinical, administrative, and coordination workflows. This role requires strong medical knowledge, operational ownership, and the ability to function independently in fast-paced, high-responsibility environments. The VA acts as an extension of the physician, ensuring efficiency, organization, and continuity of care.

---

Core Responsibilities

I. Clinical & Administrative Support

- Assist with clinical documentation and EMR/EHR workflows

- Prepare and organize information for patient care and follow-ups

- Support coordination across inpatient, outpatient, and procedural settings



II. Care Coordination

- Track referrals, imaging, procedures, and follow-ups

- Ensure no gaps in patient care or communication

- Coordinate with patients, clinics, hospitals, and care teams



III. Inbox & Calendar Management

- Manage physician's inbox to reduce overload

- Coordinate scheduling and prevent conflicts

- Protect physician time and workflow efficiency



IV. Patient Communication

- Communicate clearly and professionally with patients

- Provide instructions, reminders, and follow-ups

- Maintain empathy while staying within non-clinical boundaries



V. Operational Support

- Identify inefficiencies and improve workflows

- Adapt to changing schedules and physician needs

- Support additional initiatives when required (e.g., leadership, education, projects)

---

Required Qualifications

- Nursing graduate (required)

- Familiarity with U.S. healthcare systems and workflows

- Experience in healthcare coordination or clinical environments

- EMR/EHR experience preferred

- Strong written and verbal English communication skills

---

Core Competencies

I. Work Ethic & Ownership

- Highly reliable and accountable

- Able to manage time-sensitive tasks consistently

- Operates independently with minimal supervision



II. Clinical Awareness

- Understands patient care workflows and medical terminology

- Able to anticipate risks and gaps in coordination



III. Communication & Emotional Intelligence

- Clear, professional, and empathetic communication

- Maintains composure under pressure



IV. Organization & Prioritization

- Strong systems thinking

- Able to manage competing priorities effectively

- Detail-oriented with high follow-through

---

Ideal Candidate Traits

- Proactive and anticipatory

- Calm, steady, and emotionally resilient

- Respectful of traditional medical environments and hierarchy

- Patient-centered but not emotionally overextended

- Comfortable working with high-performing, busy physicians

---

Work Setup

- Full-time, dedicated to one physician

- Remote (PH or SA preferred)

- Flexible schedule aligned with physician workflow (may include early mornings or ICU support)

---

Positioning

This is a high-trust, high-responsibility role, designed for candidates who want to build long-term careers supporting physicians in specialized medical environments—not general VA work.

---

How to Apply:



Please send the following to 
 with the subject line:

“Senior Medical VA – [Your Full Name]”



Include:

1. Updated resume (PDF format)

2. A short introduction



Note: We prefer applications via
/form due to our structured screening process.
