title: 24 hr interview invite if selected for VA Receptionist | Fast Hire | Read Before Applying
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them in your reply, and answer each one thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?

(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: E-commerce Accountant & Systems Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
PLEASE READ CAREFULLY. 

You need to be available 8am - 5pm US Central Time Mon - Fri

You will be working full time with us and managing day to day accounting related task.

Please send your CV.



Role Overview:



We are seeking a detail-oriented, technically proficient Accountant to

manage the financial operations of our high-volume USA-based e-commerce (95%) and

wholesale (5%) business. This is a full-time remote position where you will be

responsible for ensuring the integrity of our financial data across multiple platforms,

specifically Sellercloud and QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise. (If you are unfamiliar

with Sellercloud, we will provide training. It is an Order management website we

use for our business.)



Key Responsibilities:



-System Synchronization: Manage the daily data export from Sellercloud to

QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise via Quickbridge. Proactively identify and

resolve sync errors, mapping issues, and SKU discrepancies.



-Payout Reconciliation: Perform complex reconciliations of settlements from

various payment gateways (Amazon, eBay, etc.). Ensure that gross sales,

platform fees, and net deposits are accurately recorded.



-Inventory Audit: Regularly audit and reconcile QuickBooks Enterprise data

against Sellercloud records to ensure a single "source of truth" for inventory and

financial health.



-Wholesale Management: Oversee the 5% wholesale portion of the business,

including invoicing, billing, and managing accounts receivable (AR).



-Cash Flow & Daily Operations: Maintain accurate records of daily payables

and receivables. Monitor cash flow and provide regular reporting to management.



-Data Integrity: Ensure that all financial records are audit-ready and reflect the

true operational status of the business.



Technical Requirements:



-Expert-level proficiency in QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise.

-Direct experience with ERP software like Netsuite, SellerCloud, Linnworks,

Skubana, Zoho etc.

-Strong understanding of e-commerce payment reconciliation workflows.

-Ability to work via remote desktop access to a local PC.

-Advanced Excel skills for data analysis and troubleshooting.



Required Experience:



-3+ years of professional accounting experience, with a heavy focus on

Inventory-based businesses.



-Deep Technical Knowledge of QuickBooks Desktop Enterprise (must

understand Advanced Inventory and Bank Feeds).



-E-commerce Specialist: Proven track record reconciling high-volume

settlements from Amazon, eBay, and Walmart.



-Systems Proficiency: Experience managing data flows between an ERP (like

Sellercloud) and accounting software.



-Cash Flow Management: Ability to produce weekly cash flow forecasts, not just

monthly balance sheets.

title: Figma E-Mail Designer (Project-Based, Long-Term Retainer Potential)
description:
About Us

Hi, I'm Toni from Germany. I run a small marketing agency called run.more.mails. We design and build E-Mail marketing for online stores in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. We use Klaviyo to send the E-Mails.

I'm looking for a long-term partner — someone reliable who can design E-Mails for me whenever I need them. This starts as project-based work, but my goal is to find someone I can put on a monthly retainer within 2-3 months. I'm not looking for one-off freelancers. I'm looking for someone who wants to grow with my agency.



What You Will Do

For every project, I will give you:



Finished E-Mail text (in German — you don't need to understand it, just place it correctly)

Brand guidelines (logo, colors, fonts of the client)

Example E-Mails that show the style we want

Clear instructions for each design



You will create:



One E-Mail design in Figma per project

Mobile-friendly layout (most people read E-Mails on phones)

Clean, organized Figma file with proper layers and components

Ready-to-use assets (correct image sizes, fonts, etc.)





What This Job Is NOT



This is not full-time work at the start. Projects come as I get them.

You don't need to write any text. The text is always finished.

You don't need to know German. All communication with me is in English.

You don't need to upload to Klaviyo. I do that myself.





How We Work: Project-by-Project With Iterations

Each E-Mail is one project. Here is the workflow:



I send you a brief with the text, brand guidelines, and reference materials

You create the first design based on the brief

I review and give feedback — there can be multiple rounds of changes

You improve the design until it matches what I want

When the design is approved, payment is released



Important: I value quality. Sometimes we need several rounds of changes before the design is perfect. That is normal. I plan for it. As long as we stay within the original brief (same brand, same content, same purpose), all iterations are included in the project price. You don't need to charge me extra for revisions.

If the brief changes a lot during the project (different brand, different content), I will treat it as a new project.



Compensation

$20 - $30 USD per finished E-Mail design



$20 = simple E-Mail (one product, simple layout)

$25 = standard E-Mail (multiple products or more complex)

$30 = complex E-Mail (long, multiple sections, special design elements)



All iterations are included in this price. You don't need to charge me more for revisions, as long as we stay within the original brief.

Payment after each completed and approved project, via your preferred method (PayPal, Wise, etc.).



Long-Term Plan: Retainer

If we work well together for 2-3 months, I want to move you to a monthly retainer:



Fixed monthly payment for a guaranteed number of E-Mails

Steady, predictable income for you

Priority access to my projects

Long-term partnership



This is the goal. The project-based phase at the beginning is for us to get to know each other and see if we work well together.



Working Hours / Volume



Schedule: You set your own hours. No fixed schedule.

Volume at start: Expect 5-15 E-Mail designs per month

Volume potential: Could grow to 20-30 per month as my agency grows

Response time: I expect a response within 24 hours when I send a project. The actual design time can be 1-3 days, depending on the project.





Required Skills

You must have:



Strong Figma skills — auto-layout, components, variants, organized files

E-Mail design experience — at least 5 E-Mail designs in your portfolio

Good English — clear written English for our communication

Reliable internet and computer — you can deliver files via Figma share links

Reliability — I value people who keep their word and meet deadlines

Patience for iterations — sometimes designs need multiple rounds of changes. If that frustrates you, this is not the right job.





Nice to Have



Klaviyo template experience

Experience designing for European/German brands

Knowledge of E-Commerce brands (Shopify shops especially)

Adobe Photoshop or similar for image preparation





How to Apply

Please send me a message with:



Your portfolio link (Behance, Dribbble, your own site, or shared Figma files)

3 examples of E-Mail designs you have made

Your typical turnaround time for one E-Mail (in days)

The word "BANANA" somewhere in your message — this is just to show me you read the full job posting



I read every application personally. I will respond within 48 hours.



Hiring Process

Step 1: Application review (1-2 days)

Step 2: Paid trial project — I will give you one real E-Mail design to do, with full payment ($20-30) regardless of whether we continue working together. Iterations are included even in the trial. This way you don't waste time, and I see real work.

Step 3: If the trial goes well, we start working together on regular projects.

Step 4: After 2-3 months of good collaboration, we move to a monthly retainer.

I am NOT looking for someone with the lowest price. I am looking for someone with quality, reliability, and patience. If you give your best work, I will give you regular projects — and eventually a steady monthly income.



Contact

Toni Küster

Founder, run.more.mails



I look forward to working with you.

— Toni

Following up with warm leads and inbound inquiries via phone, email and live chat

Managing and updating our CRM — logging calls, tracking lead stages, and ensuring no opportunity falls through the cracks

Nurturing prospects who didn't buy on first contact through consistent, professional follow-up

Highly organized, self-motivated, and reliable — you follow up without being told twice

Ability to quickly learn product knowledge (we'll train you on our equipment lineup)

Stable internet connection and a quiet, professional environment for calls



Nice to Have:



Experience working with e-commerce or dropshipping stores

Familiarity with Shopify

Background in B2B sales or selling to small business owners

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Hi, my name is Cameron. I’m a real estate agent based in Florida, and I run a fast-paced, growing business. I’m looking to hire a part time Real Estate Virtual Assistant who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable. This is a long-term role with room to grow.



Introduction Video -  



You’ll be helping manage the backend of my business so I can stay focused on clients and growth. If you’re someone who takes initiative, thrives with structure, and enjoys supporting a team behind the scenes, this could be a great fit for you.



Communication Expectations

I value open and efficient communication. You can reach me via
, text, call, or WhatsApp, whichever is most convenient. I would like to receive a weekly
 update every Monday to review the previous week’s accomplishments and activities. Additionally, we will meet for 15-20 minutes every Monday to review your prior weeks performance, answer any questions and discuss upcoming tasks and priorities.



Working Hours

It is important that work is conducted during business hours (9AM - 5PM Eastern Time M-F) to ensure alignment with client and business needs.



Our Values and Mission

Integrity, honesty, professionalism, problem-solving, knowledge, and a commitment to excellence are the values that drive this business. Our mission is to provide exceptional real estate services that address the unique needs and concerns of each client, ensuring smooth and successful transactions through professionalism, responsiveness, and strong advocacy.



At the same time, we believe in taking care of each other as much as we care for our clients. This business represents three years of dedication, hard work, and passion, and your role will be instrumental in helping us continue to deliver exceptional service and grow to new heights.





Core Responsibilities

This role includes, but is not limited to:



Data Entry 



Sending weekly seller updates and collecting showing feedback

 

Scheduling and coordinating open houses



Marketing & Content Support



Managing Instagram,
, and YouTube uploads

Creating Canva flyers using provided templates



Clipping short-form videos from long-form content (training provided)



Ordering marketing materials, closing gifts, and print items



Calendar & Communication Management



Maintaining clean records and tracking communications



Admin & Back-End Support



Paying invoices and organizing receipts



Assisting with QuickBooks (training available if needed)



Organizing digital files and documents (Google Drive, AppFiles)



Supporting automation setup via Zapier and system improvement



Tools You'll Be Using

Follow Up Boss (CRM)



Canva



QuickBooks



Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)



Asana



Slack



Zoom



Loom



Vulcan7, Fello, Constant Contact



ShowingTime



Screenshot Monitor



RPR & Florida MLS systems



What I'm Looking For

Strong written and verbal English communication



1+ year experience as a VA or administrative assistant (real estate is a plus)



Proficiency with tools like Canva, Google Suite, and Slack



Attention-to-detail, Highly organized, reliable, and proactive



Ability to problem-solve independently and meet deadlines



Comfortable working during U.S. business hours



Coachable and committed to long-term growth



Bonus If You Have Experience With

MLS input (especially in Florida markets)



Real estate marketing



Zapier or workflow automation



QuickBooks or expense tracking



How to Apply



If this sounds like a good fit, please complete the application using the link provided. Please specifically mention this is for the Florida Real Estate VA Position. We will only review applicants who follow all instructions and complete the full form. Selected applicants may be asked to complete a short paid trial task and a Zoom interview.







This is a long-term role with growth potential. I’m excited to meet the right person and build a successful working relationship together.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Head of Growth & Marketing Systems Architect (Home Services)



???? ABOUT THE ROLE

We are building a dominant home service brand and are looking for a Head of Growth to lead, align, and scale our entire marketing operation.

This is NOT a content posting role.

This is a leadership + systems role responsible for:

Strategy

Team alignment

Performance tracking

Revenue growth

You will oversee multiple marketing specialists and ensure everything works together to generate booked jobs, not just leads.



???? IMPORTANT REQUIREMENT

You MUST have experience working inside a marketing agency that serves home service businesses (HVAC, plumbing, roofing, etc.).

If you have not worked in this environment, this role is not a fit.



???? YOUR MISSION

Turn our marketing into a cohesive, high-performing system where:

Every channel supports the same strategy

Leads turn into booked jobs

Follow-up systems increase conversions

Performance is tracked and improved consistently



???? RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Strategy & Alignment

Create and lead weekly & monthly marketing strategy

Align all channels (YouTube, social, SEO, GMB, ads)

Ensure all efforts support offers, promotions, and revenue goals

2. Team Leadership

You will manage:

YouTube Specialist


 Group Specialist

Social Media Poster

GMB Specialist

Website SEO Specialist

Your role:

Give direction

Review output

Enforce quality

Keep everything aligned

3. Performance Tracking (Non-Negotiable)

Track and report:

Daily

Leads generated

Calls/messages

Booking rate

Weekly

Cost per lead

Cost per booked job

Channel performance

Monthly

Revenue by source

ROI by channel

Growth opportunities

4. Systems & Automation

Inside GoHighLevel:

Build and optimize follow-up systems (SMS,
)

Improve lead nurturing

Implement review generation systems

Reactivate old leads

5. Growth Architecture

Identify bottlenecks in the funnel

Decide what needs to be built, fixed, or improved

Know when to hire additional specialists

Help scale the marketing team intelligently



???? WHO YOU ARE

You are:

A systems thinker (not task-based)

A leader who can manage other marketers

Comfortable with data and performance tracking

Able to connect ads, content, SEO, and follow-up into one system

Clear and confident in communication



? MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE

Worked in a marketing agency serving home service businesses

Experience with lead generation + conversion systems

Understanding of:

Paid ads (Meta / Google)

Organic content strategy

Local SEO & Google Business Profile

CRM systems and automation

? BONUS

Experience with GoHighLevel

Experience managing remote teams

Strong understanding of U.S. home service market

???? COMPENSATION

Competitive base (based on experience)

Performance bonuses tied to:

Booked jobs

Revenue growth

Cost efficiency



???? REQUIRED TO APPLY

Submit a short video (Loom or similar) answering the questions below.

Applications without a video will NOT be considered.

????  (Answer in Video)

1. Strategy Thinking

If you walked into a home service business that was generating leads but not booking enough jobs, what would you look at first and why?

2. Funnel Understanding

Explain how you would turn:

Traffic ? Leads ? Booked Jobs ? Revenue

Where do most businesses fail?

3. Team Alignment

How would you align multiple specialists (SEO, social media, YouTube, ads) into ONE cohesive strategy?

4. Performance Metrics

What metrics would you track:

Daily

Weekly

Monthly

And why?

5. Agency Experience

Tell us about your experience working at a marketing agency for home service businesses:

What types of clients?

What results did you help achieve?

What problems did you solve?

6. Hiring & Scaling

How do you decide:

When to hire a new specialist?

What role to hire first?

7. First 30 Days

What would your first 30 days look like in this role?



?? FINAL NOTE

We are not looking for someone to “help with marketing.”

We are looking for someone who can:

???? Build

???? Lead

???? Optimize

???? Scale

A complete marketing system.

If you’re a thinker, builder, and operator—we want to hear from you.

title: Account Manager (Part-Time, Remote) – Social Media Marketing Agency
description:
Location: Remote 

Hours: ~18 hours/week to start (with potential to grow)

Schedule: Flexible, but must overlap a few hours with PST (Los Angeles time)



About Us

We’re a Los Angeles-based social media marketing and content agency working with restaurants, food & beverage, and lifestyle brands. We focus on high-quality, engaging content and strategic growth—not just posting for the sake of posting.



We currently manage ~5 retainer clients and are growing.



About the Role

We’re looking for a highly organized, proactive Account Manager to help manage client communication and keep everything running smoothly behind the scenes.



This role is perfect for someone who loves structure, is detail-oriented, and enjoys making sure nothing falls through the cracks.



You will be the bridge between the internal team and clients—helping track deliverables, follow up on tasks, and ensure everything stays on schedule.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Client Communication & Coordination

- Assist with client communication via
 and Slack

- Follow up with clients on pending items, approvals, and assets

- Help prepare agendas and notes for client calls

- Ensure clients feel supported and taken care of



Project & Task Management

- Track deliverables across all client accounts

- Keep internal task boards (Notion, Google Docs, etc.) updated

- Ensure deadlines are met by coordinating with editors/creators

- Flag delays or issues early



Admin & Operations Support

- Help organize files, folders, and content calendars

- Assist with monthly reporting (filling in data where possible)

- Send reminders and keep projects moving forward

- Support light QA (checking captions, posts, etc.)



Who You Are

- Extremely organized and detail-oriented

- Proactive (you don’t wait to be told what to do)

- Strong written English communication skills

- Comfortable managing multiple projects at once

- Reliable and consistent—you follow through

- Calm under pressure and solutions-oriented



Bonus (Not Required, But a Plus)

- Experience working with marketing or social media teams

- Familiarity with tools like Notion, Google Drive, Slack, Canva

- Experience with content calendars or project management

- Understanding of Instagram/TikTok workflows



What Success Looks Like in This Role

- Nothing slips through the cracks

- Clients receive timely responses and follow-ups

- Internal team stays on track with deadlines

- Founder (me) spends less time chasing tasks and more time on strategy



Compensation

- Starting part-time (~20 hours/week)

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- Opportunity to grow into a full-time role



How to Apply

- To be considered, please include:

- A short intro about yourself

- Your experience with account management or admin work

- Your favorite productivity or organization tool (and why)

- The word “organized” in the subject line so we know you read this



Final Note

We’re looking for someone long-term who can grow with us. If you’re someone who loves bringing order to chaos and keeping things running smoothly, this could be a great fit.

title: AI-Powered Aviation Radio Trainer (Web App)
description:
The Project

We're building an AI-powered training app for pilots to practice aviation radiotelephony (ATC communication). The app simulates realistic radio conversations between a pilot and air traffic control, using AI for speech synthesis, speech recognition, and real-time evaluation. A first prototype and detailed UI mockups already exist. We need a developer to take this to a polished, launchable MVP.  



What the MVP Does

- Predefined flight scenarios (e.g., departure from uncontrolled airfield, approach to controlled airport, traffic pattern) where the user practices radio calls  

- AI-powered ATC voice that responds realistically to the user's radio calls  

- Speech recognition for the user's input with live transcription on screen  

- AI evaluation – the system checks whether the radio call was correct and gives feedback  

- Map view showing the user's position in the scenario  

- Scoring system per scenario with progress tracking  

- Clean, modern UI – mobile-friendly web app  

- User authentication and basic account management  

- Payment integration (Stripe or similar) for one-time purchase (~60€)  



What's Already Done

- Detailed UI mockups (ready to share)  

- Multiple AI-generated prototype versions (React-based)  

- Clear product vision and feature specs  

- Our founder is a licensed pilot and knows aviation radiotelephony inside out – you'll get precise, domain-expert feedback  



What We're Looking For

- A strong fullstack developer (React + Node/Python backend)  

- Experience with AI/LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar)  

- Experience with Web Speech API or similar speech recognition/synthesis  

- Ability to work independently from a clear spec  

- Good communication in English  

- Available to start within the next 1-2 weeks  



Work Style

- Project-based freelance (invoice, no employment contract)  

- Budget: competitive, based on experience – let's discuss  

- Long-term potential: if this goes well, there are more products to build together  



How to Apply

Send us:

- A brief intro about yourself  

- 1-2 relevant projects you've built (ideally with AI or real-time features)  

- Your hourly/project rate  

- Your availability 



 We'll review and get back to you quickly.

title: Meta Ads VSL Video Editor Skincare B-Roll & Direct Response
description:
READ THIS FIRST

We hire based on execution, not resumes.



We are looking for a Meta Ads video editor who can turn detailed ad briefings, voice-overs, scripts, and B-roll directions into high-converting skincare creatives.



This is not a basic video editing role.



You need to understand direct response editing, VSL-style ads, B-roll driven storytelling, hook pacing, visual retention, and how Meta ads need to feel in the first 3 seconds.



You will start with a paid test video.



Paid test structure:



Up to 60 seconds: $5

Over 60 seconds: $10



If your test is strong, we are looking for a long-term part-time editor, with the possibility to grow into a full-time or lead editor role.



ABOUT US



We are building ELYVIA, a premium skincare brand focused on at-home infusion treatments.



Our hero product is a systtem designed for women who want smoother-looking, firmer-looking and more refined skin from home.



Our ads focus on topics such as:



sagging jowls and lower-face ageing

acne scarring and uneven texture

under-eye bags

skincare products only working at the surface level

clinic treatments being expensive, inconvenient, or too invasive



We create performance-driven Meta ads for the UK market.



You will receive detailed scripts, voice-overs, and structured briefings. For example, our current ad briefings include full scripts, timed B-roll scenes, product shots, animation needs, before/after visuals, and direct-response structure for creatives.



We need an editor who can take this level of briefing and turn it into a polished, high-converting video ad.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



You will edit Meta ads using:



VSL-style editing

B-roll storytelling

product visuals

AI UGC or avatar footage when needed

skincare mechanism animations

before/after proof visuals

subtitles and retention-focused text

sound design and pacing

clean mobile-first 9:16 formatting



You will receive:



finished scripts

voice-over files

detailed scene-by-scene briefings

access to our B-roll library

product assets

examples of previous ads



We expect you to source additional visuals yourself when the briefing requires something we do not  have.



For example, if the script mentions collagen support, micro-channels, peptide serum delivery, acne scar texture, clinic microneedling, jawline sagging, or skin-layer animations, you need to be able to find, create, or source suitable visuals that match the message.



Some of our scripts require shots every 2–4 seconds, with longer animations where needed for mechanism explanations.



YOU MUST BE ABLE TO

Edit high-converting Meta ads, not just nice-looking videos

Understand direct response creative structure

Build VSL-style ads from a voice-over

Match visuals tightly to every line of the script

Source strong B-roll when our library does not cover a scene

Create or source simple skincare animations

Add clean subtitles and on-screen text

Improve pacing, retention, and visual clarity

Make premium skincare ads that feel trustworthy, not cheap or dropshipping

Work independently without needing every shot explained twice

Follow a detailed briefing while still bringing creative input



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE



You should have experience with at least one of these:



Meta ad creatives

VSL ads

direct response video ads

UGC-style ads

ecommerce product ads

skincare / beauty / wellness ads

B-roll driven video ads



Experience with skincare, beauty, health, wellness, or direct-response ecommerce is a strong plus.



SOFTWARE / TOOLS



You must have your own editing software and tools.



Examples:



Adobe Premiere Pro

After Effects

CapCut Pro

DaVinci Resolve

Final Cut Pro

Motion graphics / animation tools

stock footage platforms

AI video tools if relevant



We do not provide editing software. You are expected to already have the tools you need.



IMPORTANT SKILLS



We are specifically looking for someone who understands:



how to make the first 3 seconds scroll-stopping

how to keep visual pacing tight

how to make scripts easy to follow visually

how to source relevant B-roll

how to create visual contrast between “problem” and “solution”

how to edit before/after proof sections

how to use animations for mechanism explanation

how to make skincare ads look premium and credible

how to edit for Meta ads, not YouTube or long-form content



HOW WE WORK



We give clear direction.



You will usually receive:



script

voice-over

example competitor ad

scene-by-scene briefing

B-roll notes

brand direction

product assets

access to our B-roll library



But we do not want someone who only places the exact files we provide.



A strong editor should be able to look at the script, understand the emotional and conversion goal, and source missing visuals where needed.



If a scene says “skin-layer collagen support animation” or “woman 50+ touching sagging jawline area,” we expect you to understand what visual is needed and find or create something that fits.



COMPENSATION



We start with a paid test.



Paid test structure:



Test video up to 60 seconds: $5

Test video over 60 seconds: $10



After the test, if the quality is strong, we discuss ongoing work.



Long-term compensation can include:



part-time fixed pay

consistent weekly editing workload

bonuses for winning creatives

higher pay as performance improves

potential full-time or lead editor role



We are not looking for a one-off freelancer. We are looking for someone who can grow with the brand.



TEST VIDEO



For the test, you will receive:



a script

voice-over

example ad / reference

access to base assets

detailed creative briefing

B-roll notes



You are expected to create a complete Meta ad.

structure

title: Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Skyride Auto Services is a growing car rental company based in Columbus, Ohio, focused on providing affordable, reliable vehicles to gig drivers. We specialize in flexible rental terms, no credit checks, and high-touch customer service. As we continue to scale, we’re looking for a proactive and highly organized Executive Virtual Assistant to help manage daily operations and support business growth.



Role Overview



As our Executive Virtual Assistant, you’ll play a critical role in keeping the business running smoothly. You’ll handle day-to-day administrative and operational tasks while actively engaging potential customers with rental offers. This role is ideal for a self-starter who is detail-oriented, comfortable with outreach, and able to work independently in a fast-paced environment. This is a full time role. Must be willing to work during US business hours.



Job Description:

As the Executive Virtual Assistant, you will manage the essential functions of our car rental business and take an active role in offering rental deals to prospective clients. The ideal candidate should be a go-getter with exceptional organizational skills and the ability to work independently.



Key Responsibilities:

 - Lead Generation & Offers: Make a minimum of 50 daily rental offers to prospective customers through phone, or social media platforms.

 - CRM Management: Manage and update customer data in CRM platforms (Go High Level, ensuring accurate records and seamless customer follow-ups.

 - Customer Support: Respond to customer inquiries and resolve issues promptly via
, phone, and social media.

 - Reservation Management: Manage reservations, confirm bookings, and assist with pick-up/drop-off coordination.

 - Fleet Management: Track vehicle availability, ensure timely maintenance, and manage any logistical issues.

 - Billing & Payments: Process payments, generate invoices, and track all financial records.

 - Administrative Tasks: Data entry, document organization, and management of all rental records.

 - Scheduling: Coordinate customer appointments, vehicle maintenance, and other business-related schedules.

 - Social Media Management: Assist with social media posts, manage online listings, and respond to customer reviews.

 - Customer Communication: Regularly communicate updates, offers, and notices to customers.



Requirements

 - Previous experience as a Virtual Assistant or Executive Assistant (preferred)

 - Comfortable making daily outreach and rental offers

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills

 - Experience with CRM platforms (Go High Level preferred)

 - Excellent organization, attention to detail, and time-management skills

 - Ability to multitask and work independently

 - Proficient with Google Workspace, Microsoft Office, and social media platforms

 - Experience in car rentals, transportation, or the gig economy is a plus



What We Offer

 - Fully remote work

 - Flexible hours

 - Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling business

 - Hands-on experience in a niche car rental market



How to Apply

If you’re proactive, reliable, and ready to grow with us, please send:

 - A short video introduction

 - Your resume

 - A cover letter explaining why you’re a strong fit

Send to:

title: SLIDESHOW COPYWRITER
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled copywriter with a knack for crafting compelling, high-converting slideshow content similar to this style. The ideal candidate will already have experience creating slideshows for Amazon brands and writing copy for medical blogs or wellness products.



This is NOT a generic copywriting role. You need to understand consumer psychology, drive engagement, and optimize content for Amazon shoppers and social media audiences. If you’re already making Amazon-focused slideshows and love writing in the medical & wellness niche, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



Key Responsibilities:

? Slideshow Copywriting for Social Media & Amazon



Write engaging, persuasive, and educational copy for TikTok-style photo slideshows in the medical, wellness, and lifestyle niche.

Follow given guidelines while also adding your own creativity and storytelling skills.

Optimize text for maximum engagement, readability, and conversion.

? Amazon-Optimized Copywriting



Craft compelling slideshows, product descriptions, A+ Content, and ad creatives for Amazon sellers.

Understand Amazon buyer psychology and tailor slideshows to drive clicks & purchases.

Work with product images, lifestyle visuals, and before/after comparisons.

? Medical & Wellness Copywriting



Write authoritative, yet engaging content that builds trust with consumers.

Have a strong research mindset—familiarity with scientific studies, clinical claims, and wellness trends is a huge plus.

Ensure all content is compliant, accurate, and medically appropriate.

? Optimization & A/B Testing



Continuously improve copy based on performance metrics.

Stay updated with Amazon trends, social media engagement techniques, and persuasive writing strategies.

Test different styles and adapt writing based on what converts best.

? Hustle Mentality & Growth Mindset



Looking for someone who is hungry to improve, learn, and experiment with copywriting techniques.

Open to feedback and willing to refine their craft.

High work ethic – we’re looking for someone who’s in this for the long run and not just a side gig.



Required Skills & Qualifications:

???? Copywriting Expertise:



Proven experience in writing engaging, concise slideshow content for social media.

Amazon listing & A+ Content experience preferred.

Ability to tell a compelling story with minimal words.

???? Medical & Wellness Niche Experience:



Prior experience in medical, wellness, or health-related copywriting.

Understanding of compliance, health claims, and wellness psychology.

???? Creative & Analytical Thinking:



Can structure slideshows for maximum engagement.

Knows how to write in short-form, attention-grabbing copy.

Experience with A/B testing and content optimization.

???? Work Ethic & Dedication:



Loves working in the AI & digital content space.

Open to working US hours when needed.

High attention to detail & deadlines.



Preferred (But Not Required):

? Already working with Amazon sellers & brands.

? Portfolio of high-engagement slideshow content (BIG plus).

? Experience with SEO, CRO, or direct response copywriting.

title: Operations Assistant
description:
Mabuhay!



I’m Chi, a Pinay founder running a small but growing agency here in Florida.



We already have a small offshore team supporting clients in different markets and states, and we are now preparing to grow this service more intentionally as we focus on offering VA support to local businesses here in Florida.



I hope to find someone who can understand the vision behind what we are building, while also respecting the vision, goals, and working style of the clients we onboard too.



What You’ll Help With

You’ll help with candidate screening, VA shortlists, client onboarding support, VA coordination, follow-ups, internal trackers, simple SOPs creation, meeting notes, and occasional client-facing virtual meetings when needed.



You do not need to lead sales calls. That is my role, and I will be the one handling that locally.



However, once a client has already engaged with us, you should be comfortable helping with follow-ups, speaking professionally, taking notes, asking clear questions, and documenting next steps.



Who I’m Looking For

I’m looking for someone with at least 2–3 years of VA experience, preferably with admin, coordination, client communication, recruitment support, or project assistance experience.



I also want to be transparent that this role may not be the right fit for someone with very senior or extensive operations experience. Since we are still growing, if your experience is already at a senior operations level, you deserve a role or client that can properly match that value. 



For now, I’m looking for someone with VA experience, good judgment, and the willingness to grow with the agency as we continue building the VA service side properly.



Important Notes: 

1. Please be honest about your current workload.  If you are already handling two full-time clients and another part-time client, or have a full-time on-site, and two part time online, this may not be the right fit. 



I understand the hustle since I’ve been a VA myself for more than a decade, but I also know from experience that being overloaded can lead to burnout, missed details, and inconsistent work, heavily rely on AI tools, and no work like balance. 



2.  This is not a work arbitrage setup. When I say this is not a work arbitrage setup, I mean this role is not for someone who plans to accept the position, pass the work to someone else, overload themselves with too many clients, or use our client relationships for side arrangements.



We are building a small, structured team where the work, communication, and client relationships stay clear and properly managed through the agency.



This can be implemented if a client eventually needs more than one person or a bigger support setup, I will assess that properly case by case. 



We use AI tools in the agency, but I’m not looking for someone who depends heavily on AI for everything. Kung lahat na lang iaasa sa AI without understanding the task, writing, checking details, then it defeats the purpose of hiring for this role.



Screening 

Please do not attach any IDs in your initial application or send them directly through rando
ssages on any platforms we have. If you are shortlisted, we will give you proper instructions on where and how to submit the required IDs securely.  



For final screening, shortlisted applicants must be willing to provide two valid and verifiable IDs for identity verification.



Team Culture Note

We do not work with people who belittle others, look down on teammates, or act as if they are above the team because of education, experience, title, or background.



This standard also applies to the clients we work with. If a client cannot respect our process, rules, and team, then they may not be the right fit for the agency.  Plain and simple. 



Life is already hard enough. We do not need that kind of attitude inside the team, working locally and offshore.



Rate

Please include your expected rate when applying.  I want to understand how you understand this job post and if whether it fits the current stage of the agency.



We are still growing, so I may not be the right fit for someone who is already at a senior operations rate. At the same time, I also don’t want to lowball someone who has strong skills and deserves a client or role that can match that level.



If you are someone who wants to grow with us, please be honest about your rate, availability, and what you can bring to the role.  



Schedule

Monday to Friday preferred | U.S. Eastern Timezone



To Apply

(Don't get too overwhelmed with the job post..)

Create a short video introduction, the naturally "You"..

- Your VA or operations experience 

- Tools you’ve used

- Your (honest) current workload and availability 

- Which city are you in, and what’s the best food place in your area?   

- If I ask you to write a short client update without AI, would you be comfortable doing that?

- What do you think about the important notes, screening process and culture fit?



To Get Shortlisted Quicker



** Please send your short video introduction to my personal Gmail for now: 

** Please do not send your CV at this stage. Just send the short video introduction based on the details listed above.



Thank you for reading everything. I know medyo mahaba, but I would rather be clear from the beginning.



If this role feels aligned with your experience, current capacity, and work style, please send your short video introduction based on the instructions above.



Once shortlisted, you will receive a response from our internal company
.



Salamat, and I appreciate your interest. -Chi

, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. Each video should include captions, music, transitions, text overlays, and colour grading as needed, delivered ready to post.



What we are looking for:

- Experience editing fitness, martial arts, or sports content

- Proficient in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut

- Strong sense of pacing and music for short-form content

- 24–48 hour turnaround per video

- Portfolio of previous edits required — applications without samples will not be reviewed



This is an ongoing part-time role starting at 2–5 videos per week with room to grow.

title: Senior Personal Injury Case Manager (100k+ Settlements & Paralegal Demand Experience)
description:
Schedule: Full time | Must work U.S. Pacific Time (California)

Department: Pre-Suit | Plaintiff Personal Injury

Reports To: Managing Attorney



About the Role

We are a fast growing, results oriented Plaintiff Personal Injury law firm seeking a highly experienced Senior Case Manager to step into a high responsibility role. You will manage high value personal injury cases from intake through settlement and close out. You will serve as the primary point of contact for our clients, coordinating medical treatment, managing complex insurance claims, preparing polished demand packages, and ensuring strict compliance with all deadlines.



We are looking for a true professional who thrives in a fast paced remote environment, communicates directly, and can manage a high volume of details without dropping the ball. If you are just looking to coast, this is not the job for you. If you are driven by results, value clear systems, and want to be rewarded for your hard work, we want to talk to you.



Key Responsibilities

Client Communication & Case Management:

• Serve as the primary client contact via phone,
, text, and client portal.

• Onboard new clients and clearly set expectations from day one.

• Provide regular case updates with empathy and professionalism.

• Maintain organized, highly detailed case notes and next actions in our case management system.



Insurance Claims & Coverage:

• Open and aggressively manage Bodily Injury, MedPay/PIP (if applicable), and UM/UIM claims.

• Rapidly obtain declarations pages, policy limits, and adjuster information.

• Request, track, and file UM/UIM Selection or Rejection Letters for applicable policies.

• Ensure complete and timely coverage verification for every file.



Deadlines & Compliance:

• Calendar and meticulously track California deadlines, including the 2 year statute of limitations and municipal/ante litem notice deadlines.

• Maintain a standard of zero missed deadlines and perfectly accurate documentation.



Medical Treatment & Records:

• Coordinate medical provider referrals under attorney direction.

• Monitor treatment progress and MMI status.

• Request, track, and strictly quality check HIPAA compliant medical records and bills.



Liens & Subrogation:

• Open and tightly manage Medicaid, Medicare, ERISA, and private health insurance liens.

• Obtain final lien demands and assist with aggressive reductions.



Demands, Settlement & Close Out:

• Prepare highly polished demand packages, including liability summaries, damages narratives, medical specials spreadsheets, and supporting exhibits.

• Support settlement negotiations for high value cases under attorney supervision.

• Process settlements, releases, disbursements, and case close out checklists.



Performance Metrics (KPIs):

We use KPI tracking to reward high performers with bonuses, not for micromanagement. You will be measured on:

• Time from assignment to demand and settlement.

• Coverage completeness (UM/UIM letters and verified limits secured within 30 days).

• Medical records turnaround time and first pass completeness.

• Zero missed deadlines and clean CRM documentation.



Qualifications:

• Proven plaintiff personal injury pre-suit case management experience.

• California PI experience is strongly preferred (or a rigorous willingness to learn CA specific rules).

• Deep working knowledge of UM/UIM, MedPay/PIP, medical billing terminology, and complex liens/subrogation.

• Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.

• Highly organized, detail oriented, proactive, and tech savvy.

• Prior experience working effectively in a fast paced environment.

• Reliable, professional, and comfortable working completely independently in a remote setting.



Technology & Tools

• Experience with at least one major PI case management system (Filevine, Needles, SmartAdvocate, Lead Docket).

• Comfortable with Microsoft 365.

• Familiar with e-fax, e-signature tools, and VOIP systems.

(Training is provided for firm specific tools.)



Workspace & Application Requirements:

To support a successful remote work environment and ensure you are set up for long term success, applicants MUST include the following in their proposal:

• A short video introduction.

• A brief view of your dedicated workspace.

• A link or screenshot confirming your internet speed and computer specifications.

(These materials help us ensure long term success in a fully remote role.)



Compensation & Benefits:

• $2,500 USD Monthly, paid bi-weekly. Negotiable depending on experience.

• 40 hour work week from 9 AM to 6 PM Pacific Time.

• Aggressive performance bonuses tied to KPIs (Up to $1,000 USD).

• Full time, long term position.

• An efficient team environment with well defined processes, direct collaboration with a U.S. attorney, and major opportunities for growth.



Why Join Our Firm

• Stable, long term remote role (not project based)

• Direct collaboration with U.S. attorney

• Well defined processes and realistic expectations

• Opportunity to grow with a plaintiff side personal injury practice



Answer the following questions when applying:

1. You have a California auto-collision file. The at-fault Geico policy is $15k/$30k. Your client's ER and physical therapy bills total $42,000, and they have an active ERISA health insurance lien. Walk me through your exact step-by-step strategy to get this file closed and put money in the client's pocket.



2. An adjuster from State Farm is refusing to tender a $100k policy limit, arguing that the client's MRI findings (a 3mm disc bulge) are degenerative and not related to the rear-end impact. What specific evidence and arguments are you putting in the demand letter to force them to pay?



3. You inherit a messy Filevine dashboard with 40 pre-litigation files. 10 are waiting on medical records, 5 are ready for demands, and 3 have upcoming statute of limitations deadlines in 60 days. How do you prioritize your first 48 hours on the job?



4. A client calls you absolutely furious. It’s been 8 months since their accident, they just finished treatment a week ago, and they are demanding to know why they don't have their settlement check yet. They threaten to fire the firm. Walk me through exactly how you handle this call, de-escalate the situation, and reset their expectations.



5. You get a new intake for an intersection collision. The police report incorrectly places your client 100% at fault, but your client insists the other driver ran a red light. The other driver is claiming your client ran the light. What are your immediate next steps to flip liability and find coverage?

title: Full-time YT Story Script Writer, Fast Learner
description:
Nobody nails our style on day one. But when we give you a note, we expect it applied across all future scripts, we don't repeat the same correction twice. If you tend to need the same feedback multiple times, this role isn't for you. If clients have told you you're "easy to give notes to" and you actually apply them, keep reading.



This is not a traditional writing role. The actual writing is done by Claude (AI) using our internal SOPs. Your job is editorial judgment: read what the AI produces, spot the issues, and direct Claude to fix them. AI does the cooking, you're the chef making sure it actually tastes good. This is not a "send prompt and save output" task, your judgment as a writer is strongly needed.



You won't write prose from scratch. You'll read, judge, push back on the AI, and iterate until the script meets our quality bar. Strong editorial instinct and YouTube retention understanding are what matter — not typing speed or creative writing skill.



Setup: Full-time, 40 hrs/week, Hubstaff + NDA required. High volume, repeatable workflow, strong systems already in place.

Compensation: $900/month base + performance bonuses ($5.6/h). Long-term role with growth potential as we scale.



Must have:

Solid grasp of YouTube retention (hook, pacing, AVD, open loops, reveal structure)

Strong editorial judgment — you can read a script and immediately spot what's not working

Comfort with AI writing tools and following detailed SOPs

Background in writing, editing, or content review (YouTube scripts, articles, fiction, or other long-form)



In your application, please answer:



1. In 2–4 sentences: what keeps viewers watching past the first 30 seconds of a story video, and how do you maintain retention throughout a 10-minute script?

2. How do you track and apply client feedback so the same notes don't come up repeatedly?

3. Confirm you can commit to 40 hrs/week full-time.

4. A short description of what your most recent job was (summarize it in 1-4 sentences what you worked on)

5. Share 1–2 writing samples (links or attachments)



Generic or AI-copy-paste applications will be ignored.

title: **High-Precision Futures Trading Algorithm Developer (Look Back Strategy | NY Session | Advanced Smart Money Concepts)**
description:
Looking for a developer to build a high-precision futures trading algorithm based on a Look Back strategy using 15-minute historical candles.



The strategy includes New York session timing, True Opens, Premium / Discount / Dead Zone logic, liquidity sweeps, SMT correlation, and strict risk management.



The system must identify the closest valid Look Back zone, define wick/body-based entries, and execute mainly through limit orders.



Trades are allowed only during the 9:30–10:00 AM New York session.



It also requires 1-minute trade management, daily trade limits, automatic stop rules, and accurate backtesting.



Build difficulty: high — this requires precise time-based logic, multi-symbol comparison, market-structure understanding, and strong backtesting experience.

title: Thumbnail Designer  – YouTube Channel (300k subscribers)
description:
We are an animated documentary channel on YouTube with over 300,000 subscribers. We are looking for a skilled thumbnail artist who can create compelling, high-performing thumbnails using a hand-crafted design process starting from sketches and ending in polished final outputs.



This role is not for AI-only designers. We are specifically looking for artists who can think, sketch, and design intentionally, using AI only as a supporting tool, not as the primary method of creation.



What You’ll Do

 • Create thumbnails for each video using a two-step process:

 1. Hand-drawn sketch / concept layout

 2. Final polished thumbnail design

 • Translate video ideas into visually engaging, click-worthy concepts

 • Develop original compositions and visual storytelling elements

 • Refine sketches into high-quality thumbnails using design tools



 Core Requirement (VERY IMPORTANT)



This role requires a hand-crafted creative process.

 • You must be able to sketch ideas by hand (digitally or traditionally)

 • You must demonstrate original composition and concept development

 • AI tools may be used only as support, not as the primary method



Not acceptable:

 • Fully AI-generated thumbnails

 • Outputs that visibly look AI-generated

 • Reliance on prompt-only workflows



What we want:

 • Artist-driven thumbnails

 • Intentional design decisions

 • Work that feels crafted, not generated



What We’re Looking For



Artistic Skills (CRITICAL)

 • Strong drawing / sketching ability

 • Ability to quickly visualize and communicate ideas through sketches

 • Understanding of anatomy, shape, and exaggeration (especially animals)

 • Composition and layout design from scratch



 Concept & Creative Thinking

 • Ability to interpret a video idea and find the most clickable visual angle

 • Strong understanding of:

 • Emotion (danger, curiosity, shock)

 • Visual storytelling

 • Ability to create engaging hooks paired with visuals



Technical Skills

 • Adobe Photoshop (required)

 • Digital drawing tools (e.g., tablet workflows, brushes, sketch layers)

 • Image compositing and lighting effects

 • Typography for thumbnails (bold, readable text)



Workflow

 • Ability to:

 • Start with rough concept sketches

 • Iterate quickly

 • Deliver polished final thumbnails

 • Comfortable working within a repeatable template and style system



Deliverables Per Thumbnail

 • Initial Sketch

 • Rough layout of idea (composition + concept)

 • Final Thumbnail

 • Fully rendered, polished, YouTube-ready design



Important Note on AI



AI can be used for:

 • Reference gathering

 • Minor enhancements

 • Supporting ideation



However:



The core concept, composition, and final output must be artist-driven and manually executed.



Pay

 • $10 per thumbnail

 • $10 per compilation thumbnail

 • Ongoing weekly work for the right candidate



???? How to Apply

 1. Submit:

 • Examples of your work that include sketches + final outputs

 • Any relevant thumbnail or illustration work

 2. Be prepared to complete a short trial task



To confirm you’ve read this post, include the word “Burger” in your application. Applications without it will not be considered.

title: VIDEO EDITOR — Part-Time 15–20h/week

This is a long-term, part-time remote position with flexible scheduling and room to grow as the brand scales.



ABOUT THE BRAND

We are an international e-commerce brand that sells health and wellness products — specifically transdermal patches as an alternative to pills and supplements. Our customers are primarily based in the US, UK, and Europe. The brand is growing fast and we are looking for a creative video editor to grow with us.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Edit direct-response video ads (primarily 9:16 vertical for Meta/Instagram Reels and TikTok)

Cut and pace footage to maximize viewer retention from the first frame

Work with AI-generated video clips, UGC-style content, and lifestyle footage

Add captions, sound effects, music, and motion graphics where needed

Implement strong hooks that stop the scroll within the first 3 seconds

Find suitable stock footage as B-Roll

Deliver polished ad creatives ready for paid social campaigns



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Must-Have:

Proven experience editing short-form video ads or social content

Strong understanding of direct-response video structure: hooks, pacing, CTA

Ability to empathize with the target audience (35–60 year olds) and edit accordingly

Portfolio of at least 3–5 reference videos you have edited

Your choice of editing software — use what you know best



Nice-to-Have:

Experience with AI content generation tools (Higgsfield, Kling, ElevenLabs, CapCut, or similar)

Familiarity with paid social ad creative formats and best practices

Experience editing for health, wellness, or supplement brands



SCHEDULE & HOURS

Part-time: approximately 15–20 hours per week

Flexible scheduling — we will find a rhythm that works for both sides

100% remote



WHAT WE OFFER

Competitive pay based on experience

Long-term position with a growing brand

Clear creative briefs provided for every project

Supportive and fast-moving team environment



HOW TO APPLY

If this sounds like a great fit for you, please include the following in your application:

A short introduction text about yourself and your video editing experience

3–5 reference videos you have edited — please share links (no downloads required)

Your preferred editing software and any AI tools you work with

Monitor spend, bids, and performance; adjust to hit volume and cost-per-lead targets.



Lead Qualification & Handoff



Respond to inbound inquiries via chat,
, and phone to assess eligibility.



Score, tag, and update leads in the CRM; schedule appointments for finance consultants.



Persistently follow up until leads enter the application process or are disqualified.



Messaging & Testing



Draft concise outreach copy, subject lines, and ad creatives tailored to first-time buyers, trade-ins, etc.



A/B test headlines, CTAs, and channels to improve open and conversion rates.



CRM Management & Reporting



Maintain CRM hygiene: update statuses, log communication notes, and ensure data accuracy.



Produce weekly reports on lead volume, conversion rates, CPL, and campaign ROI.



Collaboration & Continuous Improvement



Partner with marketing to refine audience targeting and creative assets.



Share lead-quality insights with sales to tighten qualification criteria and boost close rates.



Compliance & Quality Assurance



Ensure all communications comply with FMA advertising standards and internal data-privacy policies.



Use approved scripts, disclaimers, and opt-out mechanisms in every outreach.



Required Skills & Experience

2+ years in digital lead generation, ideally in car-finance or automotive sales.



Hands-on experience with Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager.



Proficiency with CRM platforms (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho).



Excellent written and verbal communication; strong copywriting skills.



Highly organized, target-driven, and self-motivated.



Comfortable working NZ business hours remotely.



Compensation & Commission

Base Salary: PHP 25,000 per month



Commission: Tiered bonus per funded finance application



PHP 1000 per approved deal from the 11th  deal onward in the same calendar month



Benefits: Flexible hours, remote-work allowance, training budget, performance bonuses



Thanks for your interest. Our interview process has three stages:



Stage 1: 1-minute video – Assesses your confidence, communication, and ability to engage—key for social media lead generation.



Stage 2: Phone interview – Evaluates your phone manner, listening skills, and ability to handle NZ customer conversations.



Stage 3: Zoom interview – Reviews your experience, problem-solving, and ability to convert leads in a structured setting.

title: We're hiring! Web Developers!
description:
Part-Time Web Developer (Remote)



We’re looking for a detail-oriented Web Developer to support ongoing development and designing a platform of our web This is a part-time, fully remote role ideal for someone who enjoys both front-end work and system integrations. 



What You’ll Do

Build, maintain, and optimize web pages and features using modern web technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)

Troubleshoot and debug issues across web

Ensure data accuracy and consistency across platforms

Collaborate with cross-functional teams while working independently in a remote setup.





What We’re Looking For:



Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or a related field

1–3 years of experience in web or software development

Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript (or similar frameworks)

Strong hands-on experience with HubSpot CRM and automation

Solid understanding of APIs and system integrations

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Ability to manage tasks independently and communicate effectively in a remote environment



Nice to Have:



Backend or full-stack development experience

Experience with data reporting or analytics tools

Why Join Us

Fully remote, flexible work setup

Competitive compensation

Collaborative, supportive team culture

Exposure to meaningful system integration projects

Opportunities for growth and ownership of technical initiatives

title: CRM & Email Marketing Specialist (Beauty/E-commerce)
description:
We are looking for a creative and data-driven CRM &
 Specialist to own the lifecycle of our customers. You will be responsible for designing beautiful, on-brand
s and managing the technical flows that turn one-time buyers into lifelong fans of Trademark Beauty.

Key Responsibilities:

 Design & Coding: Create high-converting, mobile-responsive
 templates (HTML/CSS or drag-and-drop) that match our brand aesthetic.

CRM Flow Management: Build and optimize automated "flows" (Welcome series, Abandoned Cart, Post-Purchase, Win-backs).

Campaign Execution: Manage the weekly
 calendar, from segmenting audiences to A/B testing subject lines.

Reporting: Track and report on Open Rates, CTR, and Revenue per
 to constantly improve performance.

Requirements:

Portfolio Required: Must show examples of previous
 designs (preferably in beauty, fashion, or lifestyle).

Tech Stack: Experience with Klaviyo (preferred), Omnisend, or Mailchimp.

Copywriting: Ability to write catchy, brand-aligned subject lines and body copy.

Detail-Oriented: You triple-check every link and discount code before hitting "send."

title: Graphic designer and Hand Artist (NO CANVA)
description: We are looking for a graphic designer who is also an artist, who can create from scratch.  We need an artist for large projects that may need to draw by hand and create raw designs on photoshop and illustrator.  We are a branding company that does Branding packages as well as Murals.  Please do not apply with out experience in illustrator AND Photoshop.

title: B2B Appointment Setter
description:
About the Role:



We’re seeking a confident and dependable Appointment Setter to join our team. In this role, you’ll make outbound calls to both cold and warm leads, follow a simple script, and schedule appointments directly on our calendar. 



Must work California hours Monday through Friday, 9am - 6 pm PST, United States 



Send resume to:   
 



Whats  App   
This is a long-term position with opportunities for growth based on performance.



Responsibilities:



Make daily outbound calls (cold + warm leads)

Follow a proven script with professionalism and clarity

Speak clearly and professionally with potential clients

Handle basic objections effectively

Schedule qualified appointments

Log brief, clear notes in our system



Requirements (IMPORTANT):



Fluent English with a clear, neutral accent

Prior experience in cold calling, a call center, or sales

Comfortable speaking on the phone for extended periods

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

Positive attitude and strong work ethic



Compensation:



 Hourly USD + commission

Performance bonus  

Opportunity for raises based on performance



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):



To be considered, you MUST complete the following steps:

Tell us:

Your experience with cold calling

How many calls you can make per day



IMPORTANT: 



We’re looking to hire immediately. If you’re reliable and serious about your work, this can be a long-term role with real opportunity.

title: Writer/Junior Virtual Assistant/Ghostwriter - British Publishing Company
description:
HIRING: ROCKSTAR VA (Ghostwriter/Junior Virtual Assistant/Writer)



We are seeking a highly skilled and creative Virtual Assistant to join our British Publishing Company.



The ideal candidate will possess extensive knowledge and experience in general virtual assistant work and project coordination, as well as the ability to manage tea
mbers and their projects effectively.



This is a FULL-TIME position working remotely, and I am looking for someone to work LONG-TERM; this would suit someone looking for long-term security and guaranteed employment.



Requirements:



1-2+ years of Virtual Assistant, remote working experience, focusing on English written content.

Excellent communication in English and interpersonal skills with me (Director) & the team.

Help with proofreading and light editing of English content.





 Newsletters from easy to use templates (training provided).

Research, QA & Admin duties uploading content rom easy to use templates (training provided).



My goal is to find a fantastic full-time writer, junior virtual assistant, or ghostwriter! Is that you?



- NO TIME WASTERS!

- NO Part-timers!

- NO You Cannot work elsewhere and work for me (this is a full-time job)

- YES, you Must have excellent Internet all the time - (if you have poor internet or cut-outs, do not apply)

- YES, to Good work Attitude (no bad attitude/poor work ethic)

- MUST, be able to take feedback and NOT take it personally!



To apply for this job, please answer the following questions:



1. What is it about this job that appeals to you?

2. Tell me about one thing you enjoy doing for fun (outside of work).

3. What relevant previous work experience have you had?

4. What is your availability in terms of hours per week? When are your working hours?

5. What´s your current education level (and send me photo´s of diploma´s when I ask for it)



Don't forget to:



1. Confirm you can work 40 hours per week 4pm - 12am Ph time (GMT approx 8am - 4pm, UK Time)

2. Share your Resume/CV

3. Share links to your portfolio (if you have any)

4. Whatsapp to arrange a video interview (with country code +)



ENSURE: YOUR ENGLISH & IQ TESTS ARE COMPLETED AND UPLOADED TO YOUR PROFILE ON THIS WEBSITE.



We are a British publishing company and are excited to get to know you better.



APPLY NOW!



Thanks,

Richard

title: Digital Marketing & Operations Assistant (Social Media + GoHighLevel + Content)
description:
We are a growing U.S.-based rental company looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Digital Marketing & Operations Assistant to join our team long-term.



This is not a basic virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who can stay organized, take ownership of tasks, and help improve our marketing and daily operations.



What You’ll Be Doing:



* Manage and post content on social media (Instagram,
, TikTok)

* Create graphics and short-form videos (Canva, CapCut)

* Assist with CRM and lead management (GoHighLevel or similar)

* Organize calendars, leads, and internal data

* Help improve systems and workflows

* Assist with general admin tasks as needed



What We’re Looking For:



* Strong communication and organization skills

* Experience with social media and content creation

* Familiar with GoHighLevel or similar CRM (preferred)

* Reliable, consistent, and detail-oriented

* Able to work with U.S. time zones (EST preferred)



IMPORTANT:



To apply, include the word “READY” at the top of your application and send:



1. Examples of social media or content you’ve created

2. Any CRM or automation experience

3. Why you’d be a good fit for this role



Applications without this will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow with the company.

title: 12 HR Decision | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Billing Manager
description:
About the Role



We are looking for an experienced and detail-oriented Billing Manager to oversee our billing, accounts receivable, and accounts payable processes. This role is responsible for making sure invoices are accurate, payments are collected on time, vendor bills are handled properly, and financial records are well organized.



The ideal candidate has strong billing or bookkeeping experience, good communication skills, and the ability to improve processes as the company grows.



Responsibilities



- Manage customer billing and invoice generation

- Oversee accounts receivable and payment collection

- Monitor overdue accounts and follow up professionally

- Review and process credits, adjustments, and refunds

- Manage accounts payable and vendor bill tracking

- Help schedule and track outgoing payments

- Reconcile invoices, customer payments, vendor bills, and account balances

- Maintain accurate customer and vendor billing records

- Respond to billing questions from customers and internal tea
mbers

- Prepare billing, AR, AP, and collection reports for management

- Identify billing errors and resolve account discrepancies

- Improve billing procedures and internal accounting workflows

- Work with management on financial reporting and cash flow tracking

- Ensure billing processes are completed accurately and on time



Requirements



- Previous experience in billing, accounts receivable, accounts payable, bookkeeping, or accounting operations

- Strong attention to detail and accuracy

- Ability to manage billing deadlines and recurring monthly processes

- Good communication skills for working with customers, vendors, and internal teams

- Experience using accounting software, billing systems, spreadsheets, and

- Ability to handle confidential financial information responsibly

- Strong organization and problem-solving skills

- Ability to work independently and take ownership of billing operations



Preferred Qualifications



- Experience as a Billing Manager, Accounting Manager, Bookkeeper, Accountant or similar role

- Experience with QuickBooks, Xero, WHMCS, Stripe, PayPal, or similar platforms

- Experience in hosting, IT, SaaS, telecom, or another service-based business

- Understanding of recurring billing, subscriptions, customer credits, and payment gateways

- Experience improving billing processes or creating billing procedures



Schedule



This is a full-time position with a schedule of 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday. Some flexibility may be available depending on experience and business needs.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of billing operations, keep financial records accurate, and help make sure customers and vendors are handled professionally. The right person should be dependable, organized, and comfortable managing both routine billing tasks and larger process improvements.



How to Apply



Please send your resume and a short message explaining your experience with billing, accounts receivable, accounts payable, and accounting or billing software.
