title: Content Operations Manager — Personal Brand + Community
description:
CONTENT OPERATIONS MANAGER — PERSONAL BRAND + COMMUNITY

Full-time | Remote | Philippines | $1,000+ USD/month | PST hours + weekends



ABOUT THIS ROLE



This is a full-time, exclusive role supporting a globally recognized finance educator and content creator with 450K+ LinkedIn followers, a 40K+ newsletter, and a growing online Academy and executive community. You will be the operational backbone of how content gets created, published, and distributed — and how a high-value community of executives experiences our platform every day.



This is not a 9-to-5 role and it is not for someone who needs to be managed. It is for someone who runs toward problems, operates with urgency, and uses AI not as a novelty but as the foundation of how they work. If you got comfortable in your last role, this is the wrong opportunity. If you are always looking for a faster, smarter way to do what you did yesterday, keep reading.



PLATFORMS



Circle — spaces, events, member management, moderation



Content publishing



LinkedIn — native publishing, scheduling, engagement, analytics

Beehiiv — newsletter drafting, scheduling, segmentation, analytics

Thinkific — course publishing, student communication, basic back-end



Content ops



A content calendar tool: Notion, Airtable, or ClickUp

Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive) or Microsoft 365

Loom — async video communication



AI tools (daily use, multiple)



ChatGPT / Claude / Gemini

At least one image tool: Midjourney, Ideogram, or DALL·E

At least one workflow/automation: 
, Zapier, or n8n



Design + repurposing



Canva — graphics, carousels, templates

A video repurposing tool: Descript, Opus Clip, or CapCut



Technical



HTML/CSS — able to read, fix, and deploy

A deployment target: Netlify, GitHub Pages, Vercel, or Webflow

Basic code editor: VS Code, Cursor, or similar



Work environment



Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD) — or equivalent remote-desktop work history



Bonus / nice to have



Scheduling layer: Nuelink

Perplexity, Notion AI, ElevenLabs

Figma, Descript for editing

Teams fluency

Google Analytics / basic funnel reading

SEO Knowledge



WHAT YOU WILL DO



- Manage our Circle community end-to-end — onboarding, events, engagement loops, member experience, and day-to-day moderation across multiple spaces and tiers

- Coordinate content across LinkedIn, our newsletter (Beehiiv), the Academy (Thinkific), and our brands — scheduling, repurposing, and publishing with zero errors

- Maintain and execute a content calendar across both personal brand and company brand 

- Troubleshoot and deploy HTML — fix broken elements, update landing pages, push changes to live environments without waiting for a developer

- Build and improve AI-assisted workflows to increase output volume and reduce turnaround time — and proactively replace anything you built last month with something better this month

- Manage event logistics inside Circle — live sessions, replays, announcements, and follow-up sequences

- Flag issues before they escalate. Surface problems your employer doesn't know about yet. Be two steps ahead, always.



WHAT WE REQUIRE 



- Demonstrated experience managing content for a personal brand with a significant following — LinkedIn, YouTube, newsletter, or similar. We will verify this. Vague claims will disqualify you.

- Proven experience managing an online community platform (Circle, Mighty Networks, Slack, 
) at an operational level — not just participation

- Ability to troubleshoot and fix HTML/CSS issues and deploy to live environments. This will be tested.

- Fluent, professional English — written and spoken. This role involves executive-facing communication.

- AI-native work style — you can demonstrate specific workflows you have built and measurably improved over time. "I use ChatGPT" is not sufficient.

- Available full-time, exclusively — no other clients, no side projects that compete for your attention during work hours

- Available during PST business hours and on weekends as needed. This is a high-output role.

- Minimum 2 years in a single role with a verifiable reference who will answer the phone



WHO YOU ARE



- You move fast and think clearly at the same time — speed without sloppiness

- You are organized by default, not by effort — your systems are tighter than your employer expects

- You take initiative and solve problems before reporting them — not the other way around

- You are loyal. You do not treat this as a stepping stone. You build something and you own it.

- You understand personal branding mechanics at a deep level — what makes content perform, why audiences grow, how community trust is built

- You are comfortable working in a monitored environment with tracked hours and clear output expectations — and you prefer it that way because you have nothing to hide

- You do not need to be the most creative person in the room. You need to be the most reliable and the fastest executor in the room.



COMPENSATION



$1,000+ USD per month depending on experience and demonstrated results. After a successful 90-day trial, a performance bonus structure applies based on output targets. This is a contractor arrangement. You are responsible for your own taxes and benefits. 





HOW TO APPLY



Read every instruction carefully. Applications that skip steps or ignore instructions are automatically disqualified — this is intentional.



Record a 90-second Loom video — unedited, screen share on. Open your AI tool of choice and walk us through one workflow you have built that saves you real time. Talk while you do it. Do not prepare a script.



Answer these three questions in 3 sentences each — no more:

   - "Describe a time a person you worked for made a decision you disagreed with. What did you do?"

   - "What is one thing you stopped doing in your work in the last 6 months because AI made it faster or obsolete?"

   - "Working 9–10 hours a day, including some weekends, is a real requirement of this role. What does that mean for your life right now — be honest."



Provide the following links — all are required:

   - Your LinkedIn profile 

   - One example of a community or social account you have managed — link to the platform

   - One piece of content you personally wrote in your own voice — a post, article, or newsletter issue



Provide one professional reference — a former employer or client (not a colleague) — with their name, role, and a phone number or
 we can use to contact them before any interview.



NOTE ON THE PROCESS: Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a paid test task ($50 USD, approximately 2.5 hours). This task includes content repurposing, an HTML fix with live deployment, a community scenario response, and an AI workflow design exercise. A screen recording is required for the duration of the task. Finalists will have a 30-minute live video interview. The role includes a 30-day paid trial period with defined output targets.





```

title: Digital Marketing and Tech Savvy VA
description:
We run a finance education and strategic finance business with a large LinkedIn audience. We're hiring a Digital Marketing and Tech Savvy VA who can operate the full marketing engine day-to-day: newsletters,
 sequences, campaigns, social publishing, community engagement, lead magnets, landing pages, automations, and reporting.



We need an operator with a solid track record, strong judgment, tight execution, and high standards.



What you’ll own:



1.
 + beehiiv



Draft and edit newsletters (tight, precise, finance-literate writing).



Build and manage
 sequences, automations, segmentation, tagging, and campaign sends in beehiiv.

Maintain list hygiene and deliverability basics (engagement-based segmentation, clean sending practices).

Track performance (open rate, CTR, conversions) and recommend improvements.



2. Socials + repurposing



Repurpose long-form content into platform-native posts (LinkedIn pages + other platforms).

Schedule, publish, and QA posts (formatting, links, tracking, assets).

Manage community posts and engagement cadence.

Use platform tools to drive engagement (ManyChat and other platform-specific tools where appropriate).



3. Lead magnets + assets + design coordination



Propose new lead magnet ideas aligned to the audience and products.

Coordinate creation of lead magnets and post visuals with the designer (briefs, iteration loops, final QA).

Maintain an organized asset library and content calendar.



4. Web + landing pages + SEO



Create and manage landing pages for lead magnets and offers (copy updates, embeds, forms, HTML edits if needed).

Basic SEO implementation (titles, meta descriptions, on-page updates).

Track performance in Google Analytics and deliver a simple weekly report with insights.



5. Automations



Build and maintain 
 automations (and Zapier when needed).

Connect forms, tagging, sequences, and reporting with reliable logic and error handling.

Document what you build so it’s maintainable.



6. Non-negotiables



Excellent editor. You can tighten copy without changing meaning, introducing errors, or adding fluff.

Finance-literate. You understand basic finance/accounting language and can keep it accurate.

Strong beehiiv skills. You have actually built sequences, segmentation, automations, and campaigns.

Digital Margeting expertise. You understand funnel building, conversion tracking, segmentation, engagement, etc

Reliable execution. You hit deadlines, QA your work, and follow systems.

High integrity: confidentiality, discretion, loyalty. 

Responsible AI use. You can use AI to accelerate drafts, but you do not invent facts, stats, or claims. Anything factual must be verified and sourced properly. No confidential uploads into unapproved tools.



Tools you should be comfortable with



beehiiv 

Canva 


 and Zapier

HTML 

Gamma app 

Google Analytics and basic SEO

ManyChat 

Notion

ClickUp 



How we work



You’ll receive priorities and voice guidelines, then you run execution with minimal hand-holding.

Weekly live (PST availability) + async work

Clear file naming, version control, and organized folders are mandatory.

You flag issues early and propose solutions.



Trial assignment - Live on camera



Final candidates will complete a paid test that includes:



Editing a newsletter draft 

Building a simple beehiiv flow from a short spec (tagging + segmentation + sequence)

Repurposing one LinkedIn post into 2–3 platform-native variants



To apply share your linkedin, work samples as appicable, break down and rate your experience and skill level across each area and tools.

title: HR/Admin Virtual Assistant
description:
About Us

MSE Environmental is a growing environmental consulting company operating across Nevada, Texas, Arizona, and future U.S. markets. We provide asbestos, mold, lead, environmental site assessments, compliance testing, and related environmental services.

We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented virtual assistant based in the Philippines to support our HR, admin, payroll preparation, invoicing coordination, and internal documentation systems.

This role is ideal for someone who is dependable, proactive, excellent with details, and comfortable working inside systems like Notion, Gusto, Google Workspace, and project management tools.



Role Overview

The HR/Admin VA will help keep our internal operations organized and moving. You will not be responsible for making HR decisions, handling employee discipline, or giving legal/compliance advice. Instead, your role is to help organize requests, track tasks, update systems, prepare information, follow up on missing documents, and support the leadership team.

You will work closely with company leadership, fractional HR support, bookkeeping, invoicing, and team managers. 



Key Responsibilities

HR / People Admin Support

Track PTO requests and update the PTO tracker

Maintain employee contact lists and internal directories

Help organize onboarding and offboarding checklists

Follow up on missing employee documents

Maintain employee file checklists

Assist with HR inbox organization

Prepare weekly HR/admin summaries for leadership

Track employee training completion

Update Notion HR dashboards and databases

Organize SOPs, Loom videos, and training materials



Payroll Preparation Support

Prepare payroll checklist before payroll dates

Confirm time entries or missing payroll items

Coordinate reminders with tea
mbers

Help collect payroll-related updates

Organize payroll questions for leadership or fractional HR

Track recurring payroll deadlines

Final payroll approval will remain with company leadership or authorized U.S.-based payroll personnel.



Invoicing / Collections Admin Support

Help organize invoice status updates

Assist with tracking unpaid invoices

Update invoicing dashboards

Send internal reminders about missing invoice information

Help coordinate between estimators, consultants, bookkeeper, and collections team

Maintain simple A/R tracking reports as needed



Notion / Systems Support

Build and maintain Notion databases

Update task lists, checklists, SOP pages, and dashboards

Organize company documentation

Convert Loom videos into written SOP drafts using AI tools

Keep recurring tasks visible and updated

Help maintain a clean operating system for HR, payroll, invoicing, and admin tasks



Required Skills

Excellent written English

Strong attention to detail

Highly organized and reliable

Experience with Google Sheets and Google Drive

Comfortable using Notion or willing to learn quickly

Able to follow SOPs and checklists

Able to maintain confidentiality

Good communication and follow-up habits

Comfortable working with U.S.-based teams

Able to work independently without constant supervision



Preferred Experience 

3 Years HR admin support - Required

Payroll preparation support

Bamboohr

Gusto or similar payroll platforms

QuickBooks or invoicing systems

Notion

Google Workspace

CRM systems

Environmental, construction, restoration, or service businesses

Collections or A/R tracking

SOP documentation



What Success Looks Like

You will be successful in this role if:

PTO requests are tracked clearly

Payroll prep items are organized before deadlines

Employee documents are not missing or forgotten

Notion dashboards stay updated

Invoicing/admin tasks are followed up on

Leadership receives clear weekly summaries

Tasks do not disappear

The team feels more organized because of your support



Important Notes

This is an admin support role. You will not be expected to make final HR decisions, approve payroll, discipline employees, or handle legal compliance decisions. Your job is to organize, track, remind, document, and support the team.

We are looking for someone who is dependable, steady, honest, and willing to grow with the company.



How to Apply

Please send:

Your resume

A short introduction about your experience

Your hourly rate in USD

Your availability and preferred work schedule

A short Loom video introducing yourself and explaining why you would be a good fit

Examples of any admin, HR, Notion, payroll, or invoicing work you have done

Use the subject line:

HR/Admin VA Application — [Your Name]

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Waiterix | Harmonia Enterprises LLC



About Waiterix



Waiterix is an AI-powered hospitality platform designed to help restaurants operate more efficiently, increase revenue, and deliver better customer experiences. Our solution includes:



•An AI receptionist that answers calls and manages reservations

•An AI waiter integrated into a digital menu for seamless ordering and payment

•A business insights dashboard that enables data-driven decision-making



Waiterix addresses critical operational challenges in the restaurant industry, including missed calls, staff shortages, slow service, and limited visibility into performance. This is a mission-critical solution, not a discretionary tool.



 Role Overview



We are expanding across the United States and are seeking a Sales Development Representative (SDR) based in the Philippines to support our growth.



This is a remote, performance-driven role focused on:



•Cold calling restaurant owners and decision-makers in the U.S.

•Delivering product demonstrations

•Closing new business

•Managing client relationships to ensure retention



You will play a key role in introducing Waiterix to prospective clients and maintaining long-term relationships that generate recurring revenue.



Key Responsibilities



•Conduct outbound cold calls to restaurants across the U.S.

•Engage directly with owners and managers

•Present Waiterix in a clear, concise, and value-driven manner

•Identify operational challenges and position appropriate solutions

•Deliver product demonstrations

•Close new client accounts

•Onboard new customers and ensure successful activation

•Maintain ongoing client relationships to support retention and recurring revenue



 Compensation



•Base Pay: $5 USD per hour

•Commission: 3% recurring monthly commission on each closed and retained client ($3,000 per month)

•Earning Potential: Performance-based, with scalable recurring income tied to client retention



Candidate Profile



We are looking for candidates who demonstrate:



•Strong spoken English with a clear, neutral or American-accented tone

•Confidence in cold calling and sales conversations

•Ability to communicate value clearly and persuasively

•Comfort with technology and ability to learn SaaS products quickly

•Self-motivation and the ability to work independently

•Resilience and professionalism in handling objections





Preferred:



•Prior experience in sales, customer service, or call center environments

•Experience with SaaS or technology products





What You’ll Gain



•Experience in a high-growth AI and SaaS company

•Exposure to the U.S. business and hospitality market

•Opportunity to build recurring commission-based income

•Flexible, remote work environment with autonomy

•Direct contribution to scaling an innovative technology product



Why Join Waiterix



Waiterix is at a critical growth stage, building a global end-to-end AI platform for the hospitality industry. This role offers the opportunity to be part of that expansion while developing valuable skills in technology sales and client management.

title: TikTok Shop Performance Specialist
description:
About the Role



We are not looking for someone to “manage” a TikTok Shop.

We are looking for someone to own it.



This means full responsibility for the performance of multiple TikTok Shop brands, from product visibility to creator output to revenue. If something is not working, don’t wait for instructions. Look into it, figure it out, fix it, and improve it.



You will need to immerse yourself in the TikTok Shop ecosystem (US market), understand how all moving pieces connect (creators, affiliates, ads, listings, campaigns), and continuously push for better results while keeping up with new features and changes.



This is not a maintenance role.

This is a growth and accountability role.

The role is supported by a Catalog section, an Inventory section and Customer messaging section so that you can truly focus on promotional and other tools to scale sales and profit.



?



Important



You are expected to:

* Think in terms of GMV, ROI, and conversion

* Identify problems before they are pointed out

* Act fast when opportunities appear (new features, trends, creators, formats, campaigns, etc.)



TikTok changes constantly; we expect you to adapt quickly, test aggressively, and share learnings with the team.



If you need step-by-step instructions for everything, this is not the role.



?



Key Responsibilities



* Fully own TikTok Shop performance for assigned brands

* Actively manage all in-platform promotional tools (timing, stacking, testing, etc.)

* Define and deploy Affiliate efforts

* Monitor everything that can affect sales velocity (account health, inventory, customer experience, etc.) and coordinate with rest of the team on handling issues

* Track and react to daily sales velocity changes (spikes, drops, anomalies)

* Improve conversion rate at product level (identify weak SKUs and fix positioning, pricing, or offers)

* Test different pricing strategies and discount structures to maximize profitability

* Identify and capitalize on TikTok Shop trends, seasonal opportunities, and campaign windows

* Analyze competitor activity inside TikTok Shop and adjust promotional strategy accordingly

* Work with Ads to amplify winning products and campaigns

* Identify what is working and scale it, cut what is not

* Provide clear weekly and monthly reporting with proactive recommendations





?



Qualifications



* Extreme ownership mindset: you take responsibility, not instructions

* Fast learner who applies knowledge immediately

* Proven experience inside TikTok Shop Seller Center (US REQUIRED)

* Strong understanding of how creators + affiliates + ads work together

* Comfortable working with KPIs (GMV, ROI, CTR, CVR)

* Excellent English communication (internal + client-facing)

* Highly organized and able to manage multiple brands at once



?



Bonus



* Experience with tools like Cruva, Kalodata, or similar

* Background in Amazon or other e-commerce platforms

* Experience scaling TikTok Shop brands past early-stage growth



?



How to Apply (Important – only serious applicants)



Reply with:



1. Your current resume

2. A brief example of a TikTok Shop you directly impacted: what was the problem, what did you do, and what was the result

3. A short paragraph (3–5 sentences) describing a time you identified an opportunity (campaign, creator, listing, or strategy) before being told, and executed on it



?



If you are someone who wants full ownership, moves fast, and enjoys figuring things out rather than waiting to be told what to do; this is the role for you!

title: Marketing Manager
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a creative and organized Marketing Manager to help plan, manage, and grow our marketing efforts. This role is responsible for improving brand awareness, generating leads, managing campaigns, and helping the company attract new customers.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands digital marketing, can manage projects, and is comfortable working across multiple marketing channels.



Responsibilities



- Create and manage marketing campaigns

- Develop strategies to increase brand awareness and customer leads

- Manage social media content and posting schedules

- Help create website content, landing pages, blog posts,
s, and ads

- Plan and manage
 marketing campaigns

- Work on SEO improvements and website traffic growth

- Manage paid advertising campaigns, such as Google Ads, Meta Ads, or other platforms

- Track marketing performance and prepare reports for management

- Research competitors, market trends, and customer needs

- Coordinate with designers, writers, vendors, or internal tea
mbers

- Help improve branding, messaging, and promotional materials

- Identify new marketing opportunities to support company growth



Requirements



- Previous experience in marketing, digital marketing, advertising, or a similar role

- Strong writing and communication skills

- Good understanding of social media,
 marketing, SEO, and paid ads

- Ability to plan campaigns and manage deadlines

- Comfortable using marketing tools, analytics platforms, spreadsheets, and project management software

- Creative mindset with strong attention to detail

- Ability to review results and make improvements based on data

- Strong organization and problem-solving skills

- Ability to work independently and take ownership of marketing projects



Preferred Qualifications



- Experience as a Marketing Manager, Digital Marketing Manager, or similar role

- Experience with Google Ads, Meta Ads, Google Analytics, Search Console, Mailchimp, HubSpot, Canva, WordPress, or similar tools

- Experience in hosting, IT, SaaS, telecom, security, or another service-based business

- Knowledge of lead generation and conversion rate optimization

- Experience managing contractors, freelancers, or agencies

- Basic graphic design, copywriting, or video content experience



Schedule



This is a full-time position with a schedule of 9 AM to 5 PM, Monday to Friday. Some flexibility may be available depending on experience and business needs.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone who can take ownership of our marketing efforts and help grow the business. The right person should be creative, dependable, organized, and able to turn ideas into real campaigns that produce results.



How to Apply



Please send your resume and a short message explaining your marketing experience, the types of campaigns you have managed, and any marketing tools or platforms you have used.

title: Lead Generation Specialist eCommerce Brand Scraping
description:
We are a video ad production agency working with fast-growing ecommerce brands in the health, wellness, beauty and telehealth space. We need a detail-oriented lead generation specialist to build a targeted list of 10,

This is a one-time project with potential for ongoing work if quality is excellent.



WHAT YOU WILL DO

1. Telehealth & Online Health (ED brands, weight loss, hair loss, women's health)

2. Health & Supplements (protein, collagen, gut health, wellness)

3. Beauty & Skincare (DTC skincare, hair care, men's grooming)

4. Functional Food & Beverage (brands like Liquid IV, LMNT, Olipop)



Target countries: United States (70%), United Kingdom (15%), Canada (10%), Australia (5%)



Target revenue: $1M to $50M annual revenue



WHO WE NEED



Decision makers only:

- Founders / Co-Founders

- CEOs

- CMOs

- VP of Marketing

- Head of Marketing / Director of Marketing



NO generic
s 
 
 
s only.



MOST IMPORTANT REQUIREMENT



Every brand must be verified as actively running
 or Instagram ads. You will check this using the
 Ad Library (
/ads/library). If a brand has no active ads they should not be included. This step is non-negotiable and will be spot-checked on delivery.



TOOLS YOU MUST KNOW



- 
 or similar prospecting tool

- 
 or NeverBounce for

-
 Ad Library for ad verification

DELIVERABLE

Minimum 85% valid
 rate on final list.



TIMELINE

HOW TO APPLY

 ads as part of your process?

contacts first for quality review?

IMPORTANT



We will be checking quality carefully on delivery. Contacts that do not match our ICP, have invalid
s or are from brands not running active ads will be rejected. Quality is more important than speed on this project.



Looking forward to working with someone detail-oriented and reliable.

title: AI Content Creator (AI Tools Tutorials)
description:
[IMPORTANT: READ THE ENTIRE JOB POSTING TO BE CONSIDERED]



**About the Role**



We run a separate YouTube channel that teaches how to use AI tools. ChatGPT, Claude, NotebookLM, AI agents, Cursor, video AI, image AI, the new tools as they drop. Tutorials, comparisons, hidden features, tool roundups.



You will not be on camera. You will not record your own voice. The work is faceless and fully remote. One finished video per weekday.



**Daily Work** (about 2 to 3 hours of focused effort)



* Receive a rough script and a reference video from us

* Polish the script so it reads natural, not AI

* Generate the voiceover in ElevenLabs (we provide the account)

* Tune ElevenLabs settings until it sounds like a real person

* Screen record the AI tool demos (open the tool, run the feature, show the output)

* Combine and deliver as raw mp4

* Upload to a shared Google Drive



**What We Need**



* **Genuine AI tool fluency.** You have used ChatGPT and Claude regularly. You can speak intelligently about what each does well.

* **Screen recording comfort** (OBS, ShareX, QuickTime), 1080p clean

* **Strong written English.** The script polish has to sound human.

* **ElevenLabs experience preferred.** Will train if other skills are strong.

* **Curiosity.** You keep up with new AI tools as they drop and have opinions about them.



**What You Don't Need**



Trading knowledge. This role is pure AI content. If you also know trading, applying to one of our other postings is welcome.



**Pay Structure**



* **Trial:** $20 to $30 per video for the first 2 videos. Paid on delivery whether or not we move forward.

* **Full-time:** ?30,000 to ?45,000 per month after the trial passes.

* 30-day raise potential.



**How to Apply (Important: Please Read Carefully)**



Please answer these 5 questions in your reply. **Applications that do not answer all 5 questions will not get a response.**



1. List 5 AI tools you have actually used in the last 30 days. One sentence each on what you used them for.



2. Send a 30 to 60 second ElevenLabs voice sample you have made. Google Drive link.



3. Describe your screen recording setup. Software, resolution, where files go.



4. What is one hidden or underused feature in any AI tool that most users don't know about? Just tell me. No demo needed.



5. What is your target salary in PHP per month, full-time?

title: Short-form video editor for DTC brand
description:
About us

Honeybalm is a fast-growing DTC lip care brand selling internationally. We test and launch a lot of creatives monthly across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, and Snapchat. We're scaling our in-house creative team and looking for editors who live and breathe short-form direct response video.



What you'll do

- Edit short-form ads (15–60 seconds) for Meta, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Cut multiple ad variants from each raw creator package (different hooks, formats, angles)

- Build hook libraries, pattern interrupts, and text overlay systems that scale

- Work directly with our Creative Strategists on briefs and iteration cycles

- Hit deadlines without sacrificing quality, week after week



What we're looking for

- 2+ years editing DTC/e-commerce ads (Meta, TikTok, not corporate, not weddings)

- Portfolio of ads you've made that have run at scale, with brand names you can share

- Fluent in CapCut / Premiere Pro; bonus if you know After Effects

- Obsession with the first 3 seconds (hook); you can explain why a hook works, not just that it does

- Fast turnaround, fast communication

- Strong English (fluent)

- Self-managed, urgent and reliable



IMPORTANT: if all goes well, we will integrate a bonus structure after 3 months of work where you can earn $500 per winning ad that you have edited (+50k in spend). There is no limit on how much bonus you can receive.



How to apply: Send us:

- 3 short-form ads you've edited that have run on Meta or TikTok. Include the brand name and (if you know it) approximate ad spend or performance.

- Your experience explained

- Why you think this is a job that fits you

title: Google Ads Specialist for Shopify E-commerce Brand-DTC- Part Time - Growth Opportunity
description:
Type of Work



Part-Time | Remote | Long-term opportunity



Wage / Salary



US$5.00–US$6.50 per hour

Compensation may be reviewed after 90 days based on performance, reliability, and contribution.



Hours



15–20 hours per week to start

Hours may increase depending on performance and campaign growth.



About Us



Inspired Trading is a growing Caribbean e-commerce brand selling herbal teas, spices, sauces, sweets, and wellness products.



We have had strong success on Amazon and are now expanding our direct-to-consumer sales through Shopify. Our main customers are in the United States and Canada, so we are looking for someone who understands how to market consumer products to North American buyers.



We are not looking for someone to simply “run ads.” We want to build a structured, repeatable Google Ads system that helps us drive quality traffic, improve conversions, reduce wasted spend, and grow profitably.



About the Role



We are looking for a hands-on Google Ads Specialist with strong e-commerce experience to manage and improve Google Ads for our Shopify store.



This is not a one-time gig. This is a part-time, long-term role for someone who can take ownership of campaign performance and help us improve week by week.



You will review our current Google Ads setup, identify what is working, fix what is wasting money, and help us launch better campaigns across:



Google Search

Google Shopping

Performance Max

Google Merchant Center

Experience Required

Minimum 3 years of hands-on Google Ads experience

Shopify / DTC e-commerce experience strongly preferred

Experience marketing to customers in the US and Canada

Experience with food, wellness, beauty, supplements, herbal products, or consumer goods is a plus

Key Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



Reviewing our current Google Ads account and recommending improvements

Planning, building, and optimizing Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns

Conducting keyword research for high-intent buyers

Managing match types, search terms, and negative keywords

Reviewing and improving Google Merchant Center setup

Troubleshooting product feed issues, disapprovals, and tracking problems

Reducing wasted spend and improving traffic quality

Improving CTR, CPC, conversion rate, cost per conversion, and ROAS over time

Reviewing Shopify product pages and landing pages for conversion alignment

Providing weekly reports with clear insights and next steps

Tools / Platforms



Experience with the following is preferred:



Google Ads

Google Merchant Center

Google Shopping Ads

Performance Max

Google Analytics 4

Google Tag Manager

Shopify

Google Search Console

Google Sheets or Excel

Looker Studio

Basic Canva or creative review ability

Meta Ads is a plus, but Google Ads is the main priority

What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



Strategic and hands-on

Data-driven and practical

Strong in campaign structure and keyword strategy

Comfortable working with a modest SME budget

Able to identify wasted spend quickly

Strong in troubleshooting

Clear in written communication

Proactive with recommendations

Reliable, organized, and detail-oriented

Able to work independently without constant supervision

How We Measure Success



Success in this role means:



Campaigns are structured properly

Tracking is accurate

Wasted spend is reduced

Search terms are reviewed regularly

Negative keywords are added consistently

Product campaigns improve over time

Weekly reporting is clear and useful

Shopify sales and conversion performance improve

You bring ideas, not just task updates

This Role Is Not For You If



This role is not a fit if you:



Only know how to boost posts

Only want to set up campaigns and disappear

Need step-by-step instructions every day

Send generic reports with no recommendations

Cannot work with a small but serious business budget



We need someone who can look at a Shopify store, product pages, Google Merchant Center, Google Ads account, and campaign data — then explain what is working, what is wasting money, and what should be tested next.



Weekly Reporting



You will provide a simple weekly report showing:



Campaign actions completed

Budget spent

Sales or conversions generated

CTR, CPC, conversion rate, cost per conversion, and ROAS where applicable

Search term insights

Negative keywords added

Products or campaigns performing well

Products or campaigns wasting spend

Issues found

Recommended actions for the next week



Reports should be clear, practical, and useful — not surface-level.



How to Apply



Please send:



Short introduction about your Google Ads experience

Resume

Examples of Google Ads campaigns you have managed

Experience with Shopify, Google Shopping, Performance Max, and Merchant Center

Google Ads certification, if available

Expected hourly rate within the US$5.00–US$6.50 range

Availability in Jamaica / Eastern Time



Please also answer these questions:



What is your process for launching Google Ads for a new Shopify product with a modest budget?

What are negative keywords, and how do they impact campaign performance?

Tell us about a campaign that was not performing well. What was wrong, what did you change, and what happened?

How do you d
 whether to use Search, Shopping, or Performance Max for an e-commerce product?

How would you review a Shopify product page before sending Google Ads traffic to it?



Please include the word INSPIRED in your subject line.



Generic or AI-generated applications that do not answer the questions directly will not be shortlisted.



Skills Required



Google Ads | Google Merchant Center | Google Shopping Ads | Performance Max | GA4 | Google Tag Manager | Shopify | Keyword Research | Negative Keywords | Campaign Optimization | E-commerce Marketing | Conversion Tracking | Reporting | Google Sheets | SEO Awareness

title: Software Developer – BMS Migration (VB.NET ? C# / WPF / SQL)

 (existing system)

title: Operations Admin
description:
The Role

We're hiring an Operations Administrator who will be the connective tissue of our business — keeping day-to-day operations running smoothly while directly supporting the CEO on executive and administrative matters.

This is a high-trust, high-visibility role for someone who thrives in a fast-moving environment, takes ownership

without being asked, and genuinely cares about the details.



You'll report to the Operations Manager and work hand-in-hand with the CEO on priority projects,

communications, and business-critical tasks. The right person is organized, proactive, and equally

title: **Virtual Assistant for Funnel Buildout, Landing Pages, and Email Automation**
description:
Hello,



I am a U.S.-based construction operations consultant building a lead-generation funnel for my consulting business. I am looking for a Filipino VA who is reliable, detail-oriented, honest about their skill level, and capable of building simple web funnels cleanly from written instructions.



This role is focused more heavily on **funnels and backend setup** than on general VA work.



I do **not** need a generic social media VA.

I do **not** need someone who overstates their abilities.

I need someone who can build, format, connect, test, and follow instructions carefully.



### Main work in this role



* Build simple landing pages and opt-in pages

* Set up
 forms and basic automations

* Connect landing pages to
 lists and delivery
s

* Format lead magnets and PDFs in Canva

* Upload and organize files and digital assets

* Test funnels from start to finish to make sure they work properly

* Make small revisions cleanly and accurately

* Follow written instructions exactly and ask questions when something is unclear



### Tools you may use



* MailerLite

* Canva

* Carrd or similar landing page builder

* WordPress or simple page builders

* Google Docs / Google Drive

* ChatGPT content and instructions provided by me



### What I am looking for



* Strong attention to detail

* Ability to follow step-by-step instructions closely

* Experience with landing pages, opt-in forms, or
 automations

* Good written English

* Organized and dependable work habits

* Honest communication

* Ability to test your own work before sending it back

* Willingness to say clearly what you know and what you do not know



### Important



Please do not apply if you exaggerate your experience.



I do not need someone who sends generic AI work without reviewing it carefully.

I do not need someone who is mainly a graphic designer but cannot connect the funnel.

I do not need someone who is mainly a marketer but cannot execute the build cleanly.



I need someone who can help build simple, functional, professional funnel assets and backend workflows with low confusion and careful execution.



### Strong fit for this role



You are likely a strong fit if you have real experience with:



* opt-in pages

* landing page builders

* form setup

*
 list setup

* delivery
s

* follow-up automations

* Canva lead magnets

* light website or funnel editing



### Nice to have



* MailerLite experience

* Carrd experience

* WordPress page-builder experience

* Simple funnel or lead-gen setup experience

* Experience working from detailed client instructions without drifting off brief



### Hours



Part-time to start, with room to grow if it is a strong fit.



### Pay



$3–$4 per hour, depending on experience, speed, and accuracy.



### To apply



Please answer all of the following clearly:



1. What experience do you have with MailerLite, Canva, landing pages, or similar tools?

2. Have you personally built a simple opt-in page and connected it to an
 list or automation before?

3. What is your hourly rate within the $3–$4 range?

4. What is your internet speed and computer setup?

5. What hours are you usually available?

6. Please describe the most similar work you have done.

7. Which parts of this role are you strongest in, and which parts would be newer for you?

8. Are you comfortable following detailed written instructions exactly and using provided copy without changing strategy unless asked?

9. Are you open to a small paid test task if I d
 to move forward?



### Required sample submission



To be considered, please also send:



* 1 direct sample link to a landing page or opt-in page you personally built

* 1 direct sample link to a Canva PDF, lead magnet, or similar formatted asset

* a short note explaining exactly what part of each sample you personally built



Applications with vague experience summaries and no real examples will not be considered.



### Important application instruction



Please begin your application with the words: **Ready to build funnels cleanly**



That helps me know you read the full post carefully.



Thank you.

title: A.I. Video Operator Replication + Editor
description:
We are hiring an AI video operator to create short-form videos (15–45 seconds) by replicating existing high-performing content.



You will be given:



Reference videos

Scripts

Access to AI tools



Your job is to recreate the same video using a different avatar/subject and deliver a fully finished video ready to post.



This is a system-based role. You will be trained on our exact workflow and are expected to follow it precisely.

What You’ll Do

Watch a reference video and break it into scenes

Recreate each scene using AI (image/video generation)

Use prompting to generate realistic visuals

Animate scenes (Veo, Kling, or similar tools)

Add voice (ElevenLabs or similar)

Edit everything together into a final video (cuts, pacing, timing)

Deliver a complete, polished video



Requirements

Experience with AI tools (video, image generation, or voice tools)

Basic understanding of prompting (how to generate consistent visuals)

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, etc.)

Ability to follow instructions EXACTLY

Strong attention to detail (framing, lighting, realism)

Comfortable with repetitive, system-based work

Reliable and available to work daily

Good English communication

IMPORTANT



This is not a creative role.



You must be able to:



Look at a video

Replicate the same structure, pacing, and style

Execute consistently using a defined system



Please list experience with ai tools to create videos as well as with video editing. Please include screenshots of proof of you using the tools as well as video examples using ai to create fully made ai videos.



If you cannot follow a structured process, do not apply.

title: CapCut Editor Wanted: 30+ Social Media Videos/Week
description:
I am looking for a reliable, fast-paced video editor to join my content team. I produce high-volume educational and lifestyle content (30+ videos per week) and need someone who can take raw "talking head" footage and turn it into polished, engaging TikToks/Reels.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Editing: Professional cutting, pacing, and captions for 60-second clips.



Branding: Following briefs for 3+ different brands.



Workflow: Checking branding guide/briefs, finding raw video in CapCut space, editing, and moving it into a "completed" folder on CapCut space.



Collaboration: Working within CapCut Shared Spaces (requires a stable connection/VPN) and communicating via messages or Slack.



Requirements:



Expertise in CapCut (Desktop preferred).



Ability to handle high volume without losing attention to detail. This is a scaled opportunity: I am actively growing. As I scale, there is a significant opportunity for increased hours and higher responsibility for a reliable editor who proves they can handle the current volume.



??REGIONAL ACCESS & VPN: We utilize CapCut Shared Spaces (US-Region) for all project collaboration. Due to CapCut’s current regional security locks, you MUST have a high-speed, reliable VPN set to a USA server to access our workspace, sync project files, and use our specific brand assets.



Note: If you cannot operate via a US-based VPN, the collaboration links will show as "Expired," and you will not be able to access the footage. Please only apply if you are comfortable with this technical setup and have a stable enough internet connection to upload/download video files while the VPN is active.



Reliable internet for uploading/downloading large video files.



HOW TO APPLY:



The Keyword: To show me you have read this entire posting, please start your application with the word "ELLIE" in all caps.



Portfolio: Provide a link to your best social media or "talking head" edits.



VPN Confirmation: Confirm you have a VPN and are comfortable using it for this role.



Turnaround Time: Roughly how long does it take you to edit a 60-second talking head clip with captions?

-----



## About 62 Digital



62 Digital is a U.S.-headquartered digital agency specializing in web development, application engineering, and full-service marketing. Our team is distributed by design — we bring together skilled professionals from the U.S., the Philippines, and Latin America to deliver exceptional work for real clients across industries.



This isn’t freelancing. This isn’t contract work. When you join 62 Digital, you become a core part of a team that collaborates daily, ships meaningful projects, and grows together.



-----



## About the Role



We’re hiring a **Lead Concierge Specialist / Business Development Representative (LCS/BDR)** to engage and convert inbound leads for our health and wellness clients.



Our clients run paid advertising campaigns on platforms like
 and Google, and prospects opt in to claim a specific offer. Your job is to be the friendly, professional voice on the other end — following up quickly, building trust, answering questions, and booking those leads directly onto the clinic’s calendar.



This is a fast-paced, conversation-driven role where speed, consistency, and follow-through are everything.



-----



## What You’ll Do



- Respond to inbound leads from paid advertising campaigns 
 Lead Ads, Google Lead Ads, and similar) as quickly as possible

- Follow up with prospects via **phone calls and SMS** until contact is made or the lead is fully worked

- Qualify leads against the specific offer they claimed and confidently answer their questions

- **Book qualified appointments directly onto each clinic’s calendar**

- Manage all activity inside our white-labeled **HighLevel (GoHighLevel) CRM**

- Maintain organized notes and a consistent communication cadence across multiple client pipelines simultaneously



-----



## What We’re Looking For



- **At least 2 years of experience** in appointment setting, business development, inside sales, lead conversion, or a similar phone-based role

- **Fluent English** — you must speak, read, and write at a professional level. You’ll be on calls and texting U.S.-based prospects every day

- **Strong multitasking ability** — you can comfortably juggle multiple conversations, clients, and pipelines at once

- **Calm under pressure** — high-volume days don’t rattle you. You stay organized, focused, and on-task

- **Health and wellness industry experience is a major plus** (med spas, chiropractic, weight loss, hormone clinics, dental, aesthetics, etc.)

- **HighLevel (GoHighLevel) experience is a plus**

- A **long-term mindset** — we’re building a team, not filling a temporary seat



-----



## Schedule & Work Setup



- **Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM Central Time (US)** — this is a night shift in the Philippines

- No weekend work currently required

- 100% remote



-----



## What You’ll Need



- A reliable working computer

- A working cell phone

- A stable, high-speed internet connection *(in some cases, 62 Digital will contribute toward internet costs)*

- A quiet workspace suitable for taking calls



-----



## Compensation & Benefits



- **Starting pay:** ?40,000 PHP per month, with the opportunity for more based on experience

- **Performance bonuses** throughout the year

- **Paid Sick Leave** — eligible after 90 days

- **Paid Vacation** — eligible after 90 days

- **Half-Day Fridays** — every other week, workload permitting

- **Reliable, on-time pay** — direct deposit to your Philippines bank account, every pay period, no exceptions



-----



## Why 62 Digital



We don’t outsource — we build teams. Every person we hire is a valued member of our organization, not a line item on a cost sheet.



- **Work From Anywhere** — fully remote team, by design

- **Long-Term Roles** — we hire for the long run, not short-term gigs

- **Competitive, Region-Benchmarked Pay** — we pay fairly because we value your contribution

- **Direct Collaboration** — you’ll work directly with leadership and clients, not through layers of middlemen



We’re looking for someone who wants stability, growth, and a team that values them — not their next short gig.



-----



## How to Apply



Apply **only through our OnlineJobs.ph posting**. Applications submitted through other channels will not be reviewed.



We look forward to meeting you.

title: Social Media Strategist — Power Cleaning Company
description:
We're a growing power cleaning and interior cleaning company in Northeast Ohio serving residential and commercial clients. We do exterior work (house washing, roof cleaning, driveways, concrete, pavers, decks, fences, gutters, windows, stain removal) AND interior work (carpet cleaning, tile & grout, upholstery, commercial cleaning). We also offer holiday lighting and maintenance plans.

Our work is visual, satisfying, and perfect for social media. We already have a tea
mber who can schedule posts and follow directions. What we need is the STRATEGIST — someone who thinks bigger, builds a real growth plan, and turns followers into paying customers.

WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Create a monthly social media strategy across
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

Develop content calendars covering ALL our services — exterior, interior, commercial, maintenance, and seasonal (holiday lighting)

Create finished content from raw photos and video we send you — edit clips into reels, shorts, TikToks, design graphics, add text, music, and captions. We film on the job site, you turn it into scroll-stopping content.

If you have your own team (video editors, designers), you're welcome to delegate production — as long as quality and deadlines are met

Write captions, hashtags, and calls-to-action that convert

Run small paid ad campaigns ($
/mo budget to start) with local targeting

Track performance weekly and adjust strategy based on results

Help us grow our interior/commercial cleaning division — targeting small and medium businesses (offices, medical practices, restaurants, retail, gyms, churches, daycares)

Coach our team on what to film during jobs (angles, lighting, timing)

Engage with local community and business groups on
 for organic leads

Promote seasonal services (holiday lighting Q4, spring exterior cleaning, etc.)



WHAT YOU WON'T DO:



No filming — we send you the raw footage, you create the content

No phone calls or customer service

No SEO or Google Business Profile work (separate team handles that)



MUST-HAVES:



Proven experience growing social media accounts for a service business, home improvement, or cleaning company — show us the accounts you've grown with actual results

Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, DaVinci, or similar) OR your own team you can delegate editing to

Can create a strategy document, not just post content — you think in campaigns, audience segments, and funnels

Experience running
/Instagram ads on a small budget with measurable results

Strong conversational English — captions and comments need to sound natural and relatable to American homeowners and business owners, not translated or robotic

Understanding of US culture and consumer behavior — you know what resonates with Americans on social media (humor, local pride, seasonal trends, neighborhood culture)

Experience marketing to BOTH residential consumers AND commercial clients

Self-starter who brings ideas without being asked

Available during US Eastern business hours for overlap



NICE-TO-HAVES:



Experience with pressure washing, cleaning, janitorial, landscaping, or similar businesses

Experience marketing commercial cleaning or facility services to business owners

Canva skills

Experience with scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Hootsuite)

Local/community marketing experience 
 groups, Nextdoor, local business networks)



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:

Month 1: Audit our social presence, deliver a 90-day strategy, set up content calendar, start posting 4-5x/week.

Month 3: Measurable follower growth. 2-3 inbound leads/month from social. Paid campaigns running. Commercial content generating interest.

Month 6: Social media is a reliable lead source for both residential and commercial. We're the cleaning company people think of in our area.

HOW TO APPLY:



Brief intro — who you are and why you're a fit

Links to 2-3 social media accounts you've personally managed and grown (with results)

One example of a content strategy or campaign you planned and executed

Your availability and hourly rate



BONUS: Send a 3-minute Loom video walking through an account you've grown.

Do NOT send a generic application. We want to see your work. If you've grown a service business on social media before, tell us that story.

WHY THIS ROLE IS GREAT:



Power cleaning content goes VIRAL — satisfying transformations, before/afters, oddly satisfying cleaning videos

Multiple service lines means fresh content always available

Creative freedom to build from the ground up

Small team, direct access to the owner

Potential to grow into more hours and higher pay as results come in

We already have someone to execute your plans — you focus on strategy

title: U.S. Residential Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Legal Assistant
description:
Job Title: U.S. Residential Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Legal Assistant



Schedule: Full-time or near full-time



Time Zone: Must be able to overlap with U.S. Central Time



Compensation: Based on experience.



Initial trial period: 60 days at $6/hour. 

Compensation may be reviewed after the trial period based on performance, reliability, experience, and fit.



About the Role:

We are a U.S.-based real estate law firm looking for a detail-oriented, organized, and proactive Residential Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Legal Assistant.



This is not a general virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who has experience supporting U.S. residential real estate transactions, ideally from contract to closing.



You will help keep real estate files moving, organized, and properly documented so the attorney can focus on legal review, client strategy, and issue resolution.



Main Responsibilities: 

- Open and set up new real estate matters

- Review contracts and
s to identify key transaction details

- Enter and update client, agent, lender, attorney, and title company contact information

- Track key dates, deadlines, and missing information

- Coordinate with real estate agents, lenders, title companies, opposing counsel, and clients

- Prepare standard documents and
s using templates

- Organize
s, documents, and matter files

- Follow up on missing information or pending items

- Prepare files for attorney review

- Flag unusual, unclear, urgent, or non-standard issues for the attorney

- Support closing preparation and post-closing follow-up

- Maintain task lists and update matter status clearly



Experience We Are Looking For



Strong candidates will have experience with some of the following:

- U.S. residential real estate transactions

- Contract-to-closing coordination

- Buyer-side and/or seller-side transaction support

- Real estate law firm support

- Real estate transaction coordination

- Title company, escrow, mortgage, or brokerage transaction support

- Attorney review process

- Inspection deadlines

- Lender coordination

- Title coordination

- HOA or condo document requests

- Closing preparation

- Closing statements or settlement statements

- Real estate document organization



Experience with Illinois residential real estate transactions is a plus, but not required.



Tools and Systems



Experience with these tools is helpful, but not required:

- Microsoft Outlook

- Microsoft Teams

- Microsoft To Do

- Microsoft SharePoint or OneDrive

- Smokeball, Clio, Odoo, or similar practice management systems

- Adobe Acrobat

- E-signature platforms

- Real estate transaction management systems



You do not need to know every system before starting, but you must be comfortable learning new tools and following detailed SOPs.



This Role Is a Good Fit If You Are: 

- Able to think in context, not just complete isolated tasks

- Very organized

- Detail-oriented

- Careful with deadlines

- Comfortable following written instructions and SOPs

- Able to communicate clearly in writing

- Proactive about asking good questions

- Able to notice when something needs attorney review

- Comfortable working with many
s, documents, deadlines, and exceptions

- Reliable, consistent, and accountable

- Calm under pressure

- Interested in long-term work with a small professional team

- Impeccable written and spoken English



This Role Is Not a Good Fit If:

- You treat each instruction as a separate task without considering the full status of the matter

- You only have general admin or data entry experience

- You have never worked with U.S. real estate transactions

- Your legal experience is mainly with local court filings, municipal courts, litigation, criminal matters, family law, immigration, or court-based legal work outside the U.S.

- You have general legal experience but no direct experience with U.S. residential real estate transactions

- Your real estate experience is limited to property research, data entry, lead generation, cold calling, or CRM updates

- You need constant reminders about what to do next

- You are uncomfortable reading contracts,
s, and transaction documents

- You are not detail-oriented

- You do not like documenting your work clearly

- You struggle to follow multi-step processes

- You prefer simple repetitive tasks with no judgment involved



Important Expectation:



This role requires initiative, context, and judgment.



The best real estate transaction coordinators do not treat each instruction as an isolated task. They constantly ask: What is the status of this matter, what has already happened, and what needs to happen next without creating confusion, duplication, or risk?



For example, before sending a document, a strong coordinator should think through whether the document is complete, whether it is the correct version, who needs to receive it, whether it has already been sent, whether it is meant for internal or external use, and whether sending it could create a deadline, legal issue, duplicate file, or client confusion.



You will not be expected to provide legal advice. However, you will be expected to understand the context of the matter, notice when something is missing, unusual, unclear, urgent, or outside the normal process, and flag those items for attorney review.



For example, a strong tea
mber should be able to notice when:



- The contract is missing the buyer’s attorney information

- The inspection deadline appears to be tomorrow

- The title company contact is not listed

- The client’s phone number is missing

- A transaction appears to involve a condo or HOA

- An issue should be flagged for attorney review



How to Apply: 



Please send your resume, a link to your OnlineJobs.ph profile, and a cover letter answering the questions below to 
 A short summary of your experience with U.S. residential real estate transactions

- Have you supported buyer-side transactions, seller-side transactions, both?

- Describe one U.S. residential real estate transaction you personally supported from contract to closing

- What stages did you handle?

- Who did you coordinate with?

- What documents or deadlines were involved?

- What were you personally responsible for?

- What real estate, legal, title, mortgage, or transaction management tools have you used?

- What is your availability in U.S. Central Time?

- What is your expected hourly rate or monthly salary?



To show that you read the full job post carefully and can follow written instructions, please include the words "red jellyfish" in the subject line of your
.



Applications that do not answer these questions or do not follow the application instructions may not be reviewed.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Company Overview

Join our SaaS Customer Engagement Platform company as a Remote DevOps Engineer. We are looking for a highly motivated, self-starting candidate who is ready to take ownership of our infrastructure and security compliance initiatives.



Role Description

As a DevOps Engineer, you'll own the full lifecycle of our cloud infrastructure and deployment systems. You'll build CI/CD pipelines, manage Azure resources, drive security certification initiatives, and work with our team to optimize costs. We're looking for someone with genuine drive and curiosity who digs into problems, learns quickly, and keeps pushing forward. You don't need to know everything on day one, but you need the hunger to master it.



Key Responsibilities



Infrastructure & Deployment

- Architect, develop, deploy, and evolve CI/CD systems for our cloud applications

- Write application deployment automation using industry-standard tools like Jenkins

- Deploy and manage Azure services including App Services, SQL Database, and Virtual Machines

- Monitor system performance and respond to monitoring alerts

- Provide systems support and perform emergency deployments outside standard hours when needed



Security Certifications & Compliance

- Lead the initiative to achieve and maintain key security certifications including ISO 27001 and FedRAMP

- Develop a strategic roadmap for pursuing multiple certifications, identifying overlaps and dependencies

- Execute certification initiatives incrementally, building knowledge and compliance over time

- Write comprehensive documentation for security certification applications and audits

- Implement and maintain security best practices across infrastructure



Data & Database Management

- Demonstrate strong understanding of database systems including MongoDB and SQL databases

- Implement and manage backup strategies and disaster recovery procedures

- Apply security best practices in data storage, access, and management



Cost Optimization

- Identify and recommend Azure cost-saving opportunities and optimization techniques

- Collaborate with development teams to determine cost-efficient architectural solutions

- Provide guidance on resource utilization and cloud spending optimization



User & System Administration

- Manage Active Directory administration including adding users, setting up new employees and contractors

- Provide configuration support and troubleshooting for employees and contractors as needed



What We're Looking For

- Genuine drive to learn and take on complex challenges

- Self-directed problem solver who stays engaged with difficult problems

- Strong communication and documentation skills

- Ability to work independently

- Willingness to respond to emergencies outside standard hours



Foundational Experience (You'll grow from here)

- Hands-on experience with CI/CD concepts and tools like Jenkins, Azure DevOps, or GitHub Actions

- Working knowledge of Azure cloud platform

- Understanding of GitHub for version control and collaboration

- Experience with monitoring and observability tools (Pingdom, DataDog, New Relic, or similar)

- Basic familiarity with databases and scripting/automation concepts

- Willingness to perform deployment tasks during off-hours in emergency situations



 Required for Application

- Provide a link to your resume/CV

- Include a cover letter with a brief summary of your relevant experience and why you are interested in this position

- Use the subject line: 'DevOps - [Your Name]'

title: video editor for social media posts - (seeking a superstar in organic reach)
description:

You would be given access to our photo and video files of work we are doing and create an entertaining video, with catchy thumbnail and intro, these videos will be between 10 and 30 seconds, your KPI will be organic reach across the platforms we use (insta, tiktok, reels, linkedin, YT) - we use metricool for cross posting and scheduled posting and you would be required to create enough for 2 per day - with captions.  the requirement is that you are always posting 2 weeks ahead, so you could do this at any time that suits you. - full details will be provided

3) references will be asked for and checked of projects you have worked on and achieved success with on organic reach, - so if we proceed with your application and you are willing we would ask your permission to directly contact and seek references from companies you have created videos for, if you are not comfortable with this, please do not apply





Please note, the hourly pay is a guideline, this will be a per video payment.



The KPI is organic reach and you will receive bonuses for increasing our reach and impact

suitable candidates will be asked to attend a video meeting.







Thanks so much for reading!

title: Autodesk Inventor Modeller / Drafter – Steel Fabrication
description:
Overview



We are an Australian engineering and fabrication company looking for a skilled Autodesk Inventor Modeller / Drafter to support production drawings and 3D modelling.



This is a production-focused role, not a design role. You will work from instructions, markups, and existing standards to produce accurate and consistent outputs.



You will follow strict templates, naming conventions, and workflows.



Responsibilities

Create 3D models and drawings using Autodesk Inventor

Produce fabrication drawings for:

         Plate work

         Structural steel components

Generate and manage:

         2D drawings

         DXF files

         BOM information

Update and modify existing models and drawings

Follow company standards for:

         File naming

         Drawing layouts

         Revision control

Work from:

         Markups

         Sketches

         Written instructions

Ensure drawings are accurate and complete before submission



Requirements (non-negotiable):

Proven experience using Autodesk Inventor

Experience with fabrication drawings (steel, plate, or similar)

Experience with sheet metal and flat patterns

Strong attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions exactly

Good understanding of:

         Dimensions

         Tolerances

         Drawing standards

Reliable internet and power backup



Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience working with Australian companies

Basic understanding of workshop fabrication processes



Software Requirement:

All work must be completed using properly licensed software.

A licensed version of Autodesk Inventor can be provided if required.



How to Apply

To apply, please include:

A short introduction (max 5 sentences)

Screenshots or samples of drawings/models you have created in Autodesk Inventor (including sheet metal / flat pattern examples)

Include the word “PRECISION” in the first line of your application

Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a paid test task.

Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Trial Task (Paid)

Shortlisted candidates will be given a small paid task to assess:

Modelling accuracy

Drawing quality

Attention to detail



Salary:

AUD $1,200 – $2,000 per month (depending on experience and performance)

Salary will be reviewed after 3 months based on performance.



Working Hours:

40 hours per week (full-time)

Must be available for at least 4 hours overlap with Australian business hours (Sydney time).



Growth Opportunity:

There is a clear pathway to grow into a Senior Drafter role based on proven performance, reliability, and consistency.

title: Full Time Cold Calling and Appointment Setting VA (US Clients, CRM Updates, Daily Reporting)
description:
Dominari Solutions is hiring a full time Virtual Assistant focused on outbound calling, follow up, appointment setting, and clean CRM updates for US based clients. This is a phone heavy role. If you do not enjoy talking on the phone, or you are not comfortable handling objections and rejection, please do not apply.



This position follows US business hours, which means you will be working night shift in Philippine time. You must be reliable, consistent, and able to show up on time daily.



Work Schedule



Full time, 40 hours per week.

Night shift in PH time to align with US business hours.

Exact hours will be assigned based on the client’s time zone and campaign.



Pay and Growth



Starting pay is $5.00 per hour, paid weekly.

Pay can increase over time based on reliability, skill, results, and overall performance. Strong performers get priority for raises and better client accounts.



What You Will Do



• Make outbound calls to leads using the client’s dialer or calling system

• Follow scripts and training, then improve delivery over time with coaching

• Handle objections professionally and keep control of the conversation

• Qualify leads and set appointments when the lead is a good fit

• Log call outcomes correctly in the CRM, including notes, tags, dispositions, and follow up tasks

• Complete daily follow ups consistently and on time

• Submit a daily end of shift report in Slack with your numbers and key notes

• Communicate clearly if you have questions, issues, or blockers



What We Track



• Dials completed

• Conversations

• Qualified leads

• Appointments booked

• Follow ups completed

• CRM accuracy and completeness

• Daily report quality and consistency

• Reliability and attendance



Requirements (Read Carefully)



Clear, neutral English is required.

You must be easy to understand for US prospects on the phone.

Please do not apply if you have a heavy accent that makes it difficult for US leads to understand you.



You must be comfortable speaking on the phone for most of your shift.

Please do not apply if you dislike phone work.



You must have the following:

• Strong and stable internet connection

• Quiet workspace with minimal background noise

• Laptop or PC from 2023 or newer

• Noise cancelling headset with a good microphone

• Ability to work night shift PH time consistently



Nice to Have



• Cold calling or appointment setting experience

• Experience with CRMs such as Podio, GoHighLevel, Follow Up Boss, or similar

• Real estate, home services, or sales support experience



Important, Read the Entire Job Description



Applications are reviewed based on attention to detail. If you did not read the full post, you will not be considered.



To apply, complete this application form:





To confirm you read the entire job description, start your message with the word: DOMINARI

If you do not include DOMINARI, your application will be skipped.
