title: Senior Short-Form Video Editor Personal Brand (Full-time, Remote)
description:
Senior Short-Form Video Editor

- Compensation: USD $1,500 to $3,000 per month based on portfolio and experience (approx ?85,000 to ?170,000 PHP per month).

- Type: Full-Time · Remote · Creative



Apply at: 
/senior-video-editor



The role in one line: Edit daily Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts for an 8-figure ecommerce founder building a personal brand for ecom operators and founders.



About this opportunity

I'm an Australian founder based in Dubai. I run a portfolio of DTC brands (multi 8-figure flagship plus several others in supplements, AI software, and home tech) and I'm building a personal brand on Instagram aimed at 7 to 9-figure ecommerce founders.



I post daily. The content is a mix of talking-head insights, behind-the-scenes from the business, lifestyle b-roll, and breakdowns of what's actually working in our brands. Think Alex Hormozi's pacing meets Sahil Bloom's polish.



I'm hiring one senior editor to own the daily output. You'll work directly with me, no middle layer.



What you'll do

- Edit 1 to 2 short-form videos per day (Reels and Shorts, 30 to 90 seconds)

- Pull the strongest hooks from raw footage I send via 

- Add dynamic captions, b-roll, sound design, subtle motion, and zooms

- Pitch concepts and hook ideas, not just execute briefs

- Research trends and competitor content (Hormozi, Bloom, Sanchez, Bartlett, Priestley, ecom founders) and bring formats worth testing

- Build and maintain templates so quality stays consistent as volume scales

- Use AI tools as part of the workflow (Higgsfield, Captions, ElevenLabs, Descript, Opus Clip, etc.)





Who you are

- 3+ years editing short-form vertical content, ideally for founders, creators, or coaches

- Portfolio with at least 5 reels you've edited end-to-end (please link, no portfolio means no review)

- Premiere Pro or CapCut Pro fluent. After Effects a plus

- Strong sense of pacing, hook structure, and what holds attention in the first 3 seconds

- Good written and spoken English (this is a daily-collaboration role, not file delivery)

- Comfortable with feedback loops and fast iteration

- Genuinely interested in business, ecommerce, or founder content. You'll edit 200+ videos a year on this topic, you should care about it





Bonus points

- Motion design or animation skills

- Have edited for a creator with 100k+ followers





Logistics

- Full-time, remote, 40 hours per week

- Some overlap with Dubai hours (UTC+4) preferred, full overlap not required

- Reporting directly to me, working alongside our existing creative team

- Long-term role with growth path into Lead Editor or Head of Content as we scale



How to apply

Fill out the form: --> 
 



Include a link to your portfolio (at least 5 reels you've edited end-to-end). No portfolio means no review.

title: Staff Accountant
description:
We're looking for a capable, self-driven **Staff Accountant** to own a broad scope of accounting responsibilities inside a fast-moving AI-native healthcare platform. Accounts payable is the core function, but this is a full-cycle role. You will own AP end to end, maintain the general ledger, prepare work papers for key balance sheet accounts, and support month-end close.



You are stepping into an environment where documented processes are limited. A big part of your early impact will be building SOPs from scratch, creating structure where there is none, and setting up systems that make the finance function proactive rather than reactive. If you naturally spot inefficiencies and build fixes without being asked, this role is built for you.



## Why You'll Want to Join



- You will be paid in **USD** (bi-monthly: every 15th and 30th)

- **Paid Time Off** in accordance with company policy

- Observance of **Holidays** per company guidelines

- **100% remote setup** so you can work wherever you're most productive

- Direct ownership over the AP and accounting function inside an early-stage AI healthcare company

- High-visibility role where your systems and processes will shape how the finance function scales



## What You'll Work On



**Accounts Payable — Full Ownership**



- Own the complete AP cycle including invoice receipt, GL coding, approval routing, and payment execution

- Ensure all vendor bills, subscriptions, and recurring obligations are paid accurately and on schedule with no surprises

- Build and maintain a proactive payment processing cycle

- Manage vendor records including W-9s, banking details, and fully executed contracts

- Own the Ramp platform for corporate card management, expense categorization, reimbursements, and reconciliation

- Identify and resolve invoice discrepancies, duplicate payments, and vendor disputes independently or escalate with context



**General Ledger and Month-End Close**



- Prepare and post journal entries for accruals, prepayments, reclassifications, and adjustments

- Own reconciliations and work papers for cash, accounts payable, fixed assets, prepaids, and other assigned balance sheet accounts

- Support the monthly close process, ensure the AP sub-ledger ties to the GL, flag variances, and provide clear commentary on large fluxes

- Assist in preparing financial schedules, flux analysis, and ad hoc reports for leadership



**Process Building and Systems**



- Write and maintain SOPs for all AP and accounting processes, building a documented and repeatable system from the ground up

- Proactively identify workflow gaps and implement improvements that reduce manual and reactive work

- Build and maintain dashboards and work papers for vendor tracking, expense analysis, and close reporting

- Collaborate with the finance team to improve internal controls and financial hygiene as the company scales



## What You Bring



- Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a closely related field

- 3 to 5 years of hands-on experience in a staff accountant or full-cycle accounting role

- Solid understanding of GAAP including journal entries, accruals, reconciliations, and the full accounting cycle

- Advanced Excel proficiency including pivot tables, VLOOKUP and XLOOKUP, SUMIFS, and the ability to build clean organized work papers independently

- Experience with expense management or AP platforms such as Ramp, 
, Concur, or similar

- Strong written communication: clear, professional documentation and SOPs that require no follow-up to understand

- Ownership mindset: things do not fall through the cracks on your watch

- Systems thinker: when something breaks twice you build a process so it does not happen a third time

- Self-starter: you find the problem, flag it, and fix it without waiting to be told



## Nice to Have



- Experience with accounting software such as QuickBooks, Sage, NetSuite, or Xero

- Exposure to month-end close including journal entries, cash reconciliation, and balance sheet account work

- Experience in a high-growth startup or fast-paced environment

- Background in healthcare, healthtech, or a regulated industry



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your **updated resume**

2. A **short Loom video (1 to 2 minutes)** describing your accounting background, walking through an AP or close process you owned, and sharing an example of a workflow or SOP you built from scratch



**Only candidates who submit a Loom video will be moved to the next step of the hiring process.**



If you are a self-driven accountant who takes ownership seriously, builds systems that outlast your direct involvement, and wants to shape the finance function inside a company doing meaningful work in healthcare, this role gives you the scope and the visibility to do your best work.

title: AI Content Creator
description:
[IMPORTANT: READ THE ENTIRE JOB POSTING TO BE CONSIDERED]



**About the Role**



We run a YouTube channel that teaches how to use AI tools for crypto trading. We're hiring ONE full-time content creator to own the daily video production pipeline.



You will not be on camera. You will not record your own voice. The work is faceless and fully remote. One finished video delivered per weekday.



**Daily Work** (about 2 to 3 hours of focused effort, the rest of your full-time hours go into research, revisions, and scaling)



* Receive a rough script and a reference video from us

* Polish the script so it reads natural, not AI

* Generate the voiceover in ElevenLabs (we provide the account)

* Tune ElevenLabs settings until the voice sounds like a real person, not a robot

* Screen record the visual component (TradingView charts, exchange platforms, trading tool demos)

* Combine the screen rec with the voiceover and deliver as a raw mp4

* Upload everything to a shared Google Drive



**What You Need to Be Good At**



* **Strong written English.** Your script polish has to read like a real person talking.

* **A sharp ear.** You will judge whether ElevenLabs output sounds robotic and tune it until it doesn't.

* **Crypto trading literacy.** You should understand support and resistance, breakouts, common indicators, exchange platforms, and trading terminology. You don't need to be a profitable trader. You do need to know what you're looking at.

* **Screen recording skills.** OBS, ShareX, or QuickTime. Clean, 1080p minimum.

* **AI tool comfort.** You have used ChatGPT or Claude regularly. You understand what they can and can't do.



**Pay Structure**



* **Trial:** $20 to $30 per finished video for the first 2 videos. Paid on delivery whether or not we move forward.

* **Full-time after the trial passes:** ?35,000 to ?50,000 per month.

* 30-day performance review with raise potential to ~?80,000 per month for strong performance.



**How to Apply (Important: Please Read Carefully)**



Please answer these 5 questions in your reply. **Applications that do not answer all 5 questions will not get a response.**



1. Send me a 30 to 60 second voice sample you have made in ElevenLabs. Upload to Google Drive and share the link. If you have never used ElevenLabs, say so directly.



2. What is the AI tool you actually use weekly, and what for? One specific sentence. Not "ChatGPT for productivity."



3. Describe your screen recording setup in one paragraph. Software, resolution, where files go.



4. On a scale of 1 to 10, how comfortable are you with crypto trading concepts? Be honest. A 6 is fine.



5. What is your target salary in PHP per month, full-time?

David Josh

title: Data Annotator / Labeler
description:
About Us:

We're a US startup building intelligence solutions to revolutionize how contractors design and build in the 21st century. As our work is growing in adoption across North America and Europe, we're currently looking for a Data Annotator to join our expanding remote team. This is a 40 hours/week contractor role with long-term potential for direct full-time employment.



Your Role:

As a Data Annotator, you’ll be responsible for turning raw data into high-quality, labeled datasets that power customer reports and AI tools for progress tracking, safety compliance, worksite estimation, and more.



Key Responsibilities:

* Annotate and tag construction-related data (e.g., videos, images, blueprints, documents)

* Identify and classify structures, machinery, safety gear, materials and site activities

* Ensure accuracy, consistency, and completeness of data labeling based on detailed project guidelines

* Collaborate with QA specialists and project managers for review cycles and feedback

* Deliver high-quality labeled datasets on a defined schedule



What We’re Looking For:

- Meticulous attention to detail and high accuracy standards

- Basic familiarity with construction terms or visual elements (helpful, but training is provided)

- Ability to follow complex, detailed instructions and work independently

- Excellent written and conversational English skills for collaborating with teammates

- Comfortable working with our labeling tools and communication platforms (Slack, GSuite, Google Sheets, Zoom)

- Stable internet connection and personal computer/laptop capable of running Chrome with reliable HD video streaming



Experience in data labeling, BPO, architecture, engineering, or construction is a plus!



What We Offer:

* Work with a global team shaping the future of construction technology

* Competitive pay with performance-based incentives and clear pay/skill progression

* 100% remote work with flexible scheduling hours

* Training and upskilling in AI and data operations

* Potential to grow with us into QA, project management, or technical roles



Ready to Join Us?

If you're detail-driven, curious about technology, and excited by the idea of supporting smarter construction worldwide -- we want to hear from you!



Apply now by sending your CV. Please be prepared for a rapid interview cycle as we are seeking several immediate placements.



(BONUS: We will prioritize applicants who additionally provide a short 2-min. video (Loom, unlisted YouTube, Drive, Dropbox) link introducing yourself and any prior data labeling experience.)

title: Social Media Content Creator + Manager (Part-Time ? Full-Time)
description:
ABOUT GUD BASEBALL

GUD Baseball (Ground Up Development) is a pitching velocity development company founded by a former MLB pitcher who went from the upper 80s to consistently touching 100+ mph. We've trained 450+ athletes remotely, with 175+ breaking the 90 mph threshold.

Our mission: give serious pitchers the exact blueprint to add real, measurable velocity — no gimmicks, no conventional lesson model. We're growing fast and need a content creator who can help us reach the athletes who need us most.



POSITION OVERVIEW

This role starts part-time (approximately 20 hours/week) with a clear path to full-time based on performance and output quality. We send content in batches — not on a rigid daily schedule — so you'll need to be self-directed, manage your own pipeline, and deliver consistently without being micromanaged.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



Edit raw coaching clips, athlete training footage, and screen recordings into short-form content optimized for each platform

Write hooks, captions, and CTAs that stop the scroll and drive engagement for a 16–26 year old pitcher audience

Research and apply platform-specific hashtag strategies to maximize organic reach and follower growth

Identify the best posting times for our target market and maintain a consistent publishing schedule

Repurpose long-form content into platform-native clips across all managed channels

Source or create supplemental content to fill the calendar between raw footage batches

Track weekly performance metrics (views, follows, engagement rate) and bring improvement recommendations

Own the content calendar and coordinate with our team around promotions, webinars, and program launches





PLATFORMS YOU'LL MANAGE

TikTok | Instagram Reels | YouTube Shorts | X 
) |
 | LinkedIn



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Proven short-form video editing experience — a portfolio or reel with at least 3 examples is required to be considered

Strong understanding of what actually performs on TikTok and Instagram Reels (hooks, pacing, sound, text overlays)

Ability to recommend your own tool stack — we're open to your suggestions (CapCut, OpusClip, Metricool, etc.)

Experience managing multiple social platforms simultaneously with a consistent brand voice

Strong written English — you'll be writing captions, hooks, and hashtag sets independently

Self-directed with clear communication — you'll manage your own output pipeline between content batches

Interest in sports, fitness, or athletic performance is a genuine plus

Comfortable pulling basic analytics and reporting what's working





COMPENSATION

$3–$5/hr USD depending on experience

Starting part-time (~20 hrs/week) with a path to full-time based on performance



HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, your application must include all of the following:



A link to your portfolio, reel, or at least 3 examples of short-form content you've created or edited

3–5 sentences on why you're the right fit for a sports/performance brand targeting young athletes

A list of the tools you currently use for video editing, scheduling, and analytics — and what you'd recommend we use



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.

Use the subject line: GUD Content Creator — [Your Name]

title: Senior Video Editor (Luxury Real Estate)
description:
Senior Video Editor (Luxury Real Estate)



Full-Time Position



We are a luxury real estate media company seeking a full-time Senior Video Editor who specializes in crafting high-end, cinematic property films. This role is for a highly skilled professional who understands storytelling, pacing, and premium color—and can consistently deliver polished, luxury-level video content.



About the Role



As our Senior Video Editor, you will be responsible for editing a steady volume of luxury real estate videos, including cinematic property tours, agent-led videos, and brand storytelling content.



Every project should reflect a refined, high-end aesthetic—clean edits, intentional pacing, natural yet elevated color grading, and seamless motion. This is not a template-driven role. We value precision, consistency, and creative craftsmanship.



Required Expertise

- 8+ years of professional video editing experience (senior level)

- Strong background in:

- Luxury real estate video editing

- Cinematic property tours

- Agent/on-camera videos

- Story-driven brand content



Advanced expertise in:

- High-end color grading (natural, clean, luxury tone)

- DaVinci Resolve (required)

- Speed ramping and motion timing

- Music-driven editing and pacing

- Clean, professional captioning for social and branding



Deep understanding of:

- Visual storytelling and narrative flow

- Shot selection and sequencing

- Matching footage across multiple cameras and lighting conditions

- Maintaining consistency across projects and clients



Technical Requirements / Advanced proficiency in:

- DaVinci Resolve (primary editing platform)

- Strong working knowledge of:

- Color management and node-based grading workflows

- Export settings for social media, MLS, and high-end marketing use



Strictly no reliance on:

AI-generated edits

Auto-cutting or template-based platforms



What We’re Looking For



A dedicated full-time editor—not a freelancer splitting attention.

Someone who understands luxury pacing—when to slow down, when to build energy

Strong attention to detail (no sloppy cuts, mismatched color, or over-editing)

Ability to create emotion-driven edits, not just compile clips

Reliable communication and consistent turnaround times

Alignment with a premium, luxury brand aesthetic



Nice to Have

Experience editing $1M+ luxury listings

Familiarity with real estate marketing trends and agent branding

Experience working with drone footage and gimbal-based walkthroughs



What Success Looks Like



Videos feel intentional, cinematic, and elevated

Agents look natural, confident, and well-paced on camera

Every project reinforces a luxury brand standard

Consistent quality across high volume without sacrificing detail

title: Short-Form Video Editor — AI Prank Reels (TikTok / IG Reels / YouTube Shorts)
description:
About the role: We're producing viral AI-powered prank videos for TikTok/Reels and need a fast, creative editor who understands the platform. Each video has 3 pre-made segments that you'll assemble and polish:



Hook — AI-generated video (the shocking reveal that stops the scroll)

App demo — Screen recording showing how the prank was made

Chat reaction — iPhone iMessage screen recording of the victim's response

What you'll do:



Assemble the 3 clips into one cohesive vertical reel (9:16)

Add bold, attention-grabbing captions/text overlays (CapCut or Canva style)

Time the text to match the conversation pacing

Add trending sounds / background music

Color correct and match the segments so they flow seamlessly

Optimize the first 1-2 seconds for maximum hook/retention

Export at 1080x1920, ready to post

You're a great fit if you:



Have experience editing short-form viral content (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Understand pacing, retention, and what makes people stop scrolling

Can match the editing style of top-performing prank/AI content creators

Know how to use CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar

Can turn around edits fast (same day / next day)

Have a portfolio of short-form content with strong view counts

Volume: ~7-10 videos per batch, ongoing work for the right person. We provide all raw assets — you bring the editing magic.



To apply: Send 2-3 examples of short-form content you've edited (prank or reaction style preferred). Bonus if you can do a test edit with sample clips we provide.

Please include "outfit graphic" in your application so I know you read this fully



Start: ASAP

title: [Fast Hiring] Virtual Receptionist VA (Remote) | 24-Hour Review
description:
Important: Our application process moves very quickly. If you are selected for the next rounds of interviews, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist. This role consists of handling inbound calls, booking appointments, and completing various administrative tasks. This is a long-term, performance-based position. All calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



For candidates who may be a stronger fit outside of a voice-based role, we also offer non-voice positions with a heavier focus on administrative tasks, subject to availability and overall fit.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: E-Commerce Product Sourcing & Purchasing Assistant
description:
Overview:

I'm looking for a detail-oriented, fast-moving assistant to help identify and purchase profitable sneaker opportunities from private 
 groups and online retailers. You will be fully trained on the process.



Responsibilities:

* Monitor a private 
 channel for sneaker links and buying instructions during assigned hours

* Analyze whether a product is profitable using a private Chrome extension

* Execute purchases quickly and accurately when a good opportunity appears

* Apply discount codes, select correct sizes, and complete checkout efficiently

* Create retail accounts when needed following a structured process

* Log all purchases into our internal tracking system called ShipNinja



Work Structure & Pay:

* You will be assigned a daily monitoring window of approximately 7 AM to 7 PM EST, Monday - Saturday (U.S. Time, Flexible)

* Links are sent sporadically throughout the day. You are being paid to be present and ready, not for constant work

* When a link is posted, you must be able to act within 1 to 2 minutes

* Pay is a $120 monthly retainer for availability, plus a $1 bonus per successful purchase completed. Expect to be purchasing < 300 units a month.



Training Process:

* You will start by reviewing real opportunities and telling me what you would buy and why

* I will give feedback until your judgment is consistent

* Once approved, you will begin executing purchases with oversight



Requirements:

* Strong attention to detail as small mistakes are costly

* Ability to act fast under time pressure

* Reliable internet and ability to access U.S. websites without issues

* Comfortable with 
, multiple browser tabs, and online tools at once

* Follows processes exactly without skipping steps

* Honest, professional, and trustworthy



How To Apply:

You must complete ALL of the following or your application will not be reviewed.



* 1. Record a short Loom or similar screen video showing how you would figure out if a product is worth buying to resell, your step-by-step thought process as you evaluate it, and what you would do if you are unsure.



* 2. Include your availability and timezone.



Note: You do not need to know sneaker reselling. Full training is provided. This application tests how you think, not what you already know. Applications without a screen recording will be ignored.

title: Commercial Real Estate Accountant
description:
Job description:



Job Title: Bookkeeper / Property Accountant (Must have Experience. Please do not Apply if you do not have the Required Experience)



Job Type: Full-time



About Us:



Join our thriving and growing commercial real estate firm specializing in property management. We manage a diverse portfolio of properties, focusing on optimizing property performance and fostering long-term client relationships. We are dedicated to maintaining financial records, analyzing data, and providing valuable financial insights to property management and owners. We seek a detail-oriented and experienced Bookkeeper/Property Accountant who is proficient in QuickBooks Enterprise and has a solid understanding of commercial real estate leasing.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage all bookkeeping and property accounting functions using QuickBooks Enterprise, ensuring accurate and timely financial data.

Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records for each property managed, including recording rent payments, tracking expenses, and processing invoices from vendors.

Analyze various transactions and identify appropriate accounting treatment, including month-end accruals and tenant billings.

Prepare comprehensive financial reports such as profit and loss statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements to provide insights into the financial performance of the properties.

 must also include a required rate of hourly pay, plus your past three hourly wages of your last jobs with your resume.

 a PDF copy of your resume along with applying for the job through this job add on onlinejobs.ph to be considered for this job.

title: Property Management & Accounting Assistant
description:
Company Overview:

Merlynn Real Estate Partners is a vertically integrated real estate investment and development firm focused on renovating and developing residential homes and multifamily buildings in the United States.



Position Overview:

The Property Operations & Accounting Assistant will serve as an assistant in day-to-day operations of a growing self-managed portfolio, ensuring that property operations run smoothly, efficiently, and without requiring constant oversight from leadership.

This role requires the applicant to have a background of property management operations-first, with responsibility for coordinating maintenance, managing vendors, tracking property performance, supporting tenant-related workflows and accounting. In addition, this role will require oversight of financials, bookkeeping, bill pay, and basic financial reporting.

The ideal candidate is highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive—someone who can own execution, maintain structure, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks. The Property Operations & Accounting Assistant will serve as an integral part of the monitoring property operations of the portfolio and will be responsible for accurate bookkeeping, producing reliable financial reporting, and supporting operational property performance across the portfolio.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Accounting, Bookkeeping & Financial Management

- Maintain accurate books across all entities (property-level and corporate)

- Manage accounts payable and receivable, including vendor bills, payments and rent collections

- Perform monthly bank and credit card reconciliations across all entities (property-level and corporate)

- Prepare monthly financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)

- Track budgets vs. actuals across properties and construction projects

- Support tax preparation by coordinating with CPA and organizing financials

- Ensure proper expense categorization and cost allocation across entities

- Monitor cash balances and flag liquidity concerns proactively

- Analyze and monitor trends in expenses, income across all entities



2. Asset Management Support

- Tracking key performance metrics (Occupancy, Delinquency, Income, Expenses)

- Monitor tenant payment behavior and flag risks early

- Support eviction tracking and payment plan monitoring

- Perform general property management tasks and communication with residents

- Vendor management and work order dispatch and monitoring

- Assisting with operational reporting for investor updates

- Help identify opportunities to improve property performance through expense reduction or revenue growth



3. Process Improvement & Systems:

- Create and refine SOPs for property management and accounting workflows

- Ensure data integrity across accounting systems (Buildium, Xero, Waves, spreadsheets)

- Improve efficiency in billing, collections, reconciliations, reporting processes

- Assist in implementing scalable financial and asset management systems as the portfolio grows



Qualifications Required:

- 2–5+ years of property management experience

- Technical experience with accounting or bookkeeping 

- High attention to detail and accuracy (non-negotiable)

- Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets

- Experience with developing accounting systems and reconciliations processes

- Ability to manage multiple entities and accounts



Qualifications Preferred:

- Experience with Buildium or similar property management software

- Experience with Xero or similar property accounting software

- Real estate accounting experience



Core Competencies:

- Detail-Oriented: Catches errors others miss

- Ownership Mentality: Treats company finances like their own

- Self-Starter: Ability to handle accountability and work independently

- Analytical Thinking: Can interpret numbers, not just record them

- Organized & Systematic: Builds repeatable systems and processes

- Proactive Communicator: Flags issues early (tenant issues, maintenance, delinquency)

- Trustworthiness: Can be relied on with complete transparency and integrity

title: Executive Assistant - Remote, Full-Time
description:
Executive Assistant - Remote, Full-Time



About the Role





We are hiring an Executive Assistant for an entrepreneur and partner in a fast-growing neuroscience and manifestation coaching business. Our program helps people rewire their brains, reprogram their subconscious minds, and become the best versions of themselves.







You will be the founder's right hand and "second brain," taking ownership of lower-leverage operational tasks, inbox management, customer support, and the dozens of small threads that keep the business running smoothly.





We need someone sharp, structured, and proactive enough to chase the founder when he forgets things, not the other way around. You must execute with a high level of precision and pay very close attention to detail.





Hours





Mon–Fri standard business hours (US time zone overlap preferred)

Light weekend coverage if needed: brief inbox check for emergencies, not full days







Key Responsibilities





Inbox & Community Management





Take full ownership of the founder's daily
 triage.

Handle community management inquiries and respond to prospective students wanting to join our program.

Draft replies for routine items, flag the urgent, and filter out the noise so the founder does not have to live in the inbox.







Refund Request Processing & Refutation

Manage incoming refund requests and treat them as structured projects.

Pull attendance data from Zoom to verify if students met contract stipulations (e.g., attending scheduled coaching calls with our CSMs).

Compile evidence and draft response guidelines explaining why a refund is denied based on the data.







Dispute Resolution Prep





Compile all necessary data and evidence when a chargeback or dispute occurs.

Create the final dispute response document for the founder to simply review and submit.





App Support & Troubleshooting

Handle support tickets from users experiencing issues with the app (e.g., unable to access videos or general usage problems).

Help users troubleshoot and resolve their technical issues promptly.





Access Management (Offboarding)

Track students reaching the end of their program term.

Cross-reference systems to ensure students who do not extend have their access to the app and community properly revoked.





Content Uploads

Regularly upload our coaching calls into our AI platform to train the model and improve its responses.

Manage this process consistently and help set up automations where possible.





Task & Project Tracking

Maintain a single source of truth for everything the founder delegates.

Chase him on items he forgets; be the safety net.

Ensure no task gets lost on your watch.







Tools & Tech Stack

You will be expected to be comfortable with, or willing to learn, the following tools:





Gmail / Google Workspace 
, docs, sheets, drive)

Zoom (pulling attendance reports, managing recordings)

Uscreen (our app and community platform)

Zapier (automations and workflow management)

Stripe (basic payment and dispute management)

Calendly (booking and scheduling management)

Delphi (our AI platform; full training provided)









Who You Are

Sharp: Has a brain, uses it, and does not need babysitting.

Structured: Builds clean systems so nothing falls through the cracks.

Proactive: Chases the boss, not the other way around.

Detail-obsessed: Pays very close attention to detail and executes flawlessly.

Trustworthy: Will have access to sensitive accounts, student data, and systems. An NDA will be required upon hiring.

Reliable: When it is done, it is done; when it is not, you flag it early.

Payment Terms: Bi-weekly pay (paid in arrears). Period ends Friday; payment clears by Wednesday.

Probationary Period: This role has a 90-day probationary period. Part-time workers are not paid for holidays. No paid holidays will be granted until the probationary period is successfully completed.

Best wishes,

Sheila M

title: Amazon Product Research & Sourcing Expert
description:
Olvy is a fast-growing Dutch e-commerce brand selling premium home appliances across Amazon EU, 
, Kaufland and other marketplaces. We are expanding aggressively and are building a team that operates independently and at scale. We move fast, work structured, and hold high standards across everything we do.



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Product Sourcer who will own our product research and supplier pipeline. You will take input from our CEO (category, target specs, target price) and independently source the best options from Alibaba and other platforms. You will also track and follow up on all potential products from trade fairs such as Canton Fair, compare suppliers, and deliver clear overviews so we can make fast, informed decisions.



This is a key role in our growth. We are launching new products every quarter and we need someone who can keep up with that pace and bring structure to the process.



What You Will Do



• Proven experience in product sourcing or procurement, preferably in consumer goods or e-commerce

• Strong eye for product design and what makes a product stand out in a competitive market

• Excellent command of Alibaba, 1688, and similar platforms

• Highly structured and organized, able to manage multiple product pipelines simultaneously

• Strong communicator in English, both written and spoken

• Proactive, self-directed and able to work without daily guidance

• Experience working with European or Western e-commerce brands is a strong plus



What We Offer



• Competitive salary based on experience

• Direct collaboration with the CEO

• A fast-growing company where your impact is immediately visible

• Room to grow in salary and responsibility as the company scales



How to Apply



Send your application with “Olvy” at the beginning of your subject title, along with a short introduction, your relevant experience, and examples of products you have sourced or compared in the past. Show us how you think and how you work.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Client Success Representative
description:
Client Service Representative (Remote)



Jimerson Tax & Accounting LLC

Part-Time | 25–30 Hours Per Week | Fully Remote



Position Overview



Jimerson Tax & Accounting LLC is seeking a highly responsive and organized Client Service Representative to manage incoming client communication, schedule consultations, and drive follow-up on outstanding items.



This role is the operational heartbeat of the front end of the firm. You will be the first impression for new clients and a key driver in keeping engagements moving forward. Success in this role requires urgency, professionalism, and strong follow-through—especially in a remote environment.



Key Responsibilities



Client Communication (High Responsiveness Required)



* Answer incoming calls using firm phone system (VoIP)

* Respond to client
s and portal messages within defined response times

* Professionally handle inquiries from business owners and nonprofit leaders 

* Capture and document new lead information accurately



Appointment Scheduling & Calendar Management



* Schedule consultations using Zoom Scheduler and internal calendars

* Send confirmations, reminders, and follow-ups

* Proactively reduce no-shows through reminder systems and direct outreach

* Coordinate across time zones when needed



Client Follow-Up & Accountability Tracking



* Follow up on missing tax documents, bookkeeping records, and required client information

* Maintain a live tracker of outstanding items

* Send structured follow-ups (not just reminders—clear requests with deadlines)

* Escalate unresponsive clients or bottlenecks quickly



Workflow & CRM Support



* Update client records in TaxDome and Zoho CRM

* Track status of onboarding, document collection, and active engagements

* Assist with sending engagement letters, organizers, and intake forms

* Keep internal systems clean, accurate, and up to date



Remote Work Expectations (Non-Negotiable)



* Reliable high-speed internet and quiet, professional workspace

* Ability to answer calls live during scheduled hours (not call-back only)

* Consistent availability during agreed-upon working hours

* Strong time management without direct supervision

* Daily check-ins and responsiveness via internal communication tools



Qualifications



Required



* 4 years of client service, administrative, or coordination experience

* Strong phone presence and professional communication skills

* Excellent organization and follow-up ability

* High attention to detail

* Comfortable working in multiple systems simultaneously



Preferred



* Experience in accounting, tax, or professional services firms

* Familiarity with CRM and client portal systems

* Experience with remote team environments

* Exposure to scheduling tools and workflow management systems





Ideal Candidate Profile



This role is for someone who:



* Shows initiative and follows up without being asked

* Keeps things from falling through the cracks

* Communicates clearly and directly

* Understands urgency and deadlines

* Can manage multiple clients and priorities without getting overwhelmed



If someone needs constant reminders, this role will not be a good fit.



Schedule



* 25–30 hours per week during the working hours of 9:00am-5:00pm CST

* Set schedule preferred for consistency

* Potential for increased hours during tax season



* Applications without resumes will not be considered. *

title: Research Assistant
description:
JOB OPPORTUNITY: RESEARCH & PERSONAL ASSISTANT TO DOCTORAL RESEARCHER



PROJECT CONTEXT: Supporting a doctoral thesis and ongoing research papers focused on Latin American macroeconomics, currency stabilization, dollarization, and global geopolitical influences.



THE OPPORTUNITY: This role offers deep exposure to high-level academic research. For a high-performing assistant, I am committed to providing formal letters of recommendation and acknowledgment in published work.



THE NATURE OF THE ROLE: This is a remote, part-time, and STRICTLY TRANSACTIONAL position. It is a dual-function role requiring high-level academic support and assistance with personal administrative logistics. It is designed for a professional who prefers a high-accountability environment.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



ACADEMIC VERIFICATION: Audit and correct citations to ensure 100% compliance with APA 7th edition standards.



RESEARCH PAPER SUPPORT: Support for ongoing research papers and current projects; this includes managing drafts and ensuring data consistency.



DATA RETRIEVAL: Gather economic data and pricing indices from retail and government websites across Latin America and the USA.



PERSONAL & ADMINISTRATIVE SUPPORT: Assist with non-academic logistics (travel research, scheduling, household-related tasks).



REQUIRED SKILLS & LANGUAGES



ENGLISH: Must have C1/C2 professional fluency (written and spoken).



SPANISH (A MAJOR PLUS): Functional reading proficiency is highly preferred for navigating foreign-language websites.



COMMUNICATION & CONNECTIVITY (STRICT REQUIREMENTS)



REDUNDANT INTERNET: You must have a stable Wi-Fi connection AND a mobile phone with a consistent data plan for emergency hotspots.



AVAILABILITY: You must be contactable and responsive during the EVENING HOURS in the Philippines (Daylight hours in Ecuador, GMT-5).



HIGH-ACCOUNTABILITY & EFFICIENCY STANDARDS



EFFICIENCY AUDITS: I monitor output density. I have established "benchmark times" for most tasks. If your logged time consistently exceeds these benchmarks without a valid technical explanation, those hours will be audited and potentially rejected.



THE CLOCK IS THE CLOCK: Time-tracking software (with active window monitoring) is the sole authority for compensation. The clock MUST be stopped for all personal breaks, social media, or non-work messaging.



ZERO HALLUCINATION POLICY: Providing a "fact" or citation not verified by a primary source is considered a failure of the task.



COMPENSATION & BILLING



PERFORMANCE-BASED GROWTH: This position begins with a 90-day trial period. A formal review will occur after 90 days of proven commitment and high-integrity work, with the potential for a rate increase.



WEEKLY POST-PAYMENT: Compensation is processed WEEKLY, exclusively for work completed and verified via logs.



NO ADVANCES OR RETAINERS: I do not provide pre-payments, cash advances, or loans under any circumstances.



EBB AND FLOW WORKLOAD: There will be weeks with ZERO WORK AVAILABLE. Payment is strictly for recorded, approved minutes worked.



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS



MANAGED AI TOOLS: Proficiency in Gemini Pro/Advanced is required. If hired, you will use a project-specific login provided by the Client.



VPN & SECURITY: You must have a reliable VPN (South America/USA) and an up-to-date antivirus suite.



HOW TO APPLY

Please send a brief message including:



DIRECT CONFIRMATION: Explicitly state that you accept the "Weekly Post-Payment" structure, the "No Advances/Loans" policy, the "Efficiency Audit" clause, and the "Redundant Internet" requirements.



INFRASTRUCTURE CHECK: Confirm you have a working VPN, antivirus software, and a mobile data backup plan.



LANGUAGE ABILITY: Briefly describe your level of comfort navigating Spanish-language websites.



CONFLICT DISCLOSURE: List any current academic or work commitments.



NOTE: Applications that appear to be written by AI will be discarded immediately. Successful applicants will be sent a 30-minute technical trial task before an interview is scheduled.

title: Video editor for my Personal Finance YouTube channel
description:
I am looking for a professional to create / edit one YouTube video about personal finance content aimed at the 40+ demographic. 

The length of the video should be between 10-12 minutes long and pay $20 dollar per video.

I would be looking for approximately 3 videos per week, resulting 3 videos per week * 4 weeks * $20 per video = $240 per month.

 

I will provide the script and voice over. (You will not have to do any research regarding the video topic for the video, you will have to find clips/photos/background music/etc to create the video).



The type of video editor I am searching for is to execute a "Financial Noir" aesthetic for an investigative documentary channel. The style must be cinematic and clinical, prioritizing high-contrast "low-key" lighting with deep shadows and a muted navy/gold color palette. I require a deliberate, sophisticated editing pace that avoids "fast-cut" cliches, focusing instead on macro-textures, slow camera drifts, and translucent monospaced HUD overlays. Think Mindhunter meets high-end financial audits—atmospheric, authoritative, and expensive. We value an editor who can interpret this moody, "secret briefing" vibe while maintaining a high standard of visual grit and tension.



I am therefore are looking for someone who:

- Has experience/work in creating YouTube videos

- Has experience using video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro or like software

- Fluent in English

- Able to work within the deadline (24 hours) - including for these samples.

 

The style should adhere to our brand guidelines as per above. This may change across channels.

However, you can be very creative to make the video entertaining and engaging, including the use of AI.



When interested, please provide minimum of 3 videos examples matching to my type of channel.

Please provide links to Google Drive/ Dropbox, NOT any attachments.

 

If you have read until the end of this job description, please type your favorite sport at the beginning or end of your proposal.

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---



The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---



Why We Need You



We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---



What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer. Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---



The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---



We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---



Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---



Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---



Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---



Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---



How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status





Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---



Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi



We look forward to meeting you Monday

mber who can handle graphic and web design.This is a remote, long-term role for someone who is proactive, meets deadlines, and communicates clearly.

title: AI Email Designer Needed
description:
Hello there!



We are a growing
 Marketing Agency with 60+ active e-commerce clients looking for an enthusiastic and skilled
 Designer.



This is a part-time role where you will be working alongside our current team of 50+.



PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU ARE A STRONG
 DESIGNER WHO BUILDS FINAL DESIGNS IN FIGMA AND USES AI 



We are looking for a top-tier
 designer first and foremost. Your main job is to design beautiful, high-converting
s inside Figma for our DTC clients across health, beauty, supplements, pet care, apparel, jewelry, and faith-based brands.



We need someone who consistently hits deadlines and produces polished, on-brand, scroll-stopping
 designs every single time.



These designs will be made for individual
 sends across our client roster. Our
 designs are typically short to medium in length and will always be based on each client's website branding. All text copy will be provided for the design.



The final output for every
 design must be built and exported from Figma at 1000px width with grouped, editable blocks. Figma is your home base.



As a secondary part of the role, you should know how to use AI image generation tools like Nano Banana Pro, Midjourney, Flux, or similar to create supporting visuals when a client does not have a strong asset library to pull from.



This includes things like hero images, lifestyle shots, background scenes, and supporting product visuals.



You will use these tools to prompt and generate the imagery, then bring everything back into Figma to assemble the final
 design. AI image generation is a supporting skill, not the main job.



Here are examples of the level (and beyond) we expect you to design at:



[Insert link to attached Azure
 examples + Google Drive folder of references]



Your designs should match this quality at minimum and ideally exceed it in layout creativity, hierarchy, typography, and visual storytelling.



 



Requirements:



- Minimum 2-year
 design experience



- Highly proficient in Figma (this is the most important requirement)



- Strong understanding of brand identity, color theory, typography, and direct-response design



- Able to take a brand's website and translate its look and feel into a polished
 design



- Working knowledge of AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro preferred, or Midjourney, Flux, Sora, etc.) for creating supporting imagery when client assets are limited



- Proficient in English



- Proficient with Slack for team communication



- Able to work weekdays and weekends



 



Bonus Points:



- Experience designing
s inside Klaviyo, 
, or Iterable



- Strong eye for direct-response design (CTA hierarchy, scannability, visual flow)



- Experience working with brands that have minimal asset libraries



- Familiarity with Claude (claude.ai) for design ideation, SVG generation, or layout variations



 



Your tasks as an
 Designer will include:



1. Build polished, on-brand
 designs in Figma using the text copy and brand references we provide



2. Match each brand's identity perfectly, from typography to color palette to overall mood



3. Use AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro, etc.) to create supporting visuals such as hero images, lifestyle shots, and background scenes when client assets are limited, then bring those visuals into Figma to finalize the design



4. Design up to 5
s per day (the majority will typically be for one or two clients so the workflow stays efficient)



5. Export all final designs from Figma at 1000px width with grouped, editable blocks



6. Communicate progress and revisions with the team in Slack



7. Complete all tasks daily before 3 PM PH time



 



We ask that you answer the questions below to help us get to know you.



Questions:



1. Have you designed for
 marketing before? If yes, for how long?



2. Do you have examples of
 designs you have built in Figma we can review? Please link
 designs only (no other design work).



3. How would you approach designing an
 for a brand whose entire visual identity you are seeing for the first time? Walk us through your process from website to finished Figma file.



4. Have you used AI image generation tools (Nano Banana Pro, Midjourney, Flux, Sora, etc.) to create supporting imagery for a design? If yes, please share 1 to 2 examples of AI visuals you generated and how you incorporated them into a final design.



5. How do you keep AI-generated imagery from looking generic or "AI-ish" so it blends naturally with a real brand identity?



6. How long would it take you to build a fully designed
 in Figma if all the copy and brand references are provided?



7. Can you work mornings (8 AM to 12 PM PH time)?



8. Can you commit to at least 6 months if selected?



9. Can you work at least 2 hours on weekends?



10. Have you worked for an
 Marketing agency or e-commerce team before?



11. How do you keep your designs feeling fresh across multiple campaigns for the same brand without falling into repetitive layouts?



 



We are looking to grow very quickly over the next few months and this position will allow for opportunities to move into incentive-based pay and a salary increase. After 3 months, there will be a salary increase.



We ask that if you do provide examples, they be relevant to what the job describes.



Biweekly Pay: $150 CAD



Hours: 4 Hours Per day, some days it will be less than 4 graphics to make :)



Currently, you must be able to work at least 20hrs/week (including weekends)



 



*** HOW TO APPLY ***



*You must include your favorite color + ai tool in the subject line of your application for it to be considered (this shows you actually read it and is very important; if you do not have it in there, your application will be skipped).



1.) Send us a message answering all 11 questions



2.) Include examples of your Figma
 design work



3.) Include 1 to 2 examples of AI-generated imagery you have used inside a real design (if applicable)



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Canadian Experienced Senior Operations and Bookkeeping firm Manager
description:
Operations & Bookkeeping Manager (Canadian Clients | Full-Time Remote)

About the Role

We are a growing Canadian bookkeeping firm seeking a high-level, full-time Operations & Bookkeeping Manager to oversee both client work and internal operations.

This is a senior leadership position for someone who is not only an experienced bookkeeper, but also confident in leading a team, improving systems, and acting as the right hand to the business owner.

You will be responsible for ensuring that client files are accurate, deadlines are met, and the team is operating efficiently and continuously improving.

This is not a task-based role. This is an ownership role.

Who This Role Is For

You are:

A senior-level bookkeeper with strong technical expertise

A natural leader who can manage and guide a team

Process-driven and always looking for ways to improve efficiency

Confident communicating with clients in fluent, professional English

Proactive, organized, and capable of running operations independently

Core Responsibilities

Client & Technical Oversight

Review and finalize monthly bookkeeping files

Perform HST reviews and filings (Canada)

Prepare year-end, accountant-ready files

Oversee and support cleanup and catch-up projects

Manage complex workflows including:

E-commerce (Shopify, multi-channel)

Restaurants / POS systems

Clearing accounts and payment processors

Ensure accuracy across reconciliations, AR/AP, and reporting

Team Leadership & Performance Management

Manage and support a team of bookkeepers

Review work, provide feedback, and ensure quality control

Monitor productivity and identify inefficiencies

Proactively identify slow areas and implement solutions to improve speed and accuracy

Coach team members to improve performance

Host weekly team meetings and regular check-ins

Support onboarding and training of new hires

Systems, SOPs & Training

Continuously build, improve, and maintain SOPs

Create clear, practical Loom training videos:

In English (documentation & clarity)

In Filipino (team training & support)

Ensure SOPs are efficient, easy to follow, and actively used

Identify workflow gaps and implement better processes

Operations & Firm Management

Oversee workflow systems and task management

Manage monthly client invoicing

Respond to client questions and
s professionally

Ensure deadlines (HST, month-end, year-end) are consistently met

Act as the day-to-day operational lead of the firm

Required Experience & Skills

Strong experience with Canadian bookkeeping (required)

Advanced knowledge of:

QuickBooks Online (expert level)

Bank reconciliations and financial reporting

HST filings and compliance

Experience with:

Cleanup work and historical corrections

Multi-client environments (bookkeeping firm experience strongly preferred)

E-commerce and/or restaurant clients

Hands-on experience with NetSuite and Xero (required)

Proven experience managing or supervising a team

Excellent written and verbal English (client-facing level)

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Available full-time during North American business hours

Compensation & Growth

Full-time, remote position (Philippines-based)

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term role with growth into senior leadership

Performance-Based Bonuses

This role includes performance-based bonuses tied to:

Improving team efficiency and turnaround times

Strengthening systems and workflows

Supporting firm growth without increasing team strain

We value scaling through smarter systems and stronger teams, not by overworking staff.

Team Culture & Perks

Supportive, structured, and growth-focused environment

Long-term, stable role within a growing firm

“Paid lunch” every final Friday of the month (team meal allowance provided)

Opportunity to play a key role in shaping firm operations

How to Apply

Please include:

A summary of your experience with Canadian bookkeeping

Details of your team management experience

A short video or voice recording introducing yourself

Your availability and expected monthly salary

References & Verification

Shortlisted candidates will be required to provide:

At least 2 professional references (employers or clients)

Contact details 
 + phone/WhatsApp)

Permission for a brief reference check

We will ask specific questions related to:

Accuracy and quality of work

Ability to meet deadlines

Client communication

Leadership and team management

Assessment Process

As part of the hiring process, candidates may be asked to:

Review a sample bookkeeping file and identify issues

Provide recommendations for corrections and improvements

Demonstrate understanding of Canadian bookkeeping standards (including HST and reconciliations)

This step is designed to ensure strong real-world experience and technical ability.

title: Reddit Manager
description:
Job Title: Reddit Community Engagement Specialist — Wellness & Consciousness Brand (Part-Time, Remote)

Compensation: $2/hour × 3 hours/day | $6/day paid weekly via PayPal or Wise

Hours: 3 hours/day, 5 days/week | Flexible schedule



About The Brand

We are a ceremonial wellness company rooted in the intersection of ancient plant medicine traditions, modern neuroscience, and consciousness exploration. Our products and content live at the crossroads of sacred cacao, botanical blends, and the science of sub-perceptual cognitive enhancement. We are fully compliant and operate within federal guidelines.

Our community includes seekers, researchers, meditators, biohackers, therapists, and anyone curious about expanding human potential through plant-based ceremony and intentional living.



About The Role

We need a genuine Reddit community member — not a marketer — who already lives and breathes this world. Someone who reads about psychedelic science for fun. Someone who knows the difference between Terence McKenna and Michael Pollan. Someone who can discuss the history of psilocybin research, the endocannabinoid system, or Amazonian ceremony traditions without Googling first.

This is an educational and community engagement role. You will represent our brand's worldview — not push products. Eighty percent of what you do is genuinely contribute knowledge and perspective to relevant conversations. The remaining twenty percent is naturally and authentically weaving in awareness of our brand when it is genuinely relevant.



What You'll Do Daily



Monitor assigned subreddits in the psychedelic, wellness, neuroscience, and consciousness spaces

Leave thoughtful, substantive comments that demonstrate real knowledge

Share relevant science, history, and cultural context around plant medicine and ceremonial traditions

Post occasional questions that spark genuine community discussion

Write in a natural, conversational voice — never corporate, never salesy

Submit a daily log of every interaction with links and 24-hour engagement numbers

Follow our detailed brand voice guide on every post — no improvising on sensitive topics





Target Community Areas

You will be engaging in communities around:



Psychedelic science and research

Microdosing protocols and experiences

Plant medicine ceremony and integration

Neuroscience and cognitive enhancement

Consciousness exploration and meditation

Ceremonial cacao and botanical wellness

Ancient history of entheogenic traditions





Requirements



Active Reddit account with 500+ karma — must share username in application

Genuine personal interest in psychedelics, plant medicine, or consciousness research — this is not negotiable

Excellent written English — coherent, nuanced, and intellectually credible

Ability to discuss the science and history of psilocybin, ceremonial traditions, and botanical medicine with authority

Deep understanding of Reddit culture — you know which communities have which rules and why

Consistent daily availability and self-directed work ethic

Meticulous about submitting daily logs without being reminded





You Are The Right Person If You



Already follow researchers like Robin Carhart-Harris, Matthew Johnson, or Michael Pollan

Have personal experience with plant medicine ceremony or microdosing protocols

Can write about the history of entheogenic use across cultures — Mazatec, Amazonian, Eleusinian — naturally and accurately

Understand the difference between recreational use and intentional ceremonial practice

Know how to add genuine value to a Reddit thread without anyone suspecting you have any agenda

Care about destigmatizing plant medicine through education not hype





You Are Not The Right Person If You



Have never personally explored this space

Write in corporate or promotional language

Cannot commit to 3 hours every weekday

Are looking for a shortcut or automation opportunity

Would need to Google basic terms like "set and setting" or "integration"





How To Apply

Send a message with all four of the following — incomplete applications will not be reviewed:



Your Reddit username — we will review your comment history

A short paragraph about your personal relationship with plant medicine, consciousness exploration, or ceremonial wellness

A sample comment you would leave on a Reddit post titled "Has anyone found natural ways to improve focus and clarity long-term?" — write it exactly as you would actually post it, in your natural voice

Your timezone and daily availability window

title: Executive Assistant (Operations Support) — High-Level Execution Role
description:
Executive Assistant (Operations Support) — High-Level Execution Role



Position: Part-Time (with potential to grow Full-Time)

Compensation:$450/month

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 10:30 AM – 3:00 PM EST (includes 30-minute unpaid break)



---



Role Overview



We are hiring a high-caliber Executive Assistant who operates as an execution partner not a task-taker. This role requires someone who can think, d
, and move things forward without constant direction.



You are not here to “assist” in the traditional sense—you are here to **own, execute, and ensure outcomes happen.



---



Key Responsibilities



Executive Support & Time Protection



* Manage the CEO’s calendar, inbox, and daily schedule with precision and strategic prioritization

* Protect the CEO’s daily 4-hour content creation block (no meetings, no interruptions, no exceptions unless critical)

* Filter, prioritize, and respond to communications on behalf of the CEO



**Operations & Execution**



* Act as the operational bridge across the team—ensuring alignment, clarity, and follow-through

* Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across all departments

* Identify bottlenecks and proactively solve them without waiting for instructions



Team Coordination & Oversight



* Coordinate communication between tea
mbers and leadership

* Stay closely aware of team performance, output, and daily activities

* Serve as the CEO’s “eyes and ears” across operations—flagging issues, gaps, and opportunities



Business & Personal Coordination



* Handle both business and personal logistics with discretion and efficiency

* Manage scheduling, coordination, and administrative tasks end-to-end



Payroll & Administrative Support



* Review payroll to ensure all tea
mbers are accurately accounted for before CEO approval

* Verify attendance, deliverables, and accountability metrics



Delegation & Authority



* Execute delegated tasks with full authority from the CEO

* Drive completion of tasks by following up, pushing when needed, and ensuring results

* Hold tea
mbers accountable to deadlines and standards



---



What We’re Looking For



Non-Negotiables



* High ownership mentality — you take responsibility and finish what you start

* Strong execution skills — you move fast, think clearly, and get things done

* Excellent communication — clear, direct, and professional

* Highly organized with strong attention to detail

* Proactive problem-solver — you don’t wait, you act



Experience & Skills



* Proven experience as an Executive Assistant or in a similar high-level operations support role

* Experience supporting fast-paced teams or founders is highly preferred

* Familiarity with project management tools, CRMs, and communication platforms

* Ability to manage multiple priorities without losing quality



Mindset



* Not a “push-button” assistant — you think, d
, and execute

* Comfortable operating with authority and holding others accountable

* Solutions-oriented with a bias for action



---



Application Instructions (Mandatory Requirements)



To be considered, ALL submissions must include the following:



1. Updated CV or Portfolio

2. Video Introduction (2–3 minutes)

3. Contact Details

 Address

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Send your application to: **[Insert
 Here]

Important Note



This role is for someone who wants to operate at a high level, take ownership, and grow into a key operator within the business. If you are looking for a passive, task-based role, this is not the right fit.
